    "tool_name": "Bash",
    "content": "package istiocsr\n\nimport (\n\t\"crypto/x509\"\n\t\"encoding/pem\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"reflect\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\tappsv1 \"k8s.io/api/apps/v1\"\n\tcorev1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\tmetav1 \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/validation/field\"\n\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client\"\n\n\tcertmanagerv1 \"github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager/v1\"\n\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/api/operator/v1alpha1\"\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/controller/common\"\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/operator/assets\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\tcaVolumeMountPath = \"/var/run/configmaps/istio-csr\"\n)\n\nvar errInvalidIssuerRefConfig = fmt.Errorf(\"invalid issuerRef config\")\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) createOrApplyDeployments(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string, istioCSRCreateRecon bool) error {\n\tdesired, err := r.getDeploymentObject(istiocsr, resourceLabels)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to generate deployment resource for creation in %s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), err)\n\t}\n\n\tdeploymentName := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s\", desired.GetNamespace(), desired.GetName())\n\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"reconciling deployment resource\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\tfetched := &appsv1.Deployment{}\n\texist, err := r.Exists(r.ctx, client.ObjectKeyFromObject(desired), fetched)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to check %s deployment resource already exists\", deploymentName)\n\t}\n\n\tif exist {\n\t\tif istioCSRCreateRecon {\n\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeWarning, \"ResourceAlreadyExists\", \"%s deployment resource already exists, maybe from previous installation\", deploymentName)\n\t\t}\n\t\tif hasObjectChanged(desired, fetched) {\n\t\t\tr.log.V(1).Info(\"deployment has been modified, updating to desired state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\t\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update %s deployment resource\", deploymentName)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"deployment resource %s reconciled back to desired state\", deploymentName)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"deployment resource already exists and is in expected state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif !exist {\n\t\tif err := r.Create(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create %s deployment resource\", deploymentName)\n\t\t}\n\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"deployment resource %s created\", deploymentName)\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.updateImageInStatus(istiocsr, desired); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update %s/%s istiocsr status with image info\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) getDeploymentObject(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) (*appsv1.Deployment, error) {\n\tif err := r.assertIssuerRefExists(istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to verify issuer in %s/%s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n\t}\n\n\tdeployment := decodeDeploymentObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(deploymentAssetName))\n\n\tcommon.UpdateNamespace(deployment, istiocsr.GetNamespace())\n\tcommon.UpdateResourceLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n\tupdatePodTemplateLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n\n\tupdateArgList(deployment, istiocsr)\n\n\tif err := updateResourceRequirement(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update resource requirements: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif err := updateAffinityRules(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update affinity rules: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif err := updatePodTolerations(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update pod tolerations: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif err := updateNodeSelector(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update node selector: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif err := r.updateImage(deployment); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"failed to update image %s/%s\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n\t}\n\tif err := r.updateVolumes(deployment, istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update volume %s/%s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn deployment, nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) updateImage(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n\timage := os.Getenv(istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName)\n\tif image == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s environment variable with istiocsr image not set\", istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName)\n\t}\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Image = image\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) updateImageInStatus(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n\tfor _, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n\t\t\tif istiocsr.Status.IstioCSRImage == container.Image {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tistiocsr.Status.IstioCSRImage = container.Image\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn r.updateStatus(r.ctx, istiocsr)\n}\n\nfunc updatePodTemplateLabels(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, resourceLabels map[string]string) {\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Labels = resourceLabels\n}\n\nfunc updateArgList(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n\tistiocsrConfigs := istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig\n\t// Default clusterID to \"Kubernetes\" if not provided.\n\tclusterID := defaultClusterID\n\tif istiocsrConfigs.Server != nil && istiocsrConfigs.Server.ClusterID != \"\" {\n\t\tclusterID = istiocsrConfigs.Server.ClusterID\n\t}\n\targs := []string{\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-level=%d\", istiocsrConfigs.LogLevel),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-format=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.LogFormat),\n\t\t\"--metrics-port=9402\", \"--readiness-probe-port=6060\", \"--readiness-probe-path=/readyz\",\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--certificate-namespace=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Namespace),\n\t\t\"--issuer-enabled=true\", \"--preserve-certificate-requests=false\",\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--issuer-name=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--issuer-kind=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--issuer-group=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.CertManager.IssuerRef.Group),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--root-ca-file=%s/%s\", caVolumeMountPath, IstiocsrCAKeyName),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-certificate-dns-names=cert-manager-istio-csr.%s.svc\", istiocsr.GetNamespace()),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-certificate-duration=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateDuration.Minutes()),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--trust-domain=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.TrustDomain),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--cluster-id=%s\", clusterID),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--max-client-certificate-duration=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.MaxCertificateDuration.Minutes()),\n\t\t\"--serving-address=0.0.0.0:6443\",\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-certificate-key-size=%d\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeySize),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-signature-algorithm=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeyAlgorithm),\n\t\t\"--enable-client-cert-authenticator=false\",\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--leader-election-namespace=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Namespace),\n\t\t\"--disable-kubernetes-client-rate-limiter=false\", \"--istiod-cert-enabled=false\",\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-namespace=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Namespace),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-duration=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateDuration.Minutes()),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-renew-before=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateRenewBefore.Minutes()),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-key-algorithm=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeyAlgorithm),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-key-size=%d\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeySize),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-additional-dns-names=%s\", strings.Join(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateDNSNames, \",\")),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-istio-revisions=%s\", strings.Join(istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Revisions, \",\")),\n\t}\n\n\t// Add configmap-namespace-selector argument if configured\n\tif istiocsrConfigs.IstioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector != \"\" {\n\t\targs = append(args, fmt.Sprintf(\"--configmap-namespace-selector=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector))\n\t}\n\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Args = args\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc updateResourceRequirement(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n\tif reflect.ValueOf(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Resources).IsZero() {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateResourceRequirements(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Resources,\n\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tfor i := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Resources = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Resources\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateAffinityRules(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Affinity == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateAffinityRules(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Affinity,\n\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Affinity = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Affinity\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updatePodTolerations(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Tolerations == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateTolerationsConfig(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Tolerations,\n\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Tolerations = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Tolerations\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateNodeSelector(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.NodeSelector == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateNodeSelectorConfig(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.NodeSelector,\n\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.NodeSelector\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) assertIssuerRefExists(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n\tissuerRefKind := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind)\n\tif issuerRefKind != clusterIssuerKind && issuerRefKind != issuerKind {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager.issuerRef.kind can be any of `%s` or `%s`, configured: %s\", clusterIssuerKind, issuerKind, issuerRefKind)\n\t}\n\n\tissuerRefGroup := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Group)\n\tif issuerRefGroup != issuerGroup {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager.issuerRef.group can be only `%s`, configured: %s\", issuerGroup, issuerRefGroup)\n\t}\n\n\tobj, err := r.getIssuer(istiocsr)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n\t}\n\n\tvar issuerConfig certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig\n\tswitch issuerRefKind {\n\tcase clusterIssuerKind:\n\t\tclusterIssuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"failed to convert to ClusterIssuer\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tissuerConfig = clusterIssuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n\tcase issuerKind:\n\t\tissuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.Issuer)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"failed to convert to Issuer\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tissuerConfig = issuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n\t}\n\tif issuerConfig.ACME != nil {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager.issuerRef uses unsupported ACME issuer\")\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(obj, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update watch label on cert-manager issuer %s\", istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) updateVolumes(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n\t// Use user-configured CA certificate if provided\n\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate != nil {\n\t\tif err := r.handleUserProvidedCA(deployment, istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn common.FromError(err, \"failed to validate and mount CA certificate ConfigMap\")\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Fall back to issuer-based CA certificate if CA certificate is not configured\n\t// Handle issuer-based CA configuration\n\tif err := r.handleIssuerBasedCA(deployment, istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// handleUserProvidedCA processes user-provided CA certificate configuration.\n//\n// It performs the following operations:\n//  1. Validates that the source ConfigMap exists\n//  2. Adds a watch label to the source ConfigMap for change tracking\n//  3. Validates that the ConfigMap contains the specified key and is a valid CA certificate\n//  4. Creates or updates a copy of the ConfigMap in the IstioCSR namespace\n//  5. Configures the deployment to mount the CA certificate volume\n//\n// The caller must ensure that `istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate`\n// is not nil before calling this function to avoid a panic.\n//\n// Returns an error if any validation fails or if ConfigMap operations fail.\nfunc (r *Reconciler) handleUserProvidedCA(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n\tcaCertConfig := istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate\n\n\t// Determine the namespace - use specified namespace or default to IstioCSR namespace\n\tnamespace := caCertConfig.Namespace\n\tif namespace == \"\" {\n\t\tnamespace = istiocsr.GetNamespace()\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate that the source ConfigMap exists\n\tsourceConfigMapKey := types.NamespacedName{\n\t\tName:      caCertConfig.Name,\n\t\tNamespace: namespace,\n\t}\n\n\tsourceConfigMap := &corev1.ConfigMap{}\n\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, sourceConfigMapKey, sourceConfigMap); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"failed to fetch CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name)\n\t}\n\n\t// Add watch label to the source ConfigMap to trigger reconciliation on changes.\n\t// This is done before validation so that if validation fails now, fixing the ConfigMap\n\t// will trigger reconciliation.\n\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(sourceConfigMap, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update watch label on CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name)\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate that the specified key exists in the ConfigMap\n\tif _, exists := sourceConfigMap.Data[caCertConfig.Key]; !exists {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(fmt.Errorf(\"key %q not found in ConfigMap %s/%s\", caCertConfig.Key, sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name), \"invalid CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name)\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate that the key contains PEM-formatted content\n\tpemData := sourceConfigMap.Data[caCertConfig.Key]\n\tif err := r.validatePEMData(pemData); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"invalid PEM data in CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s key %q\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name, caCertConfig.Key)\n\t}\n\n\t// Create a managed copy of the ConfigMap in the IstioCSR namespace.\n\t// The operator does not directly mount the user-provided ConfigMap but creates a managed copy\n\t// (cert-manager-istio-csr-issuer-ca-copy) in the IstioCSR namespace. This approach enables the\n\t// operator to validate any changes to the source ConfigMap before propagating them to the istio-csr\n\t// agent, as ConfigMap changes automatically propagate to mounted pods. The watch label on the source\n\t// ConfigMap triggers reconciliation when modified, allowing the operator to re-validate and update\n\t// its managed copy. Additionally, if a user directly modifies the operator-managed copy, it will be\n\t// reconciled back to the desired state derived from the validated source ConfigMap.\n\tif err := r.createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr, pemData, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create CA certificate ConfigMap copy\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Mount the copied CA certificate ConfigMap (always uses the standard name)\n\tupdateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment)\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// handleIssuerBasedCA handles the creation of CA ConfigMap from issuer secret and volume mounting.\nfunc (r *Reconciler) handleIssuerBasedCA(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n\tvar (\n\t\tissuerConfig certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig\n\t)\n\n\tobj, err := r.getIssuer(istiocsr)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n\t}\n\n\tissuerRefKind := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind)\n\tswitch issuerRefKind {\n\tcase clusterIssuerKind:\n\t\tclusterIssuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(fmt.Errorf(\"failed to convert to ClusterIssuer\"), \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tissuerConfig = clusterIssuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n\tcase issuerKind:\n\t\tissuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.Issuer)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(fmt.Errorf(\"failed to convert to Issuer\"), \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tissuerConfig = issuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n\t}\n\n\tshouldUpdateVolume := false\n\n\tif issuerConfig.CA != nil && issuerConfig.CA.SecretName != \"\" {\n\t\tif err := r.createCAConfigMapFromIssuerSecret(istiocsr, issuerConfig, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create CA ConfigMap\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tshouldUpdateVolume = true\n\t}\n\n\tif issuerConfig.CA == nil {\n\t\tif err := r.createCAConfigMapFromIstiodCertificate(istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create CA ConfigMap\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tshouldUpdateVolume = true\n\t}\n\n\tif shouldUpdateVolume {\n\t\tupdateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) {\n\tconst (\n\t\tcaVolumeName = \"root-ca\"\n\t)\n\tvar (\n\t\tdefaultMode = int32(420)\n\t)\n\n\tdesiredVolumeMount := corev1.VolumeMount{\n\t\tName:      caVolumeName,\n\t\tMountPath: caVolumeMountPath,\n\t\tReadOnly:  true,\n\t}\n\n\tdesiredVolume := corev1.Volume{\n\t\tName: caVolumeName,\n\t\tVolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{\n\t\t\tConfigMap: &corev1.ConfigMapVolumeSource{\n\t\t\t\tLocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{\n\t\t\t\t\tName: IstiocsrCAConfigMapName,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tItems: []corev1.KeyToPath{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:  IstiocsrCAKeyName,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPath: IstiocsrCAKeyName,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: &defaultMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tDefaultMode: &defaultMode,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\t// Update or append volume mount in the istio-csr container\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n\t\t\tvolumeMountExists := false\n\t\t\tfor j, vm := range container.VolumeMounts {\n\t\t\t\tif vm.Name == caVolumeName {\n\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts[j] = desiredVolumeMount\n\t\t\t\t\tvolumeMountExists = true\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif !volumeMountExists {\n\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts = append(\n\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts,\n\t\t\t\t\tdesiredVolumeMount,\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Update or append volume in the deployment\n\tvolumeExists := false\n\tfor i, vol := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n\t\tif vol.Name == caVolumeName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes[i] = desiredVolume\n\t\t\tvolumeExists = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif !volumeExists {\n\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes = append(\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes,\n\t\t\tdesiredVolume,\n\t\t)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) getIssuer(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) (client.Object, error) {\n\tissuerRefKind := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind)\n\tkey := client.ObjectKey{\n\t\tName:      istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name,\n\t\tNamespace: istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Istio.Namespace,\n\t}\n\n\tvar object client.Object\n\tswitch issuerRefKind {\n\tcase clusterIssuerKind:\n\t\tobject = &certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer{}\n\tcase issuerKind:\n\t\tobject = &certmanagerv1.Issuer{}\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, key, object); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch %q issuer: %w\", key, err)\n\t}\n\treturn object, nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) createCAConfigMapFromIstiodCertificate(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n\tistiodCertificate, err := r.getCertificateObject(istiocsr, resourceLabels)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to fetch istiod certificate\")\n\t}\n\n\tsecretKey := client.ObjectKey{\n\t\tName:      istiodCertificate.Spec.SecretName,\n\t\tNamespace: istiodCertificate.GetNamespace(),\n\t}\n\tsecret := &corev1.Secret{}\n\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, secretKey, secret); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch secret in issuer: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(secret, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tcertData := string(secret.Data[IstiocsrCAKeyName])\n\treturn r.createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr, certData, resourceLabels)\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) createCAConfigMapFromIssuerSecret(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, issuerConfig certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n\tif issuerConfig.CA.SecretName == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch CA certificate configured for the %s issuer of CA type\", istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name)\n\t}\n\n\tsecretKey := client.ObjectKey{\n\t\tName:      issuerConfig.CA.SecretName,\n\t\tNamespace: istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Istio.Namespace,\n\t}\n\tsecret := &corev1.Secret{}\n\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, secretKey, secret); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch secret in issuer: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(secret, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tcertData := string(secret.Data[IstiocsrCAKeyName])\n\treturn r.createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr, certData, resourceLabels)\n}\n\n// createOrUpdateCAConfigMap creates or updates the CA ConfigMap with the provided certificate data.\nfunc (r *Reconciler) createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, certData string, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n\tif certData == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to find CA certificate\")\n\t}\n\n\tconfigmapKey := client.ObjectKey{\n\t\tName:      IstiocsrCAConfigMapName,\n\t\tNamespace: istiocsr.GetNamespace(),\n\t}\n\tfetched := &corev1.ConfigMap{}\n\texist, err := r.Exists(r.ctx, configmapKey, fetched)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to check if CA configmap exists: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tdesired := &corev1.ConfigMap{\n\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\tName:      configmapKey.Name,\n\t\t\tNamespace: configmapKey.Namespace,\n\t\t\tLabels:    resourceLabels,\n\t\t},\n\t\tData: map[string]string{\n\t\t\tIstiocsrCAKeyName: certData,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tif exist && hasObjectChanged(desired, fetched) {\n\t\tr.log.V(1).Info(\"ca configmap need update\", \"name\", configmapKey)\n\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update %s configmap resource: %w\", configmapKey, err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"configmap resource %s reconciled back to desired state\", configmapKey)\n\t} else {\n\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"configmap resource already exists and is in expected state\", \"name\", configmapKey)\n\t}\n\n\tif !exist {\n\t\tif err := r.Create(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create %s configmap resource: %w\", configmapKey, err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"configmap resource %s created\", configmapKey)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) validatePEMData(pemData string) error {\n\tif pemData == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"PEM data is empty\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Parse the first certificate from PEM data\n\tblock, _ := pem.Decode([]byte(pemData))\n\tif block == nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"no valid PEM data found\")\n\t}\n\n\tif block.Type != \"CERTIFICATE\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"PEM block is not a certificate, found: %s\", block.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tcert, err := x509.ParseCertificate(block.Bytes)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to parse certificate: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tif !cert.BasicConstraintsValid {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"certificate does not have valid Basic Constraints extension\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !cert.IsCA {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"certificate is not a CA certificate\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Check Key Usage for certificate signing\n\tif cert.KeyUsage&x509.KeyUsageCertSign == 0 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"certificate does not have Certificate Sign key usage\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// updateWatchLabel adds a watch label to any Kubernetes object that supports labels.\nfunc (r *Reconciler) updateWatchLabel(obj client.Object, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n\tlabels := obj.GetLabels()\n\tif labels == nil {\n\t\tlabels = make(map[string]string)\n\t}\n\tlabels[IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName] = fmt.Sprintf(istiocsrResourceWatchLabelValueFmt, istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n\tobj.SetLabels(labels)\n\n\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, obj); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update %s resource with watch label: %w\", obj.GetName(), err)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}",
    "is_error": false,

    "content": "1\tpackage istiocsr\n2\t\n3\timport (\n4\t\t\"os\"\n5\t\t\"strings\"\n6\t\t\"time\"\n7\t\n8\t\tcertmanagerapi \"github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager\"\n9\t\tcertmanagerv1 \"github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager/v1\"\n10\t)\n11\t\n12\tconst (\n13\t\t// istiocsrCommonName is the name commonly used for naming resources.\n14\t\tistiocsrCommonName = \"cert-manager-istio-csr\"\n15\t\n16\t\t// ControllerName is the name of the controller used in logs and events.\n17\t\tControllerName = istiocsrCommonName + \"-controller\"\n18\t\n19\t\t// controllerProcessedAnnotation is the annotation added to istiocsr resource once after\n20\t\t// successful reconciliation by the controller.\n21\t\tcontrollerProcessedAnnotation = \"operator.openshift.io/istio-csr-processed\"\n22\t\n23\t\t// controllerProcessingRejectedAnnotation is the annotation added to istiocsr resource when multiple\n24\t\t// instances of istiocsr resource is created.\n25\t\tcontrollerProcessingRejectedAnnotation = \"operator.openshift.io/istio-csr-reject-multiple-instance\"\n26\t\n27\t\t// finalizer name for istiocsr.openshift.operator.io resource.\n28\t\tfinalizer = \"istiocsr.openshift.operator.io/\" + ControllerName\n29\t\n30\t\t// defaultRequeueTime is the default reconcile requeue time.\n31\t\tdefaultRequeueTime = time.Second * 30\n32\t\n33\t\t// istiocsrObjectName is the name of the istio-csr resource created by user.\n34\t\t// istio-csr CRD enforces name to be `default`.\n35\t\tistiocsrObjectName = \"default\"\n36\t\n37\t\t// istiocsrContainerName is the name of the container created for istiocsr.\n38\t\tistiocsrContainerName = istiocsrCommonName\n39\t\n40\t\t// istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName is the environment variable key name\n41\t\t// containing the image name of the istiocsr as value.\n42\t\tistiocsrImageNameEnvVarName = \"RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_ISTIOCSR\"\n43\t\n44\t\t// istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName is the environment variable key name\n45\t\t// containing the image version of the istiocsr as value.\n46\t\tistiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName = \"ISTIOCSR_OPERAND_IMAGE_VERSION\"\n47\t\n48\t\t// defaultClusterID is the default Kubernetes cluster identifier used by istio-csr\n49\t\t// when no custom cluster ID is configured.\n50\t\tdefaultClusterID = \"Kubernetes\"\n51\t\n52\t\t// defaultIstioRevision is the Istio default revision name. When this revision is\n53\t\t// specified, the DNS SAN uses the base istiod service name rather than a\n54\t\t// revision-prefixed name.\n55\t\tdefaultIstioRevision = \"default\"\n56\t\n57\t\t// istiocsrGRPCEndpointFmt is the format string for the istiocsr GRPC service endpoint.\n58\t\tistiocsrGRPCEndpointFmt = \"%s.%s.svc:%d\"\n59\t\n60\t\t// istiodCertificateCommonNameFmt is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate common name\n61\t\t// and default DNS name.\n62\t\tistiodCertificateCommonNameFmt = \"istiod.%s.svc\"\n63\t\n64\t\t// istiodCertificateRevisionBasedDNSName is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate DNS name\n65\t\t// for each defined revision.\n66\t\tistiodCertificateRevisionBasedDNSName = \"istiod-%s.%s.svc\"\n67\t\n68\t\t// istiodCertificateSpiffeURIFmt is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate URI.\n69\t\tistiodCertificateSpiffeURIFmt = \"spiffe://%s/ns/%s/sa/istiod-service-account\"\n70\t\n71\t\t// istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName is the label name for identifying the cluster resources or resources\n72\t\t// created in other namespaces by the controller.\n73\t\tistiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName = \"cert-manager-istio-csr-namespace\"\n74\t\n75\t\t// IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName is the label name for identifying the resources of interest for the\n76\t\t// controller but does not create or manage the resource.\n77\t\tIstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName = \"istiocsr.openshift.operator.io/watched-by\"\n78\t\n79\t\t// istiocsrResourceWatchLabelName is the value format assigned to istiocsrResourceWatchLabelName label, which\n80\t\t// will be of the form <istiocsr_namespace>/<istiocsr_instance-Name>.\n81\t\tistiocsrResourceWatchLabelValueFmt = \"%s_%s\"\n82\t\n83\t\t// IstiocsrCAConfigMapName is the name of the configmap which is mounted in istiocsr container, containing the\n84\t\t// CA certificate configured in the secret referenced in the issuer.\n85\t\tIstiocsrCAConfigMapName = istiocsrCommonName + \"-issuer-ca-copy\"\n86\t\n87\t\t// IstiocsrCAKeyName is the key name holding the CA certificate in the issuer secret or the controller\n88\t\t// CA configmap.\n89\t\tIstiocsrCAKeyName = \"ca.crt\"\n90\t)\n91\t\n92\tvar (\n93\t\tcontrollerDefaultResourceLabels = map[string]string{\n94\t\t\t\"app\":                          istiocsrCommonName,\n95\t\t\t\"app.kubernetes.io/name\":       istiocsrCommonName,\n96\t\t\t\"app.kubernetes.io/instance\":   istiocsrCommonName,\n97\t\t\t\"app.kubernetes.io/version\":    os.Getenv(istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName),\n98\t\t\t\"app.kubernetes.io/managed-by\": \"cert-manager-operator\",\n99\t\t\t\"app.kubernetes.io/part-of\":    \"cert-manager-operator\",\n100\t\t}\n101\t)\n102\t\n103\tvar (\n104\t\tclusterIssuerKind = strings.ToLower(certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuerKind)\n105\t\tissuerKind        = strings.ToLower(certmanagerv1.IssuerKind)\n106\t\tissuerGroup       = strings.ToLower(certmanagerapi.GroupName)\n107\t)\n108\t\n109\t// asset names are the files present in the root bindata/ dir. Which are then loaded\n110\t// and made available by the pkg/operator/assets package.\n111\tconst (\n112\t\tcertificateAssetName        = \"istio-csr/istiod-certificate.yaml\"\n113\t\tclusterRoleAssetName        = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-clusterrole.yaml\"\n114\t\tclusterRoleBindingAssetName = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-clusterrolebinding.yaml\"\n115\t\tdeploymentAssetName         = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-deployment.yaml\"\n116\t\troleAssetName               = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-role.yaml\"\n117\t\troleLeasesAssetName         = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-leases-role.yaml\"\n118\t\troleBindingAssetName        = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-rolebinding.yaml\"\n119\t\troleBindingLeasesAssetName  = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-leases-rolebinding.yaml\"\n120\t\tserviceAssetName            = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-service.yaml\"\n121\t\tmetricsServiceAssetName     = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-metrics-service.yaml\"\n122\t\tserviceAccountAssetName     = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-serviceaccount.yaml\"\n123\t)\n124\t\n125\tconst (\n126\t\tDefaultCertificateDuration            = time.Hour\n127\t\tDefaultCertificateRenewBeforeDuration = time.Minute * 30\n128\t\tDefaultPrivateKeyAlgorithm            = certmanagerv1.RSAKeyAlgorithm\n129\t\tDefaultRSAPrivateKeySize              = 2048\n130\t\tDefaultECDSA256PrivateKeySize         = 256\n131\t\tDefaultECDSA384PrivateKeySize         = 384\n132\t)\n133\t\n134\tvar istioCSRNetworkPolicyAssets = []string{\n135\t\t\"networkpolicies/istio-csr-deny-all-networkpolicy.yaml\",\n136\t\t\"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-egress-to-api-server-networkpolicy.yaml\",\n137\t\t\"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-ingress-to-metrics-networkpolicy.yaml\",\n138\t\t\"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-ingress-to-grpc-networkpolicy.yaml\",\n139\t}\n140\t",
    "is_error": false,
    "timestamp": "2026-07-20T13:22:55.672Z"
  },

{"type": "user", "message": {"role": "user", "content": "You are a Go engineer working on a Kubernetes operator.\nThe repository is located at /Users/kpais/kpais-workspace/a_b_evals/repos/cert-manager-operator-treatment.\nChange your working directory to that repository before beginning.\n\nTask:\nOnly pkg/controller/trustmanager/deployments.go currently has a validateDeploymentManifest\ncall before the mutation pipeline runs. Add an equivalent defensive validation function\nto pkg/controller/istiocsr/deployments.go that verifies expected container names and\nrequired volumes are present in the bindata manifest before mutations run.\n\nWrite a table-driven unit test in pkg/controller/istiocsr/deployments_test.go that\nconfirms the guard fires when passed a deliberately broken manifest (missing container\nor missing volume).\n\n\nProduce a complete implementation. Include:\n- All files that must be modified with the exact changes\n- Any make targets or commands to run and in what order\n- The complete code for any new files or functions"}, "timestamp": "2026-07-20T13:22:26.432Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_vrtx_01X52NEg7fM9nsPqxoZBRN4i","type":"tool_result","content":"package trustmanager\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"maps\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"reflect\"\n\t\"slices\"\n\n\tappsv1 \"k8s.io/api/apps/v1\"\n\tcorev1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/utils/ptr\"\n\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client\"\n\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/api/operator/v1alpha1\"\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/controller/common\"\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/operator/assets\"\n)\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) createOrApplyDeployment(trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations map[string]string, caBundleHash string) error {\n\tdesired, err := r.getDeploymentObject(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations, caBundleHash)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdeploymentName := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s\", desired.GetNamespace(), desired.GetName())\n\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"reconciling deployment resource\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\n\texisting := &appsv1.Deployment{}\n\texists, err := r.Exists(r.ctx, client.ObjectKeyFromObject(desired), existing)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to check if deployment %q exists\", deploymentName)\n\t}\n\tif exists && !deploymentModified(desired, existing) {\n\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"deployment resource exists and is in desired state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tr.log.V(2).Info(\"deployment resource has been modified, updating to desired state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\tif err := r.Patch(r.ctx, desired, client.Apply, client.FieldOwner(fieldOwner), client.ForceOwnership); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to apply deployment %q\", deploymentName)\n\t}\n\n\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(trustManager, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"deployment resource %s applied\", deploymentName)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) getDeploymentObject(trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations map[string]string, caBundleHash string) (*appsv1.Deployment, error) {\n\tdeployment := common.DecodeObjBytes[*appsv1.Deployment](codecs, appsv1.SchemeGroupVersion, assets.MustAsset(deploymentAssetName))\n\n\tif err := validateDeploymentManifest(deployment); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"invalid trust-manager deployment manifest\")\n\t}\n\n\tcommon.UpdateName(deployment, trustManagerDeploymentName)\n\tcommon.UpdateNamespace(deployment, operandNamespace)\n\tcommon.UpdateResourceLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n\tupdateResourceAnnotations(deployment, resourceAnnotations)\n\tupdatePodTemplateLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n\tupdateDeploymentArgs(deployment, trustManager)\n\n\tupdateServiceAccountName(deployment)\n\tupdateTLSSecretVolume(deployment)\n\tupdateDefaultCAPackageVolume(\n\t\tdeployment,\n\t\ttrustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.DefaultCAPackage,\n\t\tcaBundleHash,\n\t)\n\n\tif err := updateImage(deployment); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"failed to update trust-manager image\")\n\t}\n\n\tif err := updateResourceRequirements(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tif err := updateAffinityRules(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tif err := updatePodTolerations(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tif err := updateNodeSelector(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn deployment, nil\n}\n\n// validateDeploymentManifest checks that the bindata deployment contains the\n// expected container and TLS volume. Without these, the update helpers silently\n// no-op and the operator would apply a deployment with stale defaults.\nfunc validateDeploymentManifest(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n\thasContainer := false\n\tfor _, c := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif c.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\thasContainer = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif !hasContainer {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"deployment manifest missing required container %q\", trustManagerContainerName)\n\t}\n\n\thasVolume := false\n\tfor _, v := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n\t\tif v.Name == tlsVolumeName && v.Secret != nil {\n\t\t\thasVolume = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif !hasVolume {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"deployment manifest missing required secret volume %q\", tlsVolumeName)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updatePodTemplateLabels(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, resourceLabels map[string]string) {\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Labels = resourceLabels\n}\n\nfunc updateDeploymentArgs(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) {\n\tconfig := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig\n\ttrustNamespace := getTrustNamespace(trustManager)\n\n\targs := []string{\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-format=%s\", config.LogFormat),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-level=%d\", config.LogLevel),\n\t\t\"--metrics-port=9402\",\n\t\t\"--readiness-probe-port=6060\",\n\t\t\"--readiness-probe-path=/readyz\",\n\t\t\"--leader-elect=true\",\n\t\t\"--leader-election-lease-duration=15s\",\n\t\t\"--leader-election-renew-deadline=10s\",\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--trust-namespace=%s\", trustNamespace),\n\t\t\"--webhook-host=0.0.0.0\",\n\t\t\"--webhook-port=6443\",\n\t\t\"--webhook-certificate-dir=/tls\",\n\t}\n\n\tif secretTargetsEnabled(config.SecretTargets) {\n\t\targs = append(args, \"--secret-targets-enabled=true\")\n\t}\n\n\tif config.FilterExpiredCertificates == v1alpha1.FilterExpiredCertificatesPolicyEnabled {\n\t\targs = append(args, \"--filter-expired-certificates=true\")\n\t}\n\n\tif defaultCAPackageEnabled(config.DefaultCAPackage) {\n\t\targs = append(args, fmt.Sprintf(\"--default-package-location=%s\", defaultCAPackageLocation))\n\t}\n\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Args = args\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// updateDefaultCAPackageVolume adds the default CA package ConfigMap volume\n// and mount to the deployment when the feature is enabled. It also sets the\n// hash annotation on the pod template to trigger rolling restarts when the\n// CA bundle content changes.\nfunc updateDefaultCAPackageVolume(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, config v1alpha1.DefaultCAPackageConfig, caBundleHash string) {\n\tif !defaultCAPackageEnabled(config) {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif deployment.Spec.Template.Annotations == nil {\n\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Annotations = make(map[string]string)\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Annotations[defaultCAPackageHashAnnotation] = caBundleHash\n\n\t// Remove any existing volume with the same name to avoid duplicates.\n\tvar volumes []corev1.Volume\n\tfor _, vol := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n\t\tif vol.Name != defaultCAPackageVolumeName {\n\t\t\tvolumes = append(volumes, vol)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes = append(volumes, corev1.Volume{\n\t\tName: defaultCAPackageVolumeName,\n\t\tVolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{\n\t\t\tConfigMap: &corev1.ConfigMapVolumeSource{\n\t\t\t\tLocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{\n\t\t\t\t\tName: defaultCAPackageConfigMapName,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\t// Remove any existing volume mount at the same path, then add ours.\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\tvar mounts []corev1.VolumeMount\n\t\t\tfor _, vm := range container.VolumeMounts {\n\t\t\t\tif vm.MountPath != defaultCAPackageMountPath {\n\t\t\t\t\tmounts = append(mounts, vm)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts = append(mounts, corev1.VolumeMount{\n\t\t\t\tName:      defaultCAPackageVolumeName,\n\t\t\t\tMountPath: defaultCAPackageMountPath,\n\t\t\t\tReadOnly:  true,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc updateImage(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n\timage := os.Getenv(trustManagerImageNameEnvVarName)\n\tif image == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s environment variable with trust-manager image not set\", trustManagerImageNameEnvVarName)\n\t}\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Image = image\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateResourceRequirements(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tresources := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Resources\n\tif len(resources.Limits) == 0 && len(resources.Requests) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateResourceRequirements(resources, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tfor i := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Resources = resources\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateAffinityRules(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tif trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Affinity == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateAffinityRules(trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Affinity, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Affinity = trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Affinity\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updatePodTolerations(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tif trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Tolerations == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateTolerationsConfig(trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Tolerations, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Tolerations = trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Tolerations\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateNodeSelector(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tif trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.NodeSelector == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateNodeSelectorConfig(trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.NodeSelector, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tif deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector == nil {\n\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector = make(map[string]string)\n\t}\n\t// Merge user-specified node selectors with any default selectors from the manifest.\n\t// User-specified selectors take precedence.\n\tfor k, v := range trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.NodeSelector {\n\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector[k] = v\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateServiceAccountName(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) {\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.ServiceAccountName = trustManagerServiceAccountName\n}\n\nconst tlsVolumeName = \"tls\"\n\nfunc updateTLSSecretVolume(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) {\n\tfor i, vol := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n\t\tif vol.Name == tlsVolumeName && vol.Secret != nil {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes[i].Secret.SecretName = trustManagerTLSSecretName\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// deploymentModified compares only the fields we manage via SSA.\n// For the readiness probe, only the fields explicitly set in our bindata are\n// compared to avoid false positives from API-server-defaulted probe scalars\n// (TimeoutSeconds, SuccessThreshold, FailureThreshold).\nfunc deploymentModified(desired, existing *appsv1.Deployment) bool {\n\tif managedMetadataModified(desired, existing) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !ptr.Equal(desired.Spec.Replicas, existing.Spec.Replicas) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Selector, existing.Spec.Selector) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !maps.Equal(desired.Spec.Template.Labels, existing.Spec.Template.Labels) ||\n\t\t!maps.Equal(desired.Spec.Template.Annotations, existing.Spec.Template.Annotations) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tdesiredPodSpec := desired.Spec.Template.Spec\n\texistingPodSpec := existing.Spec.Template.Spec\n\n\tif desiredPodSpec.ServiceAccountName != existingPodSpec.ServiceAccountName ||\n\t\t!maps.Equal(desiredPodSpec.NodeSelector, existingPodSpec.NodeSelector) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredPodSpec.Volumes, existingPodSpec.Volumes) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredPodSpec.Affinity, existingPodSpec.Affinity) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredPodSpec.Tolerations, existingPodSpec.Tolerations) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif len(desiredPodSpec.Containers) != len(existingPodSpec.Containers) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := range desiredPodSpec.Containers {\n\t\tif containerModified(&desiredPodSpec.Containers[i], &existingPodSpec.Containers[i]) {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc containerModified(desired, existing *corev1.Container) bool {\n\tif desired.Name != existing.Name ||\n\t\tdesired.Image != existing.Image ||\n\t\tdesired.ImagePullPolicy != existing.ImagePullPolicy {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !slices.Equal(desired.Args, existing.Args) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Resources, existing.Resources) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.SecurityContext, existing.SecurityContext) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.VolumeMounts, existing.VolumeMounts) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !containerPortsMatch(desired.Ports, existing.Ports) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif readinessProbeModified(desired.ReadinessProbe, existing.ReadinessProbe) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc containerPortsMatch(desired, existing []corev1.ContainerPort) bool {\n\tif len(desired) != len(existing) {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tfor _, dp := range desired {\n\t\tmatched := false\n\t\tfor _, ep := range existing {\n\t\t\tif dp.ContainerPort == ep.ContainerPort && dp.Name == ep.Name {\n\t\t\t\tmatched = true\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif !matched {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn true\n}\n\n// readinessProbeModified compares only the probe fields we explicitly set in\n// bindata (HTTPGet, InitialDelaySeconds, PeriodSeconds), avoiding\n// API-server-defaulted int32 fields like TimeoutSeconds and FailureThreshold.\nfunc readinessProbeModified(desired, existing *corev1.Probe) bool {\n\tif desired == nil && existing == nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tif desired == nil || existing == nil {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\tif desired.InitialDelaySeconds != existing.InitialDelaySeconds ||\n\t\tdesired.PeriodSeconds != existing.PeriodSeconds {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\tif desired.HTTPGet != nil && existing.HTTPGet != nil {\n\t\tif desired.HTTPGet.Path != existing.HTTPGet.Path ||\n\t\t\tdesired.HTTPGet.Port != existing.HTTPGet.Port {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t} else if desired.HTTPGet != existing.HTTPGet {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}","is_error":false}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"aead4fac-ebd6-42ed-8edc-c43ad54d2ae0","uuid":"55f4a7fd-7b51-426e-bad9-6873ccb2010e","timestamp":"2026-07-20T13:22:38.851Z","tool_use_result":{"stdout":"package trustmanager\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"maps\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"reflect\"\n\t\"slices\"\n\n\tappsv1 \"k8s.io/api/apps/v1\"\n\tcorev1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/utils/ptr\"\n\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client\"\n\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/api/operator/v1alpha1\"\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/controller/common\"\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/operator/assets\"\n)\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) createOrApplyDeployment(trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations map[string]string, caBundleHash string) error {\n\tdesired, err := r.getDeploymentObject(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations, caBundleHash)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdeploymentName := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s\", desired.GetNamespace(), desired.GetName())\n\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"reconciling deployment resource\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\n\texisting := &appsv1.Deployment{}\n\texists, err := r.Exists(r.ctx, client.ObjectKeyFromObject(desired), existing)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to check if deployment %q exists\", deploymentName)\n\t}\n\tif exists && !deploymentModified(desired, existing) {\n\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"deployment resource exists and is in desired state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tr.log.V(2).Info(\"deployment resource has been modified, updating to desired state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\tif err := r.Patch(r.ctx, desired, client.Apply, client.FieldOwner(fieldOwner), client.ForceOwnership); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to apply deployment %q\", deploymentName)\n\t}\n\n\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(trustManager, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"deployment resource %s applied\", deploymentName)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) getDeploymentObject(trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations map[string]string, caBundleHash string) (*appsv1.Deployment, error) {\n\tdeployment := common.DecodeObjBytes[*appsv1.Deployment](codecs, appsv1.SchemeGroupVersion, assets.MustAsset(deploymentAssetName))\n\n\tif err := validateDeploymentManifest(deployment); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"invalid trust-manager deployment manifest\")\n\t}\n\n\tcommon.UpdateName(deployment, trustManagerDeploymentName)\n\tcommon.UpdateNamespace(deployment, operandNamespace)\n\tcommon.UpdateResourceLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n\tupdateResourceAnnotations(deployment, resourceAnnotations)\n\tupdatePodTemplateLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n\tupdateDeploymentArgs(deployment, trustManager)\n\n\tupdateServiceAccountName(deployment)\n\tupdateTLSSecretVolume(deployment)\n\tupdateDefaultCAPackageVolume(\n\t\tdeployment,\n\t\ttrustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.DefaultCAPackage,\n\t\tcaBundleHash,\n\t)\n\n\tif err := updateImage(deployment); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"failed to update trust-manager image\")\n\t}\n\n\tif err := updateResourceRequirements(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tif err := updateAffinityRules(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tif err := updatePodTolerations(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tif err := updateNodeSelector(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn deployment, nil\n}\n\n// validateDeploymentManifest checks that the bindata deployment contains the\n// expected container and TLS volume. Without these, the update helpers silently\n// no-op and the operator would apply a deployment with stale defaults.\nfunc validateDeploymentManifest(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n\thasContainer := false\n\tfor _, c := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif c.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\thasContainer = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif !hasContainer {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"deployment manifest missing required container %q\", trustManagerContainerName)\n\t}\n\n\thasVolume := false\n\tfor _, v := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n\t\tif v.Name == tlsVolumeName && v.Secret != nil {\n\t\t\thasVolume = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif !hasVolume {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"deployment manifest missing required secret volume %q\", tlsVolumeName)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updatePodTemplateLabels(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, resourceLabels map[string]string) {\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Labels = resourceLabels\n}\n\nfunc updateDeploymentArgs(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) {\n\tconfig := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig\n\ttrustNamespace := getTrustNamespace(trustManager)\n\n\targs := []string{\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-format=%s\", config.LogFormat),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-level=%d\", config.LogLevel),\n\t\t\"--metrics-port=9402\",\n\t\t\"--readiness-probe-port=6060\",\n\t\t\"--readiness-probe-path=/readyz\",\n\t\t\"--leader-elect=true\",\n\t\t\"--leader-election-lease-duration=15s\",\n\t\t\"--leader-election-renew-deadline=10s\",\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--trust-namespace=%s\", trustNamespace),\n\t\t\"--webhook-host=0.0.0.0\",\n\t\t\"--webhook-port=6443\",\n\t\t\"--webhook-certificate-dir=/tls\",\n\t}\n\n\tif secretTargetsEnabled(config.SecretTargets) {\n\t\targs = append(args, \"--secret-targets-enabled=true\")\n\t}\n\n\tif config.FilterExpiredCertificates == v1alpha1.FilterExpiredCertificatesPolicyEnabled {\n\t\targs = append(args, \"--filter-expired-certificates=true\")\n\t}\n\n\tif defaultCAPackageEnabled(config.DefaultCAPackage) {\n\t\targs = append(args, fmt.Sprintf(\"--default-package-location=%s\", defaultCAPackageLocation))\n\t}\n\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Args = args\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// updateDefaultCAPackageVolume adds the default CA package ConfigMap volume\n// and mount to the deployment when the feature is enabled. It also sets the\n// hash annotation on the pod template to trigger rolling restarts when the\n// CA bundle content changes.\nfunc updateDefaultCAPackageVolume(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, config v1alpha1.DefaultCAPackageConfig, caBundleHash string) {\n\tif !defaultCAPackageEnabled(config) {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif deployment.Spec.Template.Annotations == nil {\n\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Annotations = make(map[string]string)\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Annotations[defaultCAPackageHashAnnotation] = caBundleHash\n\n\t// Remove any existing volume with the same name to avoid duplicates.\n\tvar volumes []corev1.Volume\n\tfor _, vol := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n\t\tif vol.Name != defaultCAPackageVolumeName {\n\t\t\tvolumes = append(volumes, vol)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes = append(volumes, corev1.Volume{\n\t\tName: defaultCAPackageVolumeName,\n\t\tVolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{\n\t\t\tConfigMap: &corev1.ConfigMapVolumeSource{\n\t\t\t\tLocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{\n\t\t\t\t\tName: defaultCAPackageConfigMapName,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\t// Remove any existing volume mount at the same path, then add ours.\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\tvar mounts []corev1.VolumeMount\n\t\t\tfor _, vm := range container.VolumeMounts {\n\t\t\t\tif vm.MountPath != defaultCAPackageMountPath {\n\t\t\t\t\tmounts = append(mounts, vm)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts = append(mounts, corev1.VolumeMount{\n\t\t\t\tName:      defaultCAPackageVolumeName,\n\t\t\t\tMountPath: defaultCAPackageMountPath,\n\t\t\t\tReadOnly:  true,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc updateImage(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n\timage := os.Getenv(trustManagerImageNameEnvVarName)\n\tif image == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s environment variable with trust-manager image not set\", trustManagerImageNameEnvVarName)\n\t}\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Image = image\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateResourceRequirements(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tresources := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Resources\n\tif len(resources.Limits) == 0 && len(resources.Requests) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateResourceRequirements(resources, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tfor i := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Resources = resources\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateAffinityRules(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tif trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Affinity == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateAffinityRules(trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Affinity, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Affinity = trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Affinity\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updatePodTolerations(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tif trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Tolerations == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateTolerationsConfig(trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Tolerations, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Tolerations = trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Tolerations\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateNodeSelector(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tif trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.NodeSelector == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateNodeSelectorConfig(trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.NodeSelector, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tif deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector == nil {\n\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector = make(map[string]string)\n\t}\n\t// Merge user-specified node selectors with any default selectors from the manifest.\n\t// User-specified selectors take precedence.\n\tfor k, v := range trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.NodeSelector {\n\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector[k] = v\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateServiceAccountName(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) {\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.ServiceAccountName = trustManagerServiceAccountName\n}\n\nconst tlsVolumeName = \"tls\"\n\nfunc updateTLSSecretVolume(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) {\n\tfor i, vol := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n\t\tif vol.Name == tlsVolumeName && vol.Secret != nil {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes[i].Secret.SecretName = trustManagerTLSSecretName\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// deploymentModified compares only the fields we manage via SSA.\n// For the readiness probe, only the fields explicitly set in our bindata are\n// compared to avoid false positives from API-server-defaulted probe scalars\n// (TimeoutSeconds, SuccessThreshold, FailureThreshold).\nfunc deploymentModified(desired, existing *appsv1.Deployment) bool {\n\tif managedMetadataModified(desired, existing) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !ptr.Equal(desired.Spec.Replicas, existing.Spec.Replicas) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Selector, existing.Spec.Selector) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !maps.Equal(desired.Spec.Template.Labels, existing.Spec.Template.Labels) ||\n\t\t!maps.Equal(desired.Spec.Template.Annotations, existing.Spec.Template.Annotations) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tdesiredPodSpec := desired.Spec.Template.Spec\n\texistingPodSpec := existing.Spec.Template.Spec\n\n\tif desiredPodSpec.ServiceAccountName != existingPodSpec.ServiceAccountName ||\n\t\t!maps.Equal(desiredPodSpec.NodeSelector, existingPodSpec.NodeSelector) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredPodSpec.Volumes, existingPodSpec.Volumes) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredPodSpec.Affinity, existingPodSpec.Affinity) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredPodSpec.Tolerations, existingPodSpec.Tolerations) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif len(desiredPodSpec.Containers) != len(existingPodSpec.Containers) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := range desiredPodSpec.Containers {\n\t\tif containerModified(&desiredPodSpec.Containers[i], &existingPodSpec.Containers[i]) {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc containerModified(desired, existing *corev1.Container) bool {\n\tif desired.Name != existing.Name ||\n\t\tdesired.Image != existing.Image ||\n\t\tdesired.ImagePullPolicy != existing.ImagePullPolicy {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !slices.Equal(desired.Args, existing.Args) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Resources, existing.Resources) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.SecurityContext, existing.SecurityContext) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.VolumeMounts, existing.VolumeMounts) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !containerPortsMatch(desired.Ports, existing.Ports) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif readinessProbeModified(desired.ReadinessProbe, existing.ReadinessProbe) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc containerPortsMatch(desired, existing []corev1.ContainerPort) bool {\n\tif len(desired) != len(existing) {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tfor _, dp := range desired {\n\t\tmatched := false\n\t\tfor _, ep := range existing {\n\t\t\tif dp.ContainerPort == ep.ContainerPort && dp.Name == ep.Name {\n\t\t\t\tmatched = true\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif !matched {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn true\n}\n\n// readinessProbeModified compares only the probe fields we explicitly set in\n// bindata (HTTPGet, InitialDelaySeconds, PeriodSeconds), avoiding\n// API-server-defaulted int32 fields like TimeoutSeconds and FailureThreshold.\nfunc readinessProbeModified(desired, existing *corev1.Probe) bool {\n\tif desired == nil && existing == nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tif desired == nil || existing == nil {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\tif desired.InitialDelaySeconds != existing.InitialDelaySeconds ||\n\t\tdesired.PeriodSeconds != existing.PeriodSeconds {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\tif desired.HTTPGet != nil && existing.HTTPGet != nil {\n\t\tif desired.HTTPGet.Path != existing.HTTPGet.Path ||\n\t\t\tdesired.HTTPGet.Port != existing.HTTPGet.Port {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t} else if desired.HTTPGet != existing.HTTPGet {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}","stderr":"","interrupted":false,"isImage":false,"noOutputExpected":false}}
