\"k8s.io/api/apps/v1\"\n12\t\tcorev1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n13\t\tmetav1 \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n14\t\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types\"\n15\t\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/validation/field\"\n16\t\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client\"\n17\t\n18\t\tcertmanagerv1 \"github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager/v1\"\n19\t\n20\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/api/operator/v1alpha1\"\n21\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/controller/common\"\n22\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/operator/assets\"\n23\t)\n24\t\n25\tconst (\n26\t\tcaVolumeMountPath = \"/var/run/configmaps/istio-csr\"\n27\t)\n28\t\n29\tvar errInvalidIssuerRefConfig = fmt.Errorf(\"invalid issuerRef config\")\n30\t\n31\tfunc (r *Reconciler) createOrApplyDeployments(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string, istioCSRCreateRecon bool) error {\n32\t\tdesired, err := r.getDeploymentObject(istiocsr, resourceLabels)\n33\t\tif err != nil {\n34\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to generate deployment resource for creation in %s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), err)\n35\t\t}\n36\t\n37\t\tdeploymentName := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s\", desired.GetNamespace(), desired.GetName())\n38\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"reconciling deployment resource\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n39\t\tfetched := &appsv1.Deployment{}\n40\t\texist, err := r.Exists(r.ctx, client.ObjectKeyFromObject(desired), fetched)\n41\t\tif err != nil {\n42\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to check %s deployment resource already exists\", deploymentName)\n43\t\t}\n44\t\n45\t\tif exist {\n46\t\t\tif istioCSRCreateRecon {\n47\t\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeWarning, \"ResourceAlreadyExists\", \"%s deployment resource already exists, maybe from previous installation\", deploymentName)\n48\t\t\t}\n49\t\t\tif hasObjectChanged(desired, fetched) {\n50\t\t\t\tr.log.V(1).Info(\"deployment has been modified, updating to desired state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n51\t\t\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n52\t\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update %s deployment resource\", deploymentName)\n53\t\t\t\t}\n54\t\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"deployment resource %s reconciled back to desired state\", deploymentName)\n55\t\t\t} else {\n56\t\t\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"deployment resource already exists and is in expected state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n57\t\t\t}\n58\t\t}\n59\t\n60\t\tif !exist {\n61\t\t\tif err := r.Create(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n62\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create %s deployment resource\", deploymentName)\n63\t\t\t}\n64\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"deployment resource %s created\", deploymentName)\n65\t\t}\n66\t\n67\t\tif err := r.updateImageInStatus(istiocsr, desired); err != nil {\n68\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update %s/%s istiocsr status with image info\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n69\t\t}\n70\t\treturn nil\n71\t}\n72\t\n73\tfunc (r *Reconciler) getDeploymentObject(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) (*appsv1.Deployment, error) {\n74\t\tif err := r.assertIssuerRefExists(istiocsr); err != nil {\n75\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to verify issuer in %s/%s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n76\t\t}\n77\t\n78\t\tdeployment := decodeDeploymentObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(deploymentAssetName))\n79\t\n80\t\tcommon.UpdateNamespace(deployment, istiocsr.GetNamespace())\n81\t\tcommon.UpdateResourceLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n82\t\tupdatePodTemplateLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n83\t\n84\t\tupdateArgList(deployment, istiocsr)\n85\t\n86\t\tif err := updateResourceRequirement(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n87\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update resource requirements: %w\", err)\n88\t\t}\n89\t\tif err := updateAffinityRules(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n90\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update affinity rules: %w\", err)\n91\t\t}\n92\t\tif err := updatePodTolerations(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n93\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update pod tolerations: %w\", err)\n94\t\t}\n95\t\tif err := updateNodeSelector(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n96\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update node selector: %w\", err)\n97\t\t}\n98\t\tif err := r.updateImage(deployment); err != nil {\n99\t\t\treturn nil, common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"failed to update image %s/%s\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n100\t\t}\n101\t\tif err := r.updateVolumes(deployment, istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n102\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update volume %s/%s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n103\t\t}\n104\t\n105\t\treturn deployment, nil\n106\t}\n107\t\n108\tfunc (r *Reconciler) updateImage(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n109\t\timage := os.Getenv(istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName)\n110\t\tif image == \"\" {\n111\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s environment variable with istiocsr image not set\", istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName)\n112\t\t}\n113\t\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n114\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n115\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Image = image\n116\t\t\t}\n117\t\t}\n118\t\treturn nil\n119\t}\n120\t\n121\tfunc (r *Reconciler) updateImageInStatus(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n122\t\tfor _, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n123\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n124\t\t\t\tif istiocsr.Status.IstioCSRImage == container.Image {\n125\t\t\t\t\treturn nil\n126\t\t\t\t}\n127\t\t\t\tistiocsr.Status.IstioCSRImage = container.Image\n128\t\t\t}\n129\t\t}\n130\t\treturn r.updateStatus(r.ctx, istiocsr)\n131\t}\n132\t\n133\tfunc updatePodTemplateLabels(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, resourceLabels map[string]string) {\n134\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Labels = resourceLabels\n135\t}\n136\t\n137\tfunc updateArgList(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n138\t\tistiocsrConfigs := istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig\n139\t\t// Default clusterID to \"Kubernetes\" if not provided.\n140\t\tclusterID := defaultClusterID\n141\t\tif istiocsrConfigs.Server != nil && istiocsrConfigs.Server.ClusterID != \"\" {\n142\t\t\tclusterID = istiocsrConfigs.Server.ClusterID\n143\t\t}\n144\t\targs := []string{\n145\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-level=%d\", istiocsrConfigs.LogLevel),\n146\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-format=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.LogFormat),\n147\t\t\t\"--metrics-port=9402\", \"--readiness-probe-port=6060\", \"--readiness-probe-path=/readyz\",\n148\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--certificate-namespace=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Namespace),\n149\t\t\t\"--issuer-enabled=true\", \"--preserve-certificate-requests=false\",\n150\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--issuer-name=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name),\n151\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--issuer-kind=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind),\n152\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--issuer-group=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.CertManager.IssuerRef.Group),\n153\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--root-ca-file=%s/%s\", caVolumeMountPath, IstiocsrCAKeyName),\n154\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-certificate-dns-names=cert-manager-istio-csr.%s.svc\", istiocsr.GetNamespace()),\n155\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-certificate-duration=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateDuration.Minutes()),\n156\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--trust-domain=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.TrustDomain),\n157\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--cluster-id=%s\", clusterID),\n158\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--max-client-certificate-duration=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.MaxCertificateDuration.Minutes()),\n159\t\t\t\"--serving-address=0.0.0.0:6443\",\n160\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-certificate-key-size=%d\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeySize),\n161\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-signature-algorithm=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeyAlgorithm),\n162\t\t\t\"--enable-client-cert-authenticator=false\",\n163\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--leader-election-namespace=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Namespace),\n164\t\t\t\"--disable-kubernetes-client-rate-limiter=false\", \"--istiod-cert-enabled=false\",\n165\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-namespace=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Namespace),\n166\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-duration=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateDuration.Minutes()),\n167\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-renew-before=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateRenewBefore.Minutes()),\n168\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-key-algorithm=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeyAlgorithm),\n169\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-key-size=%d\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeySize),\n170\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-additional-dns-names=%s\", strings.Join(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateDNSNames, \",\")),\n171\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-istio-revisions=%s\", strings.Join(istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Revisions, \",\")),\n172\t\t}\n173\t\n174\t\t// Add configmap-namespace-selector argument if configured\n175\t\tif istiocsrConfigs.IstioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector != \"\" {\n176\t\t\targs = append(args, fmt.Sprintf(\"--configmap-namespace-selector=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector))\n177\t\t}\n178\t\n179\t\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n180\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n181\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Args = args\n182\t\t\t}\n183\t\t}\n184\t}\n185\t\n186\tfunc updateResourceRequirement(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n187\t\tif reflect.ValueOf(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Resources).IsZero() {\n188\t\t\treturn nil\n189\t\t}\n190\t\tif err := common.ValidateResourceRequirements(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Resources,\n191\t\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n192\t\t\treturn err\n193\t\t}\n194\t\tfor i := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n195\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Resources = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Resources\n196\t\t}\n197\t\treturn nil\n198\t}\n199\t\n200\tfunc updateAffinityRules(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n201\t\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Affinity == nil {\n202\t\t\treturn nil\n203\t\t}\n204\t\tif err := common.ValidateAffinityRules(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Affinity,\n205\t\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n206\t\t\treturn err\n207\t\t}\n208\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Affinity = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Affinity\n209\t\treturn nil\n210\t}\n211\t\n212\tfunc updatePodTolerations(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n213\t\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Tolerations == nil {\n214\t\t\treturn nil\n215\t\t}\n216\t\tif err := common.ValidateTolerationsConfig(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Tolerations,\n217\t\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n218\t\t\treturn err\n219\t\t}\n220\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Tolerations = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Tolerations\n221\t\treturn nil\n222\t}\n223\t\n224\tfunc updateNodeSelector(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n225\t\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.NodeSelector == nil {\n226\t\t\treturn nil\n227\t\t}\n228\t\tif err := common.ValidateNodeSelectorConfig(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.NodeSelector,\n229\t\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n230\t\t\treturn err\n231\t\t}\n232\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.NodeSelector\n233\t\treturn nil\n234\t}\n235\t\n236\tfunc (r *Reconciler) assertIssuerRefExists(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n237\t\tissuerRefKind := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind)\n238\t\tif issuerRefKind != clusterIssuerKind && issuerRefKind != issuerKind {\n239\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager.issuerRef.kind can be any of `%s` or `%s`, configured: %s\", clusterIssuerKind, issuerKind, issuerRefKind)\n240\t\t}\n241\t\n242\t\tissuerRefGroup := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Group)\n243\t\tif issuerRefGroup != issuerGroup {\n244\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager.issuerRef.group can be only `%s`, configured: %s\", issuerGroup, issuerRefGroup)\n245\t\t}\n246\t\n247\t\tobj, err := r.getIssuer(istiocsr)\n248\t\tif err != nil {\n249\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n250\t\t}\n251\t\n252\t\tvar issuerConfig certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig\n253\t\tswitch issuerRefKind {\n254\t\tcase clusterIssuerKind:\n255\t\t\tclusterIssuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer)\n256\t\t\tif !ok {\n257\t\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"failed to convert to ClusterIssuer\")\n258\t\t\t}\n259\t\t\tissuerConfig = clusterIssuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n260\t\tcase issuerKind:\n261\t\t\tissuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.Issuer)\n262\t\t\tif !ok {\n263\t\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"failed to convert to Issuer\")\n264\t\t\t}\n265\t\t\tissuerConfig = issuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n266\t\t}\n267\t\tif issuerConfig.ACME != nil {\n268\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager.issuerRef uses unsupported ACME issuer\")\n269\t\t}\n270\t\n271\t\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(obj, istiocsr); err != nil {\n272\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update watch label on cert-manager issuer %s\", istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name)\n273\t\t}\n274\t\n275\t\treturn nil\n276\t}\n277\t\n278\tfunc (r *Reconciler) updateVolumes(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n279\t\t// Use user-configured CA certificate if provided\n280\t\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate != nil {\n281\t\t\tif err := r.handleUserProvidedCA(deployment, istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n282\t\t\t\treturn common.FromError(err, \"failed to validate and mount CA certificate ConfigMap\")\n283\t\t\t}\n284\t\t\treturn nil\n285\t\t}\n286\t\n287\t\t// Fall back to issuer-based CA certificate if CA certificate is not configured\n288\t\t// Handle issuer-based CA configuration\n289\t\tif err := r.handleIssuerBasedCA(deployment, istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n290\t\t\treturn err\n291\t\t}\n292\t\n293\t\treturn nil\n294\t}\n295\t\n296\t// handleUserProvidedCA processes user-provided CA certificate configuration.\n297\t//\n298\t// It performs the following operations:\n299\t//  1. Validates that the source ConfigMap exists\n300\t//  2. Adds a watch label to the source ConfigMap for change tracking\n301\t//  3. Validates that the ConfigMap contains the specified key and is a valid CA certificate\n302\t//  4. Creates or updates a copy of the ConfigMap in the IstioCSR namespace\n303\t//  5. Configures the deployment to mount the CA certificate volume\n304\t//\n305\t// The caller must ensure that `istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate`\n306\t// is not nil before calling this function to avoid a panic.\n307\t//\n308\t// Returns an error if any validation fails or if ConfigMap operations fail.\n309\tfunc (r *Reconciler) handleUserProvidedCA(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n310\t\tcaCertConfig := istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate\n311\t\n312\t\t// Determine the namespace - use specified namespace or default to IstioCSR namespace\n313\t\tnamespace := caCertConfig.Namespace\n314\t\tif namespace == \"\" {\n315\t\t\tnamespace = istiocsr.GetNamespace()\n316\t\t}\n317\t\n318\t\t// Validate that the source ConfigMap exists\n319\t\tsourceConfigMapKey := types.NamespacedName{\n320\t\t\tName:      caCertConfig.Name,\n321\t\t\tNamespace: namespace,\n322\t\t}\n323\t\n324\t\tsourceConfigMap := &corev1.ConfigMap{}\n325\t\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, sourceConfigMapKey, sourceConfigMap); err != nil {\n326\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"failed to fetch CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name)\n327\t\t}\n328\t\n329\t\t// Add watch label to the source ConfigMap to trigger reconciliation on changes.\n330\t\t// This is done before validation so that if validation fails now, fixing the ConfigMap\n331\t\t// will trigger reconciliation.\n332\t\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(sourceConfigMap, istiocsr); err != nil {\n333\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update watch label on CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name)\n334\t\t}\n335\t\n336\t\t// Validate that the specified key exists in the ConfigMap\n337\t\tif _, exists := sourceConfigMap.Data[caCertConfig.Key]; !exists {\n338\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(fmt.Errorf(\"key %q not found in ConfigMap %s/%s\", caCertConfig.Key, sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name), \"invalid CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name)\n339\t\t}\n340\t\n341\t\t// Validate that the key contains PEM-formatted content\n342\t\tpemData := sourceConfigMap.Data[caCertConfig.Key]\n343\t\tif err := r.validatePEMData(pemData); err != nil {\n344\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"invalid PEM data in CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s key %q\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name, caCertConfig.Key)\n345\t\t}\n346\t\n347\t\t// Create a managed copy of the ConfigMap in the IstioCSR namespace.\n348\t\t// The operator does not directly mount the user-provided ConfigMap but creates a managed copy\n349\t\t// (cert-manager-istio-csr-issuer-ca-copy) in the IstioCSR namespace. This approach enables the\n350\t\t// operator to validate any changes to the source ConfigMap before propagating them to the istio-csr\n351\t\t// agent, as ConfigMap changes automatically propagate to mounted pods. The watch label on the source\n352\t\t// ConfigMap triggers reconciliation when modified, allowing the operator to re-validate and update\n353\t\t// its managed copy. Additionally, if a user directly modifies the operator-managed copy, it will be\n354\t\t// reconciled back to the desired state derived from the validated source ConfigMap.\n355\t\tif err := r.createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr, pemData, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n356\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create CA certificate ConfigMap copy\")\n357\t\t}\n358\t\n359\t\t// Mount the copied CA certificate ConfigMap (always uses the standard name)\n360\t\tupdateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment)\n361\t\n362\t\treturn nil\n363\t}\n364\t\n365\t// handleIssuerBasedCA handles the creation of CA ConfigMap from issuer secret and volume mounting.\n366\tfunc (r *Reconciler) handleIssuerBasedCA(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n367\t\tvar (\n368\t\t\tissuerConfig certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig\n369\t\t)\n370\t\n371\t\tobj, err := r.getIssuer(istiocsr)\n372\t\tif err != nil {\n373\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n374\t\t}\n375\t\n376\t\tissuerRefKind := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind)\n377\t\tswitch issuerRefKind {\n378\t\tcase clusterIssuerKind:\n379\t\t\tclusterIssuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer)\n380\t\t\tif !ok {\n381\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(fmt.Errorf(\"failed to convert to ClusterIssuer\"), \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n382\t\t\t}\n383\t\t\tissuerConfig = clusterIssuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n384\t\tcase issuerKind:\n385\t\t\tissuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.Issuer)\n386\t\t\tif !ok {\n387\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(fmt.Errorf(\"failed to convert to Issuer\"), \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n388\t\t\t}\n389\t\t\tissuerConfig = issuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n390\t\t}\n391\t\n392\t\tshouldUpdateVolume := false\n393\t\n394\t\tif issuerConfig.CA != nil && issuerConfig.CA.SecretName != \"\" {\n395\t\t\tif err := r.createCAConfigMapFromIssuerSecret(istiocsr, issuerConfig, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n396\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create CA ConfigMap\")\n397\t\t\t}\n398\t\t\tshouldUpdateVolume = true\n399\t\t}\n400\t\n401\t\tif issuerConfig.CA == nil {\n402\t\t\tif err := r.createCAConfigMapFromIstiodCertificate(istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n403\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create CA ConfigMap\")\n404\t\t\t}\n405\t\t\tshouldUpdateVolume = true\n406\t\t}\n407\t\n408\t\tif shouldUpdateVolume {\n409\t\t\tupdateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment)\n410\t\t}\n411\t\n412\t\treturn nil\n413\t}\n414\t\n415\tfunc updateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) {\n416\t\tconst (\n417\t\t\tcaVolumeName = \"root-ca\"\n418\t\t)\n419\t\tvar (\n420\t\t\tdefaultMode = int32(420)\n421\t\t)\n422\t\n423\t\tdesiredVolumeMount := corev1.VolumeMount{\n424\t\t\tName:      caVolumeName,\n425\t\t\tMountPath: caVolumeMountPath,\n426\t\t\tReadOnly:  true,\n427\t\t}\n428\t\n429\t\tdesiredVolume := corev1.Volume{\n430\t\t\tName: caVolumeName,\n431\t\t\tVolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{\n432\t\t\t\tConfigMap: &corev1.ConfigMapVolumeSource{\n433\t\t\t\t\tLocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{\n434\t\t\t\t\t\tName: IstiocsrCAConfigMapName,\n435\t\t\t\t\t},\n436\t\t\t\t\tItems: []corev1.KeyToPath{\n437\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n438\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:  IstiocsrCAKeyName,\n439\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPath: IstiocsrCAKeyName,\n440\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: &defaultMode,\n441\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n442\t\t\t\t\t},\n443\t\t\t\t\tDefaultMode: &defaultMode,\n444\t\t\t\t},\n445\t\t\t},\n446\t\t}\n447\t\n448\t\t// Update or append volume mount in the istio-csr container\n449\t\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n450\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n451\t\t\t\tvolumeMountExists := false\n452\t\t\t\tfor j, vm := range container.VolumeMounts {\n453\t\t\t\t\tif vm.Name == caVolumeName {\n454\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts[j] = desiredVolumeMount\n455\t\t\t\t\t\tvolumeMountExists = true\n456\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n457\t\t\t\t\t}\n458\t\t\t\t}\n459\t\t\t\tif !volumeMountExists {\n460\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts = append(\n461\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts,\n462\t\t\t\t\t\tdesiredVolumeMount,\n463\t\t\t\t\t)\n464\t\t\t\t}\n465\t\t\t\tbreak\n466\t\t\t}\n467\t\t}\n468\t\n469\t\t// Update or append volume in the deployment\n470\t\tvolumeExists := false\n471\t\tfor i, vol := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n472\t\t\tif vol.Name == caVolumeName {\n473\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes[i] = desiredVolume\n474\t\t\t\tvolumeExists = true\n475\t\t\t\tbreak\n476\t\t\t}\n477\t\t}\n478\t\tif !volumeExists {\n479\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes = append(\n480\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes,\n481\t\t\t\tdesiredVolume,\n482\t\t\t)\n483\t\t}\n484\t}\n485\t\n486\tfunc (r *Reconciler) getIssuer(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) (client.Object, error) {\n487\t\tissuerRefKind := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind)\n488\t\tkey := client.ObjectKey{\n489\t\t\tName:      istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name,\n490\t\t\tNamespace: istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Istio.Namespace,\n491\t\t}\n492\t\n493\t\tvar object client.Object\n494\t\tswitch issuerRefKind {\n495\t\tcase clusterIssuerKind:\n496\t\t\tobject = &certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer{}\n497\t\tcase issuerKind:\n498\t\t\tobject = &certmanagerv1.Issuer{}\n499\t\t}\n500\t\n501\t\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, key, object); err != nil {\n502\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch %q issuer: %w\", key, err)\n503\t\t}\n504\t\treturn object, nil\n505\t}\n506\t\n507\tfunc (r *Reconciler) createCAConfigMapFromIstiodCertificate(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n508\t\tistiodCertificate, err := r.getCertificateObject(istiocsr, resourceLabels)\n509\t\tif err != nil {\n510\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to fetch istiod certificate\")\n511\t\t}\n512\t\n513\t\tsecretKey := client.ObjectKey{\n514\t\t\tName:      istiodCertificate.Spec.SecretName,\n515\t\t\tNamespace: istiodCertificate.GetNamespace(),\n516\t\t}\n517\t\tsecret := &corev1.Secret{}\n518\t\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, secretKey, secret); err != nil {\n519\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch secret in issuer: %w\", err)\n520\t\t}\n521\t\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(secret, istiocsr); err != nil {\n522\t\t\treturn err\n523\t\t}\n524\t\n525\t\tcertData := string(secret.Data[IstiocsrCAKeyName])\n526\t\treturn r.createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr, certData, resourceLabels)\n527\t}\n528\t\n529\tfunc (r *Reconciler) createCAConfigMapFromIssuerSecret(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, issuerConfig certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n530\t\tif issuerConfig.CA.SecretName == \"\" {\n531\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch CA certificate configured for the %s issuer of CA type\", istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name)\n532\t\t}\n533\t\n534\t\tsecretKey := client.ObjectKey{\n535\t\t\tName:      issuerConfig.CA.SecretName,\n536\t\t\tNamespace: istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Istio.Namespace,\n537\t\t}\n538\t\tsecret := &corev1.Secret{}\n539\t\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, secretKey, secret); err != nil {\n540\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch secret in issuer: %w\", err)\n541\t\t}\n542\t\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(secret, istiocsr); err != nil {\n543\t\t\treturn err\n544\t\t}\n545\t\n546\t\tcertData := string(secret.Data[IstiocsrCAKeyName])\n547\t\treturn r.createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr, certData, resourceLabels)\n548\t}\n549\t\n550\t// createOrUpdateCAConfigMap creates or updates the CA ConfigMap with the provided certificate data.\n551\tfunc (r *Reconciler) createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, certData string, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n552\t\tif certData == \"\" {\n553\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to find CA certificate\")\n554\t\t}\n555\t\n556\t\tconfigmapKey := client.ObjectKey{\n557\t\t\tName:      IstiocsrCAConfigMapName,\n558\t\t\tNamespace: istiocsr.GetNamespace(),\n559\t\t}\n560\t\tfetched := &corev1.ConfigMap{}\n561\t\texist, err := r.Exists(r.ctx, configmapKey, fetched)\n562\t\tif err != nil {\n563\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to check if CA configmap exists: %w\", err)\n564\t\t}\n565\t\n566\t\tdesired := &corev1.ConfigMap{\n567\t\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n568\t\t\t\tName:      configmapKey.Name,\n569\t\t\t\tNamespace: configmapKey.Namespace,\n570\t\t\t\tLabels:    resourceLabels,\n571\t\t\t},\n572\t\t\tData: map[string]string{\n573\t\t\t\tIstiocsrCAKeyName: certData,\n574\t\t\t},\n575\t\t}\n576\t\n577\t\tif exist && hasObjectChanged(desired, fetched) {\n578\t\t\tr.log.V(1).Info(\"ca configmap need update\", \"name\", configmapKey)\n579\t\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n580\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update %s configmap resource: %w\", configmapKey, err)\n581\t\t\t}\n582\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"configmap resource %s reconciled back to desired state\", configmapKey)\n583\t\t} else {\n584\t\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"configmap resource already exists and is in expected state\", \"name\", configmapKey)\n585\t\t}\n586\t\n587\t\tif !exist {\n588\t\t\tif err := r.Create(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n589\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create %s configmap resource: %w\", configmapKey, err)\n590\t\t\t}\n591\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"configmap resource %s created\", configmapKey)\n592\t\t}\n593\t\n594\t\treturn nil\n595\t}\n596\t\n597\tfunc (r *Reconciler) validatePEMData(pemData string) error {\n598\t\tif pemData == \"\" {\n599\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"PEM data is empty\")\n600\t\t}\n601\t\n602\t\t// Parse the first certificate from PEM data\n603\t\tblock, _ := pem.Decode([]byte(pemData))\n604\t\tif block == nil {\n605\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"no valid PEM data found\")\n606\t\t}\n607\t\n608\t\tif block.Type != \"CERTIFICATE\" {\n609\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"PEM block is not a certificate, found: %s\", block.Type)\n610\t\t}\n611\t\n612\t\tcert, err := x509.ParseCertificate(block.Bytes)\n613\t\tif err != nil {\n614\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to parse certificate: %w\", err)\n615\t\t}\n616\t\n617\t\tif !cert.BasicConstraintsValid {\n618\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"certificate does not have valid Basic Constraints extension\")\n619\t\t}\n620\t\n621\t\tif !cert.IsCA {\n622\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"certificate is not a CA certificate\")\n623\t\t}\n624\t\n625\t\t// Check Key Usage for certificate signing\n626\t\tif cert.KeyUsage&x509.KeyUsageCertSign == 0 {\n627\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"certificate does not have Certificate Sign key usage\")\n628\t\t}\n629\t\n630\t\treturn nil\n631\t}\n632\t\n633\t// updateWatchLabel adds a watch label to any Kubernetes object that supports labels.\n634\tfunc (r *Reconciler) updateWatchLabel(obj client.Object, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n635\t\tlabels := obj.GetLabels()\n636\t\tif labels == nil {\n637\t\t\tlabels = make(map[string]string)\n638\t\t}\n639\t\tlabels[IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName] = fmt.Sprintf(istiocsrResourceWatchLabelValueFmt, istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n640\t\tobj.SetLabels(labels)\n641\t\n642\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, obj); err != nil {\n643\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update %s resource with watch label: %w\", obj.GetName(), err)\n644\t\t}\n645\t\treturn nil\n646\t}\n647\t",

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_vrtx_01CdKWbpqt7379ZUt9VDzc9i","type":"tool_result","content":"1\tpackage v1alpha1\n2\t\n3\timport (\n4\t\tcorev1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n5\t\tmetav1 \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n6\t\n7\t\tcertmanagerv1 \"github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n8\t)\n9\t\n10\tfunc init() {\n11\t\tSchemeBuilder.Register(&IstioCSR{}, &IstioCSRList{})\n12\t}\n13\t\n14\t// +k8s:deepcopy-gen:interfaces=k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime.Object\n15\t// +kubebuilder:object:root=true\n16\t\n17\t// IstioCSRList is a list of IstioCSR objects.\n18\ttype IstioCSRList struct {\n19\t\tmetav1.TypeMeta `json:\",inline\"`\n20\t\n21\t\t// metadata is the standard list's metadata.\n22\t\t// More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#metadata\n23\t\tmetav1.ListMeta `json:\"metadata\"`\n24\t\n25\t\tItems []IstioCSR `json:\"items\"`\n26\t}\n27\t\n28\t// +genclient\n29\t// +k8s:deepcopy-gen:interfaces=k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime.Object\n30\t// +kubebuilder:object:root=true\n31\t// +kubebuilder:subresource:status\n32\t// +kubebuilder:resource:path=istiocsrs,scope=Namespaced,categories={cert-manager-operator, istio-csr, istiocsr}\n33\t// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=\"GRPC Endpoint\",type=\"string\",JSONPath=\".status.istioCSRGRPCEndpoint\"\n34\t// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=\"Ready\",type=\"string\",JSONPath=\".status.conditions[?(@.type=='Ready')].status\"\n35\t// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=\"Message\",type=\"string\",JSONPath=\".status.conditions[?(@.type=='Ready')].message\"\n36\t// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=\"AGE\",type=\"date\",JSONPath=\".metadata.creationTimestamp\"\n37\t// +kubebuilder:metadata:labels={\"app.kubernetes.io/name=istiocsr\", \"app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cert-manager-operator\"}\n38\t\n39\t// IstioCSR describes the configuration and information about the managed istio-csr agent.\n40\t// The name must be `default` to make IstioCSR a singleton that is, to allow only one instance of IstioCSR per namespace.\n41\t//\n42\t// When an IstioCSR is created, istio-csr agent is deployed in the IstioCSR-created namespace.\n43\t//\n44\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"self.metadata.name == 'default'\",message=\"istiocsr is a singleton, .metadata.name must be 'default'\"\n45\t// +operator-sdk:csv:customresourcedefinitions:displayName=\"IstioCSR\"\n46\ttype IstioCSR struct {\n47\t\tmetav1.TypeMeta `json:\",inline\"`\n48\t\n49\t\t// metadata is the standard object's metadata.\n50\t\t// More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#metadata\n51\t\tmetav1.ObjectMeta `json:\"metadata,omitempty\"`\n52\t\n53\t\t// spec is the specification of the desired behavior of the IstioCSR.\n54\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n55\t\t// +required\n56\t\tSpec IstioCSRSpec `json:\"spec\"`\n57\t\n58\t\t// status is the most recently observed status of the IstioCSR.\n59\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n60\t\t// +optional\n61\t\tStatus IstioCSRStatus `json:\"status,omitempty\"`\n62\t}\n63\t\n64\t// IstioCSRSpec is the specification of the desired behavior of the IstioCSR.\n65\ttype IstioCSRSpec struct {\n66\t\t// istioCSRConfig configures the istio-csr agent's behavior.\n67\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n68\t\t// +required\n69\t\tIstioCSRConfig IstioCSRConfig `json:\"istioCSRConfig\"`\n70\t\n71\t\t// controllerConfig configures the controller for setting up defaults to enable the istio-csr agent.\n72\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n73\t\t// +optional\n74\t\tControllerConfig *ControllerConfig `json:\"controllerConfig,omitempty\"`\n75\t}\n76\t\n77\t// IstioCSRConfig configures the istio-csr agent's behavior.\n78\ttype IstioCSRConfig struct {\n79\t\t// logLevel supports a value range as per [Kubernetes logging guidelines](https://github.com/kubernetes/community/blob/master/contributors/devel/sig-instrumentation/logging.md#what-method-to-use).\n80\t\t// +kubebuilder:default:=1\n81\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Minimum:=1\n82\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Maximum:=5\n83\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n84\t\t// +optional\n85\t\tLogLevel int32 `json:\"logLevel,omitempty\"`\n86\t\n87\t\t// logFormat specifies the output format for istio-csr agent logging.\n88\t\t// Supported log formats are text and json.\n89\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum:=\"text\";\"json\"\n90\t\t// +kubebuilder:default:=\"text\"\n91\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n92\t\t// +optional\n93\t\tLogFormat string `json:\"logFormat,omitempty\"`\n94\t\n95\t\t// Istio-csr creates a ConfigMap named `istio-ca-root-cert` containing the root CA certificate, which the Istio data plane uses to verify server certificates. Its default behavior is to create and monitor ConfigMaps in all namespaces.\n96\t\t// The istioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector restricts the namespaces where the ConfigMap is created by using label selectors, such as maistra.io/member-of=istio-system. This selector is also attached to all desired namespaces that are part of the data plane.\n97\t\t// This field can have a maximum of 4096 characters.\n98\t\t// +kubebuilder:example:=\"maistra.io/member-of=istio-system\"\n99\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=0\n100\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=4096\n101\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n102\t\t// +optional\n103\t\tIstioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector string `json:\"istioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector,omitempty\"`\n104\t\n105\t\t// certManager is for configuring cert-manager specifics.\n106\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n107\t\t// +required\n108\t\tCertManager CertManagerConfig `json:\"certManager\"`\n109\t\n110\t\t// istiodTLSConfig is for configuring istiod certificate specifics.\n111\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n112\t\t// +required\n113\t\tIstiodTLSConfig IstiodTLSConfig `json:\"istiodTLSConfig\"`\n114\t\n115\t\t// server is for configuring the server endpoint used by istio for obtaining the certificates.\n116\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n117\t\t// +optional\n118\t\tServer *ServerConfig `json:\"server,omitempty\"`\n119\t\n120\t\t// istio is for configuring the istio specifics.\n121\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n122\t\t// +required\n123\t\tIstio IstioConfig `json:\"istio\"`\n124\t\n125\t\t// resources is for defining the resource requirements.\n126\t\t// Cannot be updated.\n127\t\t// ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/\n128\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n129\t\t// +optional\n130\t\tResources corev1.ResourceRequirements `json:\"resources,omitempty\"`\n131\t\n132\t\t// affinity is for setting scheduling affinity rules.\n133\t\t// ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/assign-pod-node/\n134\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n135\t\t// +optional\n136\t\tAffinity *corev1.Affinity `json:\"affinity,omitempty\"`\n137\t\n138\t\t// tolerations is for setting the pod tolerations.\n139\t\t// This field can have a maximum of 50 entries.\n140\t\t// ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/taint-and-toleration/\n141\t\t// +listType=atomic\n142\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinItems:=0\n143\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxItems:=50\n144\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n145\t\t// +optional\n146\t\tTolerations []corev1.Toleration `json:\"tolerations,omitempty\"`\n147\t\n148\t\t// nodeSelector is for defining the scheduling criteria using node labels.\n149\t\t// This field can have a maximum of 50 entries.\n150\t\t// ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/assign-pod-node/\n151\t\t// +mapType=atomic\n152\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinProperties:=0\n153\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxProperties:=50\n154\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n155\t\t// +optional\n156\t\tNodeSelector map[string]string `json:\"nodeSelector,omitempty\"`\n157\t}\n158\t\n159\t// CertManagerConfig is for configuring cert-manager specifics.\n160\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"!has(oldSelf.issuerRef) && !has(self.issuerRef) || has(oldSelf.issuerRef) && has(self.issuerRef)\",message=\"issuerRef may only be configured during creation\"\n161\ttype CertManagerConfig struct {\n162\t\t// issuerRef contains details of the referenced object used for obtaining certificates.\n163\t\t// When `issuerRef.Kind` is `Issuer`, it must exist in the `.spec.istioCSRConfig.istio.namespace`.\n164\t\t// This field is immutable once set.\n165\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"self == oldSelf\",message=\"issuerRef is immutable once set\"\n166\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"self.kind.lowerAscii() == 'issuer' || self.kind.lowerAscii() == 'clusterissuer'\",message=\"kind must be either 'Issuer' or 'ClusterIssuer'\"\n167\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"self.group.lowerAscii() == 'cert-manager.io'\",message=\"group must be 'cert-manager.io'\"\n168\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n169\t\t// +required\n170\t\tIssuerRef certmanagerv1.ObjectReference `json:\"issuerRef\"`\n171\t\n172\t\t// istioCACertificate when provided, the operator will use the CA certificate from the specified ConfigMap.\n173\t\t// If empty, the operator will automatically extract the CA certificate from the Secret containing the istiod certificate obtained from cert-manager.\n174\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n175\t\t// +optional\n176\t\tIstioCACertificate *ConfigMapReference `json:\"istioCACertificate,omitempty\"`\n177\t}\n178\t\n179\t// IstiodTLSConfig is for configuring istiod certificate specifics.\n180\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"!has(oldSelf.privateKeyAlgorithm) && !has(self.privateKeyAlgorithm) || has(oldSelf.privateKeyAlgorithm) && has(self.privateKeyAlgorithm)\",message=\"privateKeyAlgorithm may only be configured during creation\"\n181\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"!has(oldSelf.privateKeySize) && !has(self.privateKeySize) || has(oldSelf.privateKeySize) && has(self.privateKeySize)\",message=\"privateKeySize may only be configured during creation\"\n182\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"(!has(self.privateKeyAlgorithm) || self.privateKeyAlgorithm == 'RSA') ? (self.privateKeySize in [2048,4096,8192]) : (self.privateKeySize in [256,384])\",message=\"privateKeySize must match with configured privateKeyAlgorithm\"\n183\ttype IstiodTLSConfig struct {\n184\t\t// commonName is the common name to be set in the cert-manager.io Certificate created for istiod.\n185\t\t// The commonName will be of the form istiod.<istio_namespace>.svc when not set.\n186\t\t// This field can have a maximum of 64 characters.\n187\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=0\n188\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=64\n189\t\t// +kubebuilder:example:=\"istiod.istio-system.svc\"\n190\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n191\t\t// +optional\n192\t\tCommonName string `json:\"commonName,omitempty\"`\n193\t\n194\t\t// trustDomain is the Istio cluster's trust domain, which will also be used for deriving the SPIFFE URI.\n195\t\t// This field can have a maximum of 63 characters.\n196\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=1\n197\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=63\n198\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n199\t\t// +required\n200\t\tTrustDomain string `json:\"trustDomain\"`\n201\t\n202\t\t// certificateDNSNames contains the additional DNS names to be added to the istiod certificate SAN.\n203\t\t// This field can have a maximum of 25 entries.\n204\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinItems:=0\n205\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxItems:=25\n206\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:items:MinLength:=1\n207\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:items:MaxLength:=253\n208\t\t// +listType=set\n209\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n210\t\t// +optional\n211\t\tCertificateDNSNames []string `json:\"certificateDNSNames,omitempty\"`\n212\t\n213\t\t// certificateDuration is the validity period for the istio-csr and istiod certificates.\n214\t\t// +kubebuilder:default:=\"1h\"\n215\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n216\t\t// +optional\n217\t\tCertificateDuration *metav1.Duration `json:\"certificateDuration,omitempty\"`\n218\t\n219\t\t// certificateRenewBefore is the time before expiry to renew the istio-csr and istiod certificates.\n220\t\t// +kubebuilder:default:=\"30m\"\n221\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n222\t\t// +optional\n223\t\tCertificateRenewBefore *metav1.Duration `json:\"certificateRenewBefore,omitempty\"`\n224\t\n225\t\t// privateKeySize is the key size for the istio-csr and istiod certificates. Allowed values when privateKeyAlgorithm is RSA are 2048, 4096, 8192; and for ECDSA, they are 256, 384.\n226\t\t// This field is immutable once set.\n227\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum:=256;384;2048;4096;8192\n228\t\t// +kubebuilder:default:=2048\n229\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"oldSelf == 0 || self == oldSelf\",message=\"privateKeySize is immutable once set\"\n230\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n231\t\t// +optional\n232\t\tPrivateKeySize int32 `json:\"privateKeySize,omitempty\"`\n233\t\n234\t\t// privateKeyAlgorithm is the algorithm to use when generating private keys. Allowed values are RSA, and ECDSA.\n235\t\t// This field is immutable once set.\n236\t\t// +kubebuilder:default:=\"RSA\"\n237\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum:=\"RSA\";\"ECDSA\"\n238\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"oldSelf == '' || self == oldSelf\",message=\"privateKeyAlgorithm is immutable once set\"\n239\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n240\t\t// +optional\n241\t\tPrivateKeyAlgorithm string `json:\"privateKeyAlgorithm,omitempty\"`\n242\t\n243\t\t// MaxCertificateDuration is the maximum validity duration that can be requested for a certificate.\n244\t\t// +kubebuilder:default:=\"1h\"\n245\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n246\t\t// +optional\n247\t\tMaxCertificateDuration *metav1.Duration `json:\"maxCertificateDuration,omitempty\"`\n248\t}\n249\t\n250\t// ServerConfig is for configuring the server endpoint used by istio\n251\t// for obtaining the certificates.\n252\ttype ServerConfig struct {\n253\t\t// clusterID is the Istio cluster ID used to verify incoming CSRs.\n254\t\t// This field can have a maximum of 253 characters.\n255\t\t// +kubebuilder:default:=\"Kubernetes\"\n256\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=0\n257\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=253\n258\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n259\t\t// specifics.\n273\ttype IstioConfig struct {\n274\t\t// revisions are the Istio revisions that are currently installed in the cluster.\n275\t\t// Changing this field will modify the DNS names that will be requested for the istiod certificate.\n276\t\t// This field can have a maximum of 25 entries.\n277\t\t// +listType=set\n278\t\t// +kubebuilder:default:={\"default\"}\n279\t\t// `json:\"namespace\"`\n295\t}\n296\t\n297\t// ControllerConfig configures the controller for setting up defaults to\n298\t// enable the istio-csr agent.\n299\ttype ControllerConfig struct {\n300\t\t// labels to apply to all resources created for the istio-csr agent deployment.\n301\t\t// This field can have a maximum of 20 entries.\n302\t\t// +mapType=granular\n303\t\t// `json:\"labels,omitempty\"`\n308\t}\n309\t\n310\t// IstioCSRStatus is the most recently observed status of the IstioCSR.\n311\ttype IstioCSRStatus struct {\n312\t\t// conditions holds information about the current state of the istio-csr agent deployment.\n313\t\tConditionalStatus `json:\",inline,omitempty\"`\n314\t\n315\t\t// istioCSRImage is the name of the image and the tag used for deploying istio-csr.\n316\t\tIstioCSRImage string `json:\"istioCSRImage,omitempty\"`\n317\t\n318\t\t// istioCSRGRPCEndpoint is the service endpoint of istio-csr, made available for users to configure in the istiod config to enable Istio to use istio-csr for certificate requests.\n319\t\tIstioCSRGRPCEndpoint string `json:\"istioCSRGRPCEndpoint,omitempty\"`\n320\t\n321\t\t// serviceAccount created by the controller for the istio-csr agent.\n322\t\tServiceAccount string `json:\"serviceAccount,omitempty\"`\n323\t\n324\t\t// clusterRole created by the controller for the istio-csr agent.\n325\t\tClusterRole string `json:\"clusterRole,omitempty\"`\n326\t\n327\t\t// clusterRoleBinding created by the controller for the istio-csr agent.\n328\t\tClusterRoleBinding string v1alpha1\n\nimport (\n\tcorev1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\tmetav1 \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n\n\tcertmanagerv1 \"github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n)\n\nfunc init() {\n\tSchemeBuilder.Register(&IstioCSR{}, &IstioCSRList{})\n}\n\n// +k8s:deepcopy-gen:interfaces=k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime.Object\n// +kubebuilder:object:root=true\n\n// IstioCSRList is a list of IstioCSR objects.\ntype IstioCSRList struct {\n\tmetav1.TypeMeta `json:\",inline\"`\n\n\t// metadata is the standard list's metadata.\n\t// More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#metadata\n\tmetav1.ListMeta `json:\"metadata\"`\n\n\tItems []IstioCSR `json:\"items\"`\n}\n\n// +genclient\n// +k8s:deepcopy-gen:interfaces=k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime.Object\n// +kubebuilder:object:root=true\n// +kubebuilder:subresource:status\n// +kubebuilder:resource:path=istiocsrs,scope=Namespaced,categories={cert-manager-operator, istio-csr, istiocsr}\n// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=\"GRPC Endpoint\",type=\"string\",JSONPath=\".status.istioCSRGRPCEndpoint\"\n// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=\"Ready\",type=\"string\",JSONPath=\".status.conditions[?(@.type=='Ready')].status\"\n// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=\"Message\",type=\"string\",JSONPath=\".status.conditions[?(@.type=='Ready')].message\"\n// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=\"AGE\",type=\"date\",JSONPath=\".metadata.creationTimestamp\"\n// +kubebuilder:metadata:labels={\"app.kubernetes.io/name=istiocsr\", \"app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cert-manager-operator\"}\n\n// IstioCSR describes the configuration and information about the managed istio-csr agent.\n// The name must be `default` to make IstioCSR a singleton that is, to allow only one instance of IstioCSR per namespace.\n//\n// When an IstioCSR is created, istio-csr agent is deployed in the IstioCSR-created namespace.\n//\n// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"self.metadata.name == 'default'\",message=\"istiocsr is a singleton, .metadata.name must be 'default'\"\n// +operator-sdk:csv:customresourcedefinitions:displayName=\"IstioCSR\"\ntype IstioCSR struct {\n\tmetav1.TypeMeta `json:\",inline\"`\n\n\t// metadata is the standard object's metadata.\n\t// More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#metadata\n\tmetav1.ObjectMeta `json:\"metadata,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// spec is the specification of the desired behavior of the IstioCSR.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n\t// +required\n\tSpec IstioCSRSpec `json:\"spec\"`\n\n\t// status is the most recently observed status of the IstioCSR.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tStatus IstioCSRStatus `json:\"status,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// IstioCSRSpec is the specification of the desired behavior of the IstioCSR.\ntype IstioCSRSpec struct {\n\t// istioCSRConfig configures the istio-csr agent's behavior.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n\t// +required\n\tIstioCSRConfig IstioCSRConfig `json:\"istioCSRConfig\"`\n\n\t// controllerConfig configures the controller for setting up defaults to enable the istio-csr agent.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tControllerConfig *ControllerConfig `json:\"controllerConfig,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// IstioCSRConfig configures the istio-csr agent's behavior.\ntype IstioCSRConfig struct {\n\t// logLevel supports a value range as per [Kubernetes logging guidelines](https://github.com/kubernetes/community/blob/master/contributors/devel/sig-instrumentation/logging.md#what-method-to-use).\n\t// +kubebuilder:default:=1\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Minimum:=1\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Maximum:=5\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tLogLevel int32 `json:\"logLevel,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// logFormat specifies the output format for istio-csr agent logging.\n\t// Supported log formats are text and json.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum:=\"text\";\"json\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:default:=\"text\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tLogFormat string `json:\"logFormat,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// Istio-csr creates a ConfigMap named `istio-ca-root-cert` containing the root CA certificate, which the Istio data plane uses to verify server certificates. Its default behavior is to create and monitor ConfigMaps in all namespaces.\n\t// The istioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector restricts the namespaces where the ConfigMap is created by using label selectors, such as maistra.io/member-of=istio-system. This selector is also attached to all desired namespaces that are part of the data plane.\n\t// This field can have a maximum of 4096 characters.\n\t// +kubebuilder:example:=\"maistra.io/member-of=istio-system\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=0\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=4096\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tIstioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector string `json:\"istioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// certManager is for configuring cert-manager specifics.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n\t// +required\n\tCertManager CertManagerConfig `json:\"certManager\"`\n\n\t// istiodTLSConfig is for configuring istiod certificate specifics.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n\t// +required\n\tIstiodTLSConfig IstiodTLSConfig `json:\"istiodTLSConfig\"`\n\n\t// server is for configuring the server endpoint used by istio for obtaining the certificates.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tServer *ServerConfig `json:\"server,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// istio is for configuring the istio specifics.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n\t// +required\n\tIstio IstioConfig `json:\"istio\"`\n\n\t// resources is for defining the resource requirements.\n\t// Cannot be updated.\n\t// ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tResources corev1.ResourceRequirements `json:\"resources,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// affinity is for setting scheduling affinity rules.\n\t// ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/assign-pod-node/\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tAffinity *corev1.Affinity `json:\"affinity,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// tolerations is for setting the pod tolerations.\n\t// This field can have a maximum of 50 entries.\n\t// ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/taint-and-toleration/\n\t// +listType=atomic\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinItems:=0\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxItems:=50\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tTolerations []corev1.Toleration `json:\"tolerations,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// nodeSelector is for defining the scheduling criteria using node labels.\n\t// This field can have a maximum of 50 entries.\n\t// ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/assign-pod-node/\n\t// +mapType=atomic\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinProperties:=0\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxProperties:=50\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tNodeSelector map[string]string `json:\"nodeSelector,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// CertManagerConfig is for configuring cert-manager specifics.\n// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"!has(oldSelf.issuerRef) && !has(self.issuerRef) || has(oldSelf.issuerRef) && has(self.issuerRef)\",message=\"issuerRef may only be configured during creation\"\ntype CertManagerConfig struct {\n\t// issuerRef contains details of the referenced object used for obtaining certificates.\n\t// When `issuerRef.Kind` is `Issuer`, it must exist in the `.spec.istioCSRConfig.istio.namespace`.\n\t// This field is immutable once set.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"self == oldSelf\",message=\"issuerRef is immutable once set\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"self.kind.lowerAscii() == 'issuer' || self.kind.lowerAscii() == 'clusterissuer'\",message=\"kind must be either 'Issuer' or 'ClusterIssuer'\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"self.group.lowerAscii() == 'cert-manager.io'\",message=\"group must be 'cert-manager.io'\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n\t// +required\n\tIssuerRef certmanagerv1.ObjectReference `json:\"issuerRef\"`\n\n\t// istioCACertificate when provided, the operator will use the CA certificate from the specified ConfigMap.\n\t// If empty, the operator will automatically extract the CA certificate from the Secret containing the istiod certificate obtained from cert-manager.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tIstioCACertificate *ConfigMapReference `json:\"istioCACertificate,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// IstiodTLSConfig is for configuring istiod certificate specifics.\n// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"!has(oldSelf.privateKeyAlgorithm) && !has(self.privateKeyAlgorithm) || has(oldSelf.privateKeyAlgorithm) && has(self.privateKeyAlgorithm)\",message=\"privateKeyAlgorithm may only be configured during creation\"\n// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"!has(oldSelf.privateKeySize) && !has(self.privateKeySize) || has(oldSelf.privateKeySize) && has(self.privateKeySize)\",message=\"privateKeySize may only be configured during creation\"\n// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"(!has(self.privateKeyAlgorithm) || self.privateKeyAlgorithm == 'RSA') ? (self.privateKeySize in [2048,4096,8192]) : (self.privateKeySize in [256,384])\",message=\"privateKeySize must match with configured privateKeyAlgorithm\"\ntype IstiodTLSConfig struct {\n\t// commonName is the common name to be set in the cert-manager.io Certificate created for istiod.\n\t// The commonName will be of the form istiod.<istio_namespace>.svc when not set.\n\t// This field can have a maximum of 64 characters.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=0\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=64\n\t// +kubebuilder:example:=\"istiod.istio-system.svc\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tCommonName string `json:\"commonName,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// trustDomain is the Istio cluster's trust domain, which will also be used for deriving the SPIFFE URI.\n\t// This field can have a maximum of 63 characters.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=1\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=63\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n\t// +required\n\tTrustDomain string `json:\"trustDomain\"`\n\n\t// certificateDNSNames contains the additional DNS names to be added to the istiod certificate SAN.\n\t// This field can have a maximum of 25 entries.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinItems:=0\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxItems:=25\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:items:MinLength:=1\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:items:MaxLength:=253\n\t// +listType=set\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tCertificateDNSNames []string `json:\"certificateDNSNames,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// certificateDuration is the validity period for the istio-csr and istiod certificates.\n\t// +kubebuilder:default:=\"1h\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tCertificateDuration *metav1.Duration `json:\"certificateDuration,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// certificateRenewBefore is the time before expiry to renew the istio-csr and istiod certificates.\n\t// +kubebuilder:default:=\"30m\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tCertificateRenewBefore *metav1.Duration `json:\"certificateRenewBefore,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// privateKeySize is the key size for the istio-csr and istiod certificates. Allowed values when privateKeyAlgorithm is RSA are 2048, 4096, 8192; and for ECDSA, they are 256, 384.\n\t// This field is immutable once set.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum:=256;384;2048;4096;8192\n\t// +kubebuilder:default:=2048\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"oldSelf == 0 || self == oldSelf\",message=\"privateKeySize is immutable once set\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tPrivateKeySize int32 `json:\"privateKeySize,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// privateKeyAlgorithm is the algorithm to use when generating private keys. Allowed values are RSA, and ECDSA.\n\t// This field is immutable once set.\n\t// +kubebuilder:default:=\"RSA\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum:=\"RSA\";\"ECDSA\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"oldSelf == '' || self == oldSelf\",message=\"privateKeyAlgorithm is immutable once set\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tPrivateKeyAlgorithm string `json:\"privateKeyAlgorithm,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// MaxCertificateDuration is the maximum validity duration that can be requested for a certificate.\n\t// +kubebuilder:default:=\"1h\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tMaxCertificateDuration *metav1.Duration `json:\"maxCertificateDuration,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// ServerConfig is for configuring the server endpoint used by istio\n// for obtaining the certificates.\ntype ServerConfig struct {\n\t// clusterID is the Istio cluster ID used to verify incoming CSRs.\n\t// This field can have a maximum of 253 characters.\n\t// +kubebuilder:default:=\"Kubernetes\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=0\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=253\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tClusterID string `json:\"clusterID,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// port to serve the istio-csr gRPC service.\n\t// +kubebuilder:default:=443\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Minimum:=1\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Maximum:=65535\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"oldSelf == 0 || self == oldSelf\",message=\"port is immutable once set\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tPort int32 `json:\"port,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// IstioConfig is for configuring the istio specifics.\ntype IstioConfig struct {\n\t// revisions are the Istio revisions that are currently installed in the cluster.\n\t// Changing this field will modify the DNS names that will be requested for the istiod certificate.\n\t// This field can have a maximum of 25 entries.\n\t// +listType=set\n\t// +kubebuilder:default:={\"default\"}\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinItems=0\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxItems=25\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:items:MinLength:=1\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:items:MaxLength:=63\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tRevisions []string `json:\"revisions,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// namespace of the Istio control plane.\n\t// This field can have a maximum of 63 characters.\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule=\"self == oldSelf\",message=\"namespace is immutable once set\"\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=1\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=63\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Required\n\t// +required\n\tNamespace string `json:\"namespace\"`\n}\n\n// ControllerConfig configures the controller for setting up defaults to\n// enable the istio-csr agent.\ntype ControllerConfig struct {\n\t// labels to apply to all resources created for the istio-csr agent deployment.\n\t// This field can have a maximum of 20 entries.\n\t// +mapType=granular\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MinProperties:=0\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxProperties:=20\n\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional\n\t// +optional\n\tLabels map[string]string `json:\"labels,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// IstioCSRStatus is the most recently observed status of the IstioCSR.\ntype IstioCSRStatus struct {\n\t// conditions holds information about the current state of the istio-csr agent deployment.\n\tConditionalStatus `json:\",inline,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// istioCSRImage is the name of the image and the tag used for deploying istio-csr.\n\tIstioCSRImage string `json:\"istioCSRImage,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// istioCSRGRPCEndpoint is the service endpoint of istio-csr, made available for users to configure in the istiod config to enable Istio to use istio-csr for certificate requests.\n\tIstioCSRGRPCEndpoint string `json:\"istioCSRGRPCEndpoint,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// serviceAccount created by the controller for the istio-csr agent.\n\tServiceAccount string `json:\"serviceAccount,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// clusterRole created by the controller for the istio-csr agent.\n\tClusterRole string `json:\"clusterRole,omitempty\"`\n\n\t// clusterRoleBinding created by the controller for the istio-csr agent.\n\tClusterRoleBinding string `json:\"clusterRoleBinding,omitempty\"`\n}\n","numLines":330,"startLine":1,"totalLines":330}}}

(\n4\t\t\"crypto/x509\"\n5\t\t\"encoding/pem\"\n6\t\t\"fmt\"\n7\t\t\"os\"\n8\t\t\"reflect\"\n9\t\t\"strings\"\n10\t\n11\t\tappsv1 \"k8s.io/api/apps/v1\"\n12\t\tcorev1
