{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_vrtx_01Y6WA92Whzua6ATdurWWYpg","type":"tool_result","content":"1\tpackage trustmanager\n2\t\n3\timport (\n4\t\t\"fmt\"\n5\t\t\"maps\"\n6\t\t\"os\"\n7\t\t\"reflect\"\n8\t\t\"slices\"\n9\t\n10\t\tappsv1 \"k8s.io/api/apps/v1\"\n11\t\tcorev1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n12\t\t\"k8s.io/utils/ptr\"\n13\t\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client\"\n14\t\n15\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/api/operator/v1alpha1\"\n16\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/controller/common\"\n17\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/operator/assets\"\n18\t)\n19\t\n20\tfunc (r *Reconciler) createOrApplyDeployment(trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations map[string]string, caBundleHash string) error {\n21\t\tdesired, err := r.getDeploymentObject(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations, caBundleHash)\n22\t\tif err != nil {\n23\t\t\treturn err\n24\t\t}\n25\t\n26\t\tdeploymentName := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s\", desired.GetNamespace(), desired.GetName())\n27\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"reconciling deployment resource\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n28\t\n29\t\texisting := &appsv1.Deployment{}\n30\t\texists, err := r.Exists(r.ctx, client.ObjectKeyFromObject(desired), existing)\n31\t\tif err != nil {\n32\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to check if deployment %q exists\", deploymentName)\n33\t\t}\n34\t\tif exists && !deploymentModified(desired, existing) {\n35\t\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"deployment resource exists and is in desired state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n36\t\t\treturn nil\n37\t\t}\n38\t\n39\t\tr.log.V(2).Info(\"deployment resource has been modified, updating to desired state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n40\t\tif err := r.Patch(r.ctx, desired, client.Apply, client.FieldOwner(fieldOwner), client.ForceOwnership); err != nil {\n41\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to apply deployment %q\", deploymentName)\n42\t\t}\n43\t\n44\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(trustManager, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"deployment resource %s applied\", deploymentName)\n45\t\treturn nil\n46\t}\n47\t\n48\tfunc (r *Reconciler) getDeploymentObject(trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations map[string]string, caBundleHash string) (*appsv1.Deployment, error) {\n49\t\tdeployment := common.DecodeObjBytes[*appsv1.Deployment](codecs, appsv1.SchemeGroupVersion, assets.MustAsset(deploymentAssetName))\n50\t\n51\t\tif err := validateDeploymentManifest(deployment); err != nil {\n52\t\t\treturn nil, common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"invalid trust-manager deployment manifest\")\n53\t\t}\n54\t\n55\t\tcommon.UpdateName(deployment, trustManagerDeploymentName)\n56\t\tcommon.UpdateNamespace(deployment, operandNamespace)\n57\t\tcommon.UpdateResourceLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n58\t\tupdateResourceAnnotations(deployment, resourceAnnotations)\n59\t\tupdatePodTemplateLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n60\t\tupdateDeploymentArgs(deployment, trustManager)\n61\t\n62\t\tupdateServiceAccountName(deployment)\n63\t\tupdateTLSSecretVolume(deployment)\n64\t\tupdateDefaultCAPackageVolume(\n65\t\t\tdeployment,\n66\t\t\ttrustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.DefaultCAPackage,\n67\t\t\tcaBundleHash,\n68\t\t)\n69\t\n70\t\tif err := updateImage(deployment); err != nil {\n71\t\t\treturn nil, common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"failed to update trust-manager image\")\n72\t\t}\n73\t\n74\t\tif err := updateResourceRequirements(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n75\t\t\treturn nil, err\n76\t\t}\n77\t\tif err := updateAffinityRules(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n78\t\t\treturn nil, err\n79\t\t}\n80\t\tif err := updatePodTolerations(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n81\t\t\treturn nil, err\n82\t\t}\n83\t\tif err := updateNodeSelector(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n84\t\t\treturn nil, err\n85\t\t}\n86\t\n87\t\treturn deployment, nil\n88\t}\n89\t\n90\t// validateDeploymentManifest checks that the bindata deployment contains the\n91\t// expected container and TLS volume. Without these, the update helpers silently\n92\t// no-op and the operator would apply a deployment with stale defaults.\n93\tfunc validateDeploymentManifest(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n94\t\thasContainer := false\n95\t\tfor _, c := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n96\t\t\tif c.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n97\t\t\t\thasContainer = true\n98\t\t\t\tbreak\n99\t\t\t}\n100\t\t}\n101\t\tif !hasContainer {\n102\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"deployment manifest missing required container %q\", trustManagerContainerName)\n103\t\t}\n104\t\n105\t\thasVolume := false\n106\t\tfor _, v := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n107\t\t\tif v.Name == tlsVolumeName && v.Secret != nil {\n108\t\t\t\thasVolume = true\n109\t\t\t\tbreak\n110\t\t\t}\n111\t\t}\n112\t\tif !hasVolume {\n113\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"deployment manifest missing required secret volume %q\", tlsVolumeName)\n114\t\t}\n115\t\n116\t\treturn nil\n117\t}\n118\t\n119\tfunc updatePodTemplateLabels(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, resourceLabels map[string]string) {\n120\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Labels = resourceLabels\n121\t}\n122\t\n123\tfunc updateDeploymentArgs(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) {\n124\t\tconfig := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig\n125\t\ttrustNamespace := getTrustNamespace(trustManager)\n126\t\n127\t\targs := []string{\n128\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-format=%s\", config.LogFormat),\n129\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-level=%d\", config.LogLevel),\n130\t\t\t\"--metrics-port=9402\",\n131\t\t\t\"--readiness-probe-port=6060\",\n132\t\t\t\"--readiness-probe-path=/readyz\",\n133\t\t\t\"--leader-elect=true\",\n134\t\t\t\"--leader-election-lease-duration=15s\",\n135\t\t\t\"--leader-election-renew-deadline=10s\",\n136\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--trust-namespace=%s\", trustNamespace),\n137\t\t\t\"--webhook-host=0.0.0.0\",\n138\t\t\t\"--webhook-port=6443\",\n139\t\t\t\"--webhook-certificate-dir=/tls\",\n140\t\t}\n141\t\n142\t\tif secretTargetsEnabled(config.SecretTargets) {\n143\t\t\targs = append(args, \"--secret-targets-enabled=true\")\n144\t\t}\n145\t\n146\t\tif config.FilterExpiredCertificates == v1alpha1.FilterExpiredCertificatesPolicyEnabled {\n147\t\t\targs = append(args, \"--filter-expired-certificates=true\")\n148\t\t}\n149\t\n150\t\tif defaultCAPackageEnabled(config.DefaultCAPackage) {\n151\t\t\targs = append(args, fmt.Sprintf(\"--default-package-location=%s\", defaultCAPackageLocation))\n152\t\t}\n153\t\n154\t\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n155\t\t\tif container.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n156\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Args = args\n157\t\t\t}\n158\t\t}\n159\t}\n160\t\n161\t// updateDefaultCAPackageVolume adds the default CA package ConfigMap volume\n162\t// and mount to the deployment when the feature is enabled. It also sets the\n163\t// hash annotation on the pod template to trigger rolling restarts when the\n164\t// CA bundle content changes.\n165\tfunc updateDefaultCAPackageVolume(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, config v1alpha1.DefaultCAPackageConfig, caBundleHash string) {\n166\t\tif !defaultCAPackageEnabled(config) {\n167\t\t\treturn\n168\t\t}\n169\t\n170\t\tif deployment.Spec.Template.Annotations == nil {\n171\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Annotations = make(map[string]string)\n172\t\t}\n173\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Annotations[defaultCAPackageHashAnnotation] = caBundleHash\n174\t\n175\t\t// Remove any existing volume with the same name to avoid duplicates.\n176\t\tvar volumes []corev1.Volume\n177\t\tfor _, vol := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n178\t\t\tif vol.Name != defaultCAPackageVolumeName {\n179\t\t\t\tvolumes = append(volumes, vol)\n180\t\t\t}\n181\t\t}\n182\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes = append(volumes, corev1.Volume{\n183\t\t\tName: defaultCAPackageVolumeName,\n184\t\t\tVolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{\n185\t\t\t\tConfigMap: &corev1.ConfigMapVolumeSource{\n186\t\t\t\t\tLocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{\n187\t\t\t\t\t\tName: defaultCAPackageConfigMapName,\n188\t\t\t\t\t},\n189\t\t\t\t},\n190\t\t\t},\n191\t\t})\n192\t\n193\t\t// Remove any existing volume mount at the same path, then add ours.\n194\t\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n195\t\t\tif container.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n196\t\t\t\tvar mounts []corev1.VolumeMount\n197\t\t\t\tfor _, vm := range container.VolumeMounts {\n198\t\t\t\t\tif vm.MountPath != defaultCAPackageMountPath {\n199\t\t\t\t\t\tmounts = append(mounts, vm)\n200\t\t\t\t\t}\n201\t\t\t\t}\n202\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts = append(mounts, corev1.VolumeMount{\n203\t\t\t\t\tName:      defaultCAPackageVolumeName,\n204\t\t\t\t\tMountPath: defaultCAPackageMountPath,\n205\t\t\t\t\tReadOnly:  true,\n206\t\t\t\t})\n207\t\t\t\tbreak\n208\t\t\t}\n209\t\t}\n210\t}\n211\t\n212\tfunc updateImage(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n213\t\timage := os.Getenv(trustManagerImageNameEnvVarName)\n214\t\tif image == \"\" {\n215\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s environment variable with trust-manager image not set\", trustManagerImageNameEnvVarName)\n216\t\t}\n217\t\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n218\t\t\tif container.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n219\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Image = image\n220\t\t\t}\n221\t\t}\n222\t\treturn nil\n223\t}\n224\t\n225\tfunc updateResourceRequirements(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n226\t\tresources := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Resources\n227\t\tif len(resources.Limits) == 0 && len(resources.Requests) == 0 {\n228\t\t\treturn nil\n229\t\t}\n230\t\tif err := common.ValidateResourceRequirements(resources, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n231\t\t\treturn err\n232\t\t}\n233\t\tfor i := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n234\t\t\tif deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n235\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Resources = resources\n236\t\t\t}\n237\t\t}\n238\t\treturn nil\n239\t}\n240\t\n241\tfunc updateAffinityRules(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n242\t\tif trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Affinity == nil {\n243\t\t\treturn nil\n244\t\t}\n245\t\tif err := common.ValidateAffinityRules(trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Affinity, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n246\t\t\treturn err\n247\t\t}\n248\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Affinity = trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Affinity\n249\t\treturn nil\n250\t}\n251\t\n252\tfunc updatePodTolerations(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n253\t\tif trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Tolerations == nil {\n254\t\t\treturn nil\n255\t\t}\n256\t\tif err := common.ValidateTolerationsConfig(trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Tolerations, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n257\t\t\treturn err\n258\t\t}\n259\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Tolerations = trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Tolerations\n260\t\treturn nil\n261\t}\n262\t\n263\tfunc updateNodeSelector(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n264\t\tif trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.NodeSelector == nil {\n265\t\t\treturn nil\n266\t\t}\n267\t\tif err := common.ValidateNodeSelectorConfig(trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.NodeSelector, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n268\t\t\treturn err\n269\t\t}\n270\t\tif deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector == nil {\n271\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector = make(map[string]string)\n272\t\t}\n273\t\t// Merge user-specified node selectors with any default selectors from the manifest.\n274\t\t// User-specified selectors take precedence.\n275\t\tfor k, v := range trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.NodeSelector {\n276\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector[k] = v\n277\t\t}\n278\t\treturn nil\n279\t}\n280\t\n281\tfunc updateServiceAccountName(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) {\n282\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.ServiceAccountName = trustManagerServiceAccountName\n283\t}\n284\t\n285\tconst tlsVolumeName = \"tls\"\n286\t\n287\tfunc updateTLSSecretVolume(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) {\n288\t\tfor i, vol := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n289\t\t\tif vol.Name == tlsVolumeName && vol.Secret != nil {\n290\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes[i].Secret.SecretName = trustManagerTLSSecretName\n291\t\t\t\treturn\n292\t\t\t}\n293\t\t}\n294\t}\n295\t\n296\t// deploymentModified compares only the fields we manage via SSA.\n297\t// For the readiness probe, only the fields explicitly set in our bindata are\n298\t// compared to avoid false positives from API-server-defaulted probe scalars\n299\t// (TimeoutSeconds, SuccessThreshold, FailureThreshold).\n300\tfunc deploymentModified(desired, existing *appsv1.Deployment) bool {\n301\t\tif managedMetadataModified(desired, existing) {\n302\t\t\treturn true\n303\t\t}\n304\t\n305\t\tif !ptr.Equal(desired.Spec.Replicas, existing.Spec.Replicas) ||\n306\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Selector, existing.Spec.Selector) {\n307\t\t\treturn true\n308\t\t}\n309\t\n310\t\tif !maps.Equal(desired.Spec.Template.Labels, existing.Spec.Template.Labels) ||\n311\t\t\t!maps.Equal(desired.Spec.Template.Annotations, existing.Spec.Template.Annotations) {\n312\t\t\treturn true\n313\t\t}\n314\t\n315\t\tdesiredPodSpec := desired.Spec.Template.Spec\n316\t\texistingPodSpec := existing.Spec.Template.Spec\n317\t\n318\t\tif desiredPodSpec.ServiceAccountName != existingPodSpec.ServiceAccountName ||\n319\t\t\t!maps.Equal(desiredPodSpec.NodeSelector, existingPodSpec.NodeSelector) ||\n320\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredPodSpec.Volumes, existingPodSpec.Volumes) ||\n321\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredPodSpec.Affinity, existingPodSpec.Affinity) ||\n322\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredPodSpec.Tolerations, existingPodSpec.Tolerations) {\n323\t\t\treturn true\n324\t\t}\n325\t\n326\t\tif len(desiredPodSpec.Containers) != len(existingPodSpec.Containers) {\n327\t\t\treturn true\n328\t\t}\n329\t\n330\t\tfor i := range desiredPodSpec.Containers {\n331\t\t\tif containerModified(&desiredPodSpec.Containers[i], &existingPodSpec.Containers[i]) {\n332\t\t\t\treturn true\n333\t\t\t}\n334\t\t}\n335\t\n336\t\treturn false\n337\t}\n338\t\n339\tfunc containerModified(desired, existing *corev1.Container) bool {\n340\t\tif desired.Name != existing.Name ||\n341\t\t\tdesired.Image != existing.Image ||\n342\t\t\tdesired.ImagePullPolicy != existing.ImagePullPolicy {\n343\t\t\treturn true\n344\t\t}\n345\t\n346\t\tif !slices.Equal(desired.Args, existing.Args) ||\n347\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Resources, existing.Resources) ||\n348\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.SecurityContext, existing.SecurityContext) ||\n349\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.VolumeMounts, existing.VolumeMounts) {\n350\t\t\treturn true\n351\t\t}\n352\t\n353\t\tif !containerPortsMatch(desired.Ports, existing.Ports) {\n354\t\t\treturn true\n355\t\t}\n356\t\n357\t\tif readinessProbeModified(desired.ReadinessProbe, existing.ReadinessProbe) {\n358\t\t\treturn true\n359\t\t}\n360\t\n361\t\treturn false\n362\t}\n363\t\n364\tfunc containerPortsMatch(desired, existing []corev1.ContainerPort) bool {\n365\t\tif len(desired) != len(existing) {\n366\t\t\treturn false\n367\t\t}\n368\t\tfor _, dp := range desired {\n369\t\t\tmatched := false\n370\t\t\tfor _, ep := range existing {\n371\t\t\t\tif dp.ContainerPort == ep.ContainerPort && dp.Name == ep.Name {\n372\t\t\t\t\tmatched = true\n373\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n374\t\t\t\t}\n375\t\t\t}\n376\t\t\tif !matched {\n377\t\t\t\treturn false\n378\t\t\t}\n379\t\t}\n380\t\treturn true\n381\t}\n382\t\n383\t// readinessProbeModified compares only the probe fields we explicitly set in\n384\t// bindata (HTTPGet, InitialDelaySeconds, PeriodSeconds), avoiding\n385\t// API-server-defaulted int32 fields like TimeoutSeconds and FailureThreshold.\n386\tfunc readinessProbeModified(desired, existing *corev1.Probe) bool {\n387\t\tif desired == nil && existing == nil {\n388\t\t\treturn false\n389\t\t}\n390\t\tif desired == nil || existing == nil {\n391\t\t\treturn true\n392\t\t}\n393\t\tif desired.InitialDelaySeconds != existing.InitialDelaySeconds ||\n394\t\t\tdesired.PeriodSeconds != existing.PeriodSeconds {\n395\t\t\treturn true\n396\t\t}\n397\t\tif desired.HTTPGet != nil && existing.HTTPGet != nil {\n398\t\t\tif desired.HTTPGet.Path != existing.HTTPGet.Path ||\n399\t\t\t\tdesired.HTTPGet.Port != existing.HTTPGet.Port {\n400\t\t\t\treturn true\n401\t\t\t}\n402\t\t} else if desired.HTTPGet != existing.HTTPGet {\n403\t\t\treturn true\n404\t\t}\n405\t\treturn false\n406\t}\n407\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"40f75bc1-181a-4148-8afe-533f8e2603b5","uuid":"3d1c1edf-85c3-4e6d-816b-6ad0285e6c31","timestamp":"2026-07-20T13:28:38.539Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/kpais/kpais-workspace/a_b_evals/repos/cert-manager-operator-treatment/pkg/controller/trustmanager/deployments.go","content":"package (r *Reconciler) createOrApplyDeployment(trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations map[string]string, caBundleHash string) error {\n\tdesired, err := r.getDeploymentObject(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations, caBundleHash)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdeploymentName := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s\", desired.GetNamespace(), desired.GetName())\n\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"reconciling deployment resource\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\n\texisting := &appsv1.Deployment{}\n\texists, err := r.Exists(r.ctx, client.ObjectKeyFromObject(desired), existing)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to check if deployment %q exists\", deploymentName)\n\t}\n\tif exists && !deploymentModified(desired, existing) {\n\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"deployment resource exists and is in desired state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tr.log.V(2).Info(\"deployment resource has been modified, updating to desired state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\tif err := r.Patch(r.ctx, desired, client.Apply, client.FieldOwner(fieldOwner), client.ForceOwnership); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to apply deployment %q\", deploymentName)\n\t}\n\n\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(trustManager, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"deployment resource %s applied\", deploymentName)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) getDeploymentObject(trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations map[string]string, caBundleHash string) (*appsv1.Deployment, error) {\n\tdeployment := common.DecodeObjBytes[*appsv1.Deployment](codecs, appsv1.SchemeGroupVersion, assets.MustAsset(deploymentAssetName))\n\n\tif err := validateDeploymentManifest(deployment); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"invalid trust-manager deployment manifest\")\n\t}\n\n\tcommon.UpdateName(deployment, trustManagerDeploymentName)\n\tcommon.UpdateNamespace(deployment, operandNamespace)\n\tcommon.UpdateResourceLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n\tupdateResourceAnnotations(deployment, resourceAnnotations)\n\tupdatePodTemplateLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n\tupdateDeploymentArgs(deployment, trustManager)\n\n\tupdateServiceAccountName(deployment)\n\tupdateTLSSecretVolume(deployment)\n\tupdateDefaultCAPackageVolume(\n\t\tdeployment,\n\t\ttrustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.DefaultCAPackage,\n\t\tcaBundleHash,\n\t)\n\n\tif err := updateImage(deployment); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"failed to update trust-manager image\")\n\t}\n\n\tif err := updateResourceRequirements(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tif err := updateAffinityRules(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tif err := updatePodTolerations(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tif err := updateNodeSelector(deployment, trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn deployment, nil\n}\n\n// validateDeploymentManifest checks that the bindata deployment contains the\n// expected container and TLS volume. Without these, the update helpers silently\n// no-op and the operator would apply a deployment with stale defaults.\nfunc validateDeploymentManifest(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n\thasContainer := false\n\tfor _, c := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif c.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\thasContainer = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif !hasContainer {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"deployment manifest missing required container %q\", trustManagerContainerName)\n\t}\n\n\thasVolume := false\n\tfor _, v := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n\t\tif v.Name == tlsVolumeName && v.Secret != nil {\n\t\t\thasVolume = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif !hasVolume {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"deployment manifest missing required secret volume %q\", tlsVolumeName)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updatePodTemplateLabels(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, resourceLabels map[string]string) {\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Labels = resourceLabels\n}\n\nfunc updateDeploymentArgs(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) {\n\tconfig := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig\n\ttrustNamespace := getTrustNamespace(trustManager)\n\n\targs := []string{\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-format=%s\", config.LogFormat),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-level=%d\", config.LogLevel),\n\t\t\"--metrics-port=9402\",\n\t\t\"--readiness-probe-port=6060\",\n\t\t\"--readiness-probe-path=/readyz\",\n\t\t\"--leader-elect=true\",\n\t\t\"--leader-election-lease-duration=15s\",\n\t\t\"--leader-election-renew-deadline=10s\",\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--trust-namespace=%s\", trustNamespace),\n\t\t\"--webhook-host=0.0.0.0\",\n\t\t\"--webhook-port=6443\",\n\t\t\"--webhook-certificate-dir=/tls\",\n\t}\n\n\tif secretTargetsEnabled(config.SecretTargets) {\n\t\targs = append(args, \"--secret-targets-enabled=true\")\n\t}\n\n\tif config.FilterExpiredCertificates == v1alpha1.FilterExpiredCertificatesPolicyEnabled {\n\t\targs = append(args, \"--filter-expired-certificates=true\")\n\t}\n\n\tif defaultCAPackageEnabled(config.DefaultCAPackage) {\n\t\targs = append(args, fmt.Sprintf(\"--default-package-location=%s\", defaultCAPackageLocation))\n\t}\n\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Args = args\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// updateDefaultCAPackageVolume adds the default CA package ConfigMap volume\n// and mount to the deployment when the feature is enabled. It also sets the\n// hash annotation on the pod template to trigger rolling restarts when the\n// CA bundle content changes.\nfunc updateDefaultCAPackageVolume(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, config v1alpha1.DefaultCAPackageConfig, caBundleHash string) {\n\tif !defaultCAPackageEnabled(config) {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif deployment.Spec.Template.Annotations == nil {\n\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Annotations = make(map[string]string)\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Annotations[defaultCAPackageHashAnnotation] = caBundleHash\n\n\t// Remove any existing volume with the same name to avoid duplicates.\n\tvar volumes []corev1.Volume\n\tfor _, vol := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n\t\tif vol.Name != defaultCAPackageVolumeName {\n\t\t\tvolumes = append(volumes, vol)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes = append(volumes, corev1.Volume{\n\t\tName: defaultCAPackageVolumeName,\n\t\tVolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{\n\t\t\tConfigMap: &corev1.ConfigMapVolumeSource{\n\t\t\t\tLocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{\n\t\t\t\t\tName: defaultCAPackageConfigMapName,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\t// Remove any existing volume mount at the same path, then add ours.\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\tvar mounts []corev1.VolumeMount\n\t\t\tfor _, vm := range container.VolumeMounts {\n\t\t\t\tif vm.MountPath != defaultCAPackageMountPath {\n\t\t\t\t\tmounts = append(mounts, vm)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts = append(mounts, corev1.VolumeMount{\n\t\t\t\tName:      defaultCAPackageVolumeName,\n\t\t\t\tMountPath: defaultCAPackageMountPath,\n\t\t\t\tReadOnly:  true,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc updateImage(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n\timage := os.Getenv(trustManagerImageNameEnvVarName)\n\tif image == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s environment variable with trust-manager image not set\", trustManagerImageNameEnvVarName)\n\t}\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Image = image\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateResourceRequirements(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tresources := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Resources\n\tif len(resources.Limits) == 0 && len(resources.Requests) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateResourceRequirements(resources, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tfor i := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Name == trustManagerContainerName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Resources = resources\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateAffinityRules(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tif trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Affinity == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateAffinityRules(trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Affinity, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Affinity = trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Affinity\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updatePodTolerations(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tif trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Tolerations == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateTolerationsConfig(trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Tolerations, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Tolerations = trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.Tolerations\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateNodeSelector(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tif trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.NodeSelector == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateNodeSelectorConfig(trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.NodeSelector, trustManagerConfigFieldPath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tif deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector == nil {\n\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector = make(map[string]string)\n\t}\n\t// Merge user-specified node selectors with any default selectors from the manifest.\n\t// User-specified selectors take precedence.\n\tfor k, v := range trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.NodeSelector {\n\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector[k] = v\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateServiceAccountName(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) {\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.ServiceAccountName = trustManagerServiceAccountName\n}\n\nconst tlsVolumeName = \"tls\"\n\nfunc updateTLSSecretVolume(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) {\n\tfor i, vol := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n\t\tif vol.Name == tlsVolumeName && vol.Secret != nil {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes[i].Secret.SecretName = trustManagerTLSSecretName\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// deploymentModified compares only the fields we manage via SSA.\n// For the readiness probe, only the fields explicitly set in our bindata are\n// compared to avoid false positives from API-server-defaulted probe scalars\n// (TimeoutSeconds, SuccessThreshold, FailureThreshold).\nfunc deploymentModified(desired, existing *appsv1.Deployment) bool {\n\tif managedMetadataModified(desired, existing) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !ptr.Equal(desired.Spec.Replicas, existing.Spec.Replicas) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Selector, existing.Spec.Selector) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !maps.Equal(desired.Spec.Template.Labels, existing.Spec.Template.Labels) ||\n\t\t!maps.Equal(desired.Spec.Template.Annotations, existing.Spec.Template.Annotations) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tdesiredPodSpec := desired.Spec.Template.Spec\n\texistingPodSpec := existing.Spec.Template.Spec\n\n\tif desiredPodSpec.ServiceAccountName != existingPodSpec.ServiceAccountName ||\n\t\t!maps.Equal(desiredPodSpec.NodeSelector, existingPodSpec.NodeSelector) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredPodSpec.Volumes, existingPodSpec.Volumes) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredPodSpec.Affinity, existingPodSpec.Affinity) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredPodSpec.Tolerations, existingPodSpec.Tolerations) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif len(desiredPodSpec.Containers) != len(existingPodSpec.Containers) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := range desiredPodSpec.Containers {\n\t\tif containerModified(&desiredPodSpec.Containers[i], &existingPodSpec.Containers[i]) {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc containerModified(desired, existing *corev1.Container) bool {\n\tif desired.Name != existing.Name ||\n\t\tdesired.Image != existing.Image ||\n\t\tdesired.ImagePullPolicy != existing.ImagePullPolicy {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !slices.Equal(desired.Args, existing.Args) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Resources, existing.Resources) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.SecurityContext, existing.SecurityContext) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.VolumeMounts, existing.VolumeMounts) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !containerPortsMatch(desired.Ports, existing.Ports) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif readinessProbeModified(desired.ReadinessProbe, existing.ReadinessProbe) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc containerPortsMatch(desired, existing []corev1.ContainerPort) bool {\n\tif len(desired) != len(existing) {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tfor _, dp := range desired {\n\t\tmatched := false\n\t\tfor _, ep := range existing {\n\t\t\tif dp.ContainerPort == ep.ContainerPort && dp.Name == ep.Name {\n\t\t\t\tmatched = true\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif !matched {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn true\n}\n\n// readinessProbeModified compares only the probe fields we explicitly set in\n// bindata (HTTPGet, InitialDelaySeconds, PeriodSeconds), avoiding\n// API-server-defaulted int32 fields like TimeoutSeconds and FailureThreshold.\nfunc readinessProbeModified(desired, existing *corev1.Probe) bool {\n\tif desired == nil && existing == nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tif desired == nil || existing == nil {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\tif desired.InitialDelaySeconds != existing.InitialDelaySeconds ||\n\t\tdesired.PeriodSeconds != existing.PeriodSeconds {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\tif desired.HTTPGet != nil && existing.HTTPGet != nil {\n\t\tif desired.HTTPGet.Path != existing.HTTPGet.Path ||\n\t\t\tdesired.HTTPGet.Port != existing.HTTPGet.Port {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t} else if desired.HTTPGet != existing.HTTPGet {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n","numLines":407,"startLine":1,"totalLines":407}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_vrtx_01PJFsT1d9EuEaHmiY9MxdEK","type":"tool_result","content":"1\tpackage istiocsr\n2\t\n3\timport (\n4\t\t\"context\"\n5\t\t\"fmt\"\n6\t\t\"reflect\"\n7\t\t\"strings\"\n8\t\n9\t\tappsv1 \"k8s.io/api/apps/v1\"\n10\t\tcorev1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n11\t\tnetworkingv1 \"k8s.io/api/networking/v1\"\n12\t\trbacv1 \"k8s.io/api/rbac/v1\"\n13\t\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors\"\n14\t\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\"\n15\t\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types\"\n16\t\t\"k8s.io/client-go/tools/record\"\n17\t\n18\t\tctrl \"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime\"\n19\t\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/builder\"\n20\t\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client\"\n21\t\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/handler\"\n22\t\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/predicate\"\n23\t\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/reconcile\"\n24\t\n25\t\t\"github.com/go-logr/logr\"\n26\t\n27\t\tcertmanagerv1 \"github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager/v1\"\n28\t\n29\t\tv1alpha1 \"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/api/operator/v1alpha1\"\n30\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/controller/common\"\n31\t)\n32\t\n33\t// RequestEnqueueLabelValue is the label value used for filtering reconcile\n34\t// events to include only the resources created by the IstioCSR controller.\n35\t// The label key is common.ManagedResourceLabelKey.\n36\tconst RequestEnqueueLabelValue = \"cert-manager-istio-csr\"\n37\t\n38\t// Reconciler reconciles a IstioCSR object.\n39\ttype Reconciler struct {\n40\t\tcommon.CtrlClient\n41\t\n42\t\tctx           context.Context\n43\t\teventRecorder record.EventRecorder\n44\t\tlog           logr.Logger\n45\t\tscheme        *runtime.Scheme\n46\t}\n47\t\n48\t// +kubebuilder:rbac:groups=operator.openshift.io,resources=istiocsrs,verbs=get;list;watch;update;patch\n49\t// +kubebuilder:rbac:groups=operator.openshift.io,resources=istiocsrs/status,verbs=get;update;patch\n50\t// +kubebuilder:rbac:groups=operator.openshift.io,resources=istiocsrs/finalizers,verbs=update\n51\t// +kubebuilder:rbac:groups=networking.k8s.io,resources=networkpolicies,verbs=get;list;watch;create;update;patch;delete\n52\t\n53\t// New returns a new Reconciler instance.\n54\tfunc New(mgr ctrl.Manager) (*Reconciler, error) {\n55\t\tc, err := common.NewClient(mgr)\n56\t\tif err != nil {\n57\t\t\treturn nil, err\n58\t\t}\n59\t\treturn &Reconciler{\n60\t\t\tCtrlClient:    c,\n61\t\t\tctx:           context.Background(),\n62\t\t\teventRecorder: mgr.GetEventRecorderFor(ControllerName),\n63\t\t\tlog:           ctrl.Log.WithName(ControllerName),\n64\t\t\tscheme:        mgr.GetScheme(),\n65\t\t}, nil\n66\t}\n67\t\n68\t// SetupWithManager sets up the controller with the Manager.\n69\tfunc (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr ctrl.Manager) error {\n70\t\tmapFunc := func(ctx context.Context, obj client.Object) []reconcile.Request {\n71\t\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"received reconcile event\", \"object\", fmt.Sprintf(\"%T\", obj), \"name\", obj.GetName(), \"namespace\", obj.GetNamespace())\n72\t\n73\t\t\tobjLabels := obj.GetLabels()\n74\t\t\tif objLabels != nil {\n75\t\t\t\t// will look for custom label set on objects not created in istiocsr namespace, and if it exists,\n76\t\t\t\t// namespace in the reconcile request will be set same, else since label check matches is an object\n77\t\t\t\t// created by controller, and we safely assume, it's in the istiocsr namespace.\n78\t\t\t\tnamespace := objLabels[istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName]\n79\t\t\t\tif namespace == \"\" {\n80\t\t\t\t\tnamespace = obj.GetNamespace()\n81\t\t\t\t}\n82\t\n83\t\t\t\tlabelOk := func() bool {\n84\t\t\t\t\tif objLabels[common.ManagedResourceLabelKey] == RequestEnqueueLabelValue {\n85\t\t\t\t\t\treturn true\n86\t\t\t\t\t}\n87\t\t\t\t\tvalue := objLabels[IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName]\n88\t\t\t\t\tif value == \"\" {\n89\t\t\t\t\t\treturn false\n90\t\t\t\t\t}\n91\t\t\t\t\tkey := strings.Split(value, \"_\")\n92\t\t\t\t\tif len(key) != 2 {\n93\t\t\t\t\t\tr.log.Error(fmt.Errorf(\"invalid label format\"), \"%s label value(%s) not in expected format on %s resource\", IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName, value, obj.GetName())\n94\t\t\t\t\t\treturn false\n95\t\t\t\t\t}\n96\t\t\t\t\tnamespace = key[0]\n97\t\t\t\t\treturn true\n98\t\t\t\t}\n99\t\n100\t\t\t\tif labelOk() && namespace != \"\" {\n101\t\t\t\t\treturn []reconcile.Request{\n102\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n103\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespacedName: types.NamespacedName{\n104\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName:      istiocsrObjectName,\n105\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespace: namespace,\n106\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n107\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n108\t\t\t\t\t}\n109\t\t\t\t}\n110\t\t\t}\n111\t\n112\t\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"object not of interest, ignoring reconcile event\", \"object\", fmt.Sprintf(\"%T\", obj), \"name\", obj.GetName(), \"namespace\", obj.GetNamespace())\n113\t\t\treturn []reconcile.Request{}\n114\t\t}\n115\t\n116\t\t// predicate function to ignore events for objects not managed by controller.\n117\t\tcontrollerManagedResources := predicate.NewPredicateFuncs(func(object client.Object) bool {\n118\t\t\treturn object.GetLabels() != nil && object.GetLabels()[common.ManagedResourceLabelKey] == RequestEnqueueLabelValue\n119\t\t})\n120\t\n121\t\t// predicate function to filter events for objects which controller is interested in, but\n122\t\t// not managed or created by controller.\n123\t\tcontrollerWatchResources := predicate.NewPredicateFuncs(func(object client.Object) bool {\n124\t\t\treturn object.GetLabels() != nil && object.GetLabels()[IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName] != \"\"\n125\t\t})\n126\t\n127\t\tcontrollerConfigMapPredicates := predicate.NewPredicateFuncs(func(object client.Object) bool {\n128\t\t\tif object.GetLabels() == nil {\n129\t\t\t\treturn false\n130\t\t\t}\n131\t\t\t// Accept if it's a managed ConfigMap OR a watched ConfigMap\n132\t\t\treturn object.GetLabels()[common.ManagedResourceLabelKey] == RequestEnqueueLabelValue ||\n133\t\t\t\tobject.GetLabels()[IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName] != \"\"\n134\t\t})\n135\t\n136\t\twithIgnoreStatusUpdatePredicates := builder.WithPredicates(predicate.GenerationChangedPredicate{}, controllerManagedResources)\n137\t\tcontrollerWatchResourcePredicates := builder.WithPredicates(predicate.ResourceVersionChangedPredicate{}, controllerWatchResources)\n138\t\tcontrollerManagedResourcePredicates := builder.WithPredicates(controllerManagedResources)\n139\t\tcontrollerConfigMapWatchPredicates := builder.WithPredicates(predicate.ResourceVersionChangedPredicate{}, controllerConfigMapPredicates)\n140\t\n141\t\treturn ctrl.NewControllerManagedBy(mgr).\n142\t\t\tFor(&v1alpha1.IstioCSR{}, builder.WithPredicates(predicate.GenerationChangedPredicate{})).\n143\t\t\tNamed(ControllerName).\n144\t\t\tWatches(&certmanagerv1.Certificate{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), withIgnoreStatusUpdatePredicates).\n145\t\t\tWatches(&appsv1.Deployment{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), withIgnoreStatusUpdatePredicates).\n146\t\t\tWatches(&rbacv1.ClusterRole{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).\n147\t\t\tWatches(&rbacv1.ClusterRoleBinding{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).\n148\t\t\tWatches(&rbacv1.Role{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).\n149\t\t\tWatches(&rbacv1.RoleBinding{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).\n150\t\t\tWatches(&corev1.Service{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), reconciliation of newly created istiocsr\", \"namespace\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), \"name\", istiocsr.GetName())\n207\t\t\tistioCSRCreateRecon = true\n208\t\t}\n209\t\n210\t\tif err := \"MultiIstioCSRInstance\", \"creation of multiple istiocsr instances is not supported, will not be processed\")\n213\t\t\t\terr = nil\n214\t\t\t}\n215\t\t\treturn ctrl.Result{}, for filtering reconcile\n// events to include only the resources created by the IstioCSR controller.\n// The label key is common.ManagedResourceLabelKey.\nconst RequestEnqueueLabelValue = \"cert-manager-istio-csr\"\n\n// Reconciler reconciles a IstioCSR object.\ntype Reconciler struct {\n\tcommon.CtrlClient\n\n\tctx           context.Context\n\teventRecorder record.EventRecorder\n\tlog           logr.Logger\n\tscheme        *runtime.Scheme\n}\n\n// +kubebuilder:rbac:groups=operator.openshift.io,resources=istiocsrs,verbs=get;list;watch;update;patch\n// +kubebuilder:rbac:groups=networking.k8s.io,resources=networkpolicies,verbs=get;list;watch;create;update;patch;delete\n\n// New returns a new Reconciler instance.\nfunc New(mgr ctrl.Manager) (*Reconciler, error) {\n\tc, err := common.NewClient(mgr)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn &Reconciler{\n\t\tCtrlClient:    c,\n\t\tctx:           context.Background(),\n\t\teventRecorder: mgr.GetEventRecorderFor(ControllerName),\n\t\tlog:           ctrl.Log.WithName(ControllerName),\n\t\tscheme:        mgr.GetScheme(),\n\t}, nil\n}\n\n// SetupWithManager sets up the controller with the Manager.\nfunc (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr ctrl.Manager) error {\n\tmapFunc := func(ctx context.Context, obj client.Object) []reconcile.Request {\n\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"received reconcile event\", \"object\", fmt.Sprintf(\"%T\", obj), \"name\", obj.GetName(), \"namespace\", obj.GetNamespace())\n\n\t\tobjLabels := obj.GetLabels()\n\t\tif objLabels != nil {\n\t\t\t// will look for custom label set on objects not created in istiocsr namespace, and if it exists,\n\t\t\t// namespace in the reconcile request will be set same, else since label check matches is an object\n\t\t\t// created by controller, and we safely assume, it's in the istiocsr namespace.\n\t\t\tnamespace := objLabels[istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName]\n\t\t\tif namespace == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tnamespace = obj.GetNamespace()\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tlabelOk := func() bool {\n\t\t\t\tif objLabels[common.ManagedResourceLabelKey] == RequestEnqueueLabelValue {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tvalue := objLabels[IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName]\n\t\t\t\tif value == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tkey := strings.Split(value, \"_\")\n\t\t\t\tif len(key) != 2 {\n\t\t\t\t\tr.log.Error(fmt.Errorf(\"invalid label format\"), \"%s label value(%s) not in expected format on %s resource\", IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName, value, obj.GetName())\n\t\t\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tnamespace = key[0]\n\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif labelOk() && namespace != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\treturn []reconcile.Request{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespacedName: types.NamespacedName{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName:      istiocsrObjectName,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespace: namespace,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"object not of interest, ignoring reconcile event\", \"object\", fmt.Sprintf(\"%T\", obj), \"name\", obj.GetName(), \"namespace\", obj.GetNamespace())\n\t\treturn []reconcile.Request{}\n\t}\n\n\t// predicate function to ignore events for objects not managed by controller.\n\tcontrollerManagedResources := predicate.NewPredicateFuncs(func(object client.Object) bool {\n\t\treturn object.GetLabels() != nil && object.GetLabels()[common.ManagedResourceLabelKey] == RequestEnqueueLabelValue\n\t})\n\n\t// predicate function to filter events for objects which controller is interested in, but\n\t// not managed or created by controller.\n\tcontrollerWatchResources := predicate.NewPredicateFuncs(func(object client.Object) bool {\n\t\treturn object.GetLabels() != nil && object.GetLabels()[IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName] != \"\"\n\t})\n\n\tcontrollerConfigMapPredicates := predicate.NewPredicateFuncs(func(object client.Object) bool {\n\t\tif object.GetLabels() == nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Accept if it's a managed ConfigMap OR a watched ConfigMap\n\t\treturn object.GetLabels()[common.ManagedResourceLabelKey] == RequestEnqueueLabelValue ||\n\t\t\tobject.GetLabels()[IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName] != \"\"\n\t})\n\n\twithIgnoreStatusUpdatePredicates := builder.WithPredicates(predicate.GenerationChangedPredicate{}, controllerManagedResources)\n\tcontrollerWatchResourcePredicates := builder.WithPredicates(predicate.ResourceVersionChangedPredicate{}, controllerWatchResources)\n\tcontrollerManagedResourcePredicates := builder.WithPredicates(controllerManagedResources)\n\tcontrollerConfigMapWatchPredicates := builder.WithPredicates(predicate.ResourceVersionChangedPredicate{}, controllerConfigMapPredicates)\n\n\treturn ctrl.NewControllerManagedBy(mgr).\n\t\tFor(&v1alpha1.IstioCSR{}, builder.WithPredicates(predicate.GenerationChangedPredicate{})).\n\t\tNamed(ControllerName).\n\t\tWatches(&certmanagerv1.Certificate{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), withIgnoreStatusUpdatePredicates).\n\t\tWatches(&appsv1.Deployment{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), withIgnoreStatusUpdatePredicates).\n\t\tWatches(&rbacv1.ClusterRole{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).\n\t\tWatches(&rbacv1.ClusterRoleBinding{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).\n\t\tWatches(&rbacv1.Role{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).\n\t\tWatches(&rbacv1.RoleBinding{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).\n\t\tWatches(&corev1.Service{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).\n\t\tWatches(&corev1.ServiceAccount{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).\n\t\tWatches(&corev1.ConfigMap{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerConfigMapWatchPredicates).\n\t\tWatchesMetadata(&corev1.Secret{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerWatchResourcePredicates).\n\t\tWatches(&networkingv1.NetworkPolicy{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).\n\t\tWatches(&certmanagerv1.Issuer{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerWatchResourcePredicates).\n\t\tWatches(&certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerWatchResourcePredicates).\n\t\tComplete(r)\n}\n\n// Reconcile function to compare the state specified by the IstioCSR object against the actual cluster state,\n// and to make the cluster state reflect the state specified by the user.\nfunc (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {\n\tr.log.V(1).Info(\"reconciling\", \"request\", req)\n\n\t// Fetch the istiocsr.openshift.operator.io CR\n\tistiocsr := &v1alpha1.IstioCSR{}\n\tif err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\tif errors.IsNotFound(err) {\n\t\t\t// NotFound errors, since they can't be fixed by an immediate\n\t\t\t// requeue (have to wait for a new notification), and can be processed\n\t\t\t// on deleted requests.\n\t\t\tr.log.V(1).Info(\"istiocsr.openshift.operator.io object not found, skipping reconciliation\", \"request\", req)\n\t\t\treturn ctrl.Result{}, nil\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn ctrl.Result{}, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch istiocsr.openshift.operator.io %q during reconciliation: %w\", req.NamespacedName, err)\n\t}\n\n\tif !istiocsr.DeletionTimestamp.IsZero() {\n\t\tr.log.V(1).Info(\"istiocsr.openshift.operator.io is marked for deletion\", \"namespace\", req.NamespacedName)\n\n\t\tif requeue, err := r.cleanUp(istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn ctrl.Result{}, fmt.Errorf(\"clean up failed for %q istiocsr.openshift.operator.io instance deletion: %w\", req.NamespacedName, err)\n\t\t} else if requeue {\n\t\t\treturn ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: defaultRequeueTime}, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err := r.removeFinalizer(ctx, istiocsr, finalizer); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn ctrl.Result{}, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tr.log.V(1).Info(\"removed finalizer, cleanup complete\", \"request\", req.NamespacedName)\n\t\treturn ctrl.Result{}, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Set finalizers on the istiocsr.openshift.operator.io resource\n\tif err := r.addFinalizer(ctx, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn ctrl.Result{}, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update %q istiocsr.openshift.operator.io with finalizers: %w\", req.NamespacedName, err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn r.processReconcileRequest(istiocsr, req.NamespacedName)\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) processReconcileRequest(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, req types.NamespacedName) (ctrl.Result, error) {\n\tistioCSRCreateRecon := false\n\tif !containsProcessedAnnotation(istiocsr) && reflect.DeepEqual(istiocsr.Status, v1alpha1.IstioCSRStatus{}) {\n\t\tr.log.V(1).Info(\"starting reconciliation of newly created istiocsr\", \"namespace\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), \"name\", istiocsr.GetName())\n\t\tistioCSRCreateRecon = true\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.disallowMultipleIstioCSRInstances(istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\tif common.IsMultipleInstanceError(err) {\n\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeWarning, \"MultiIstioCSRInstance\", \"creation of multiple istiocsr instances is not supported, will not be processed\")\n\t\t\terr = nil\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn ctrl.Result{}, err\n\t}\n\n\treconcileErr := r.reconcileIstioCSRDeployment(istiocsr, istioCSRCreateRecon)\n\tif reconcileErr != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(reconcileErr, \"failed to reconcile IstioCSR deployment\", \"request\", req)\n\t}\n\n\treturn common.HandleReconcileResult(\n\t\t&istiocsr.Status.ConditionalStatus,\n\t\treconcileErr,\n\t\tr.log.WithValues(\"namespace\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), \"name\", istiocsr.GetName()),\n\t\tfunc(prependErr error) error {\n\t\t\treturn r.updateCondition(istiocsr, prependErr)\n\t\t},\n\t\tdefaultRequeueTime,\n\t)\n}\n\n// cleanUp handles deletion of istiocsr.openshift.operator.io gracefully.\n//\n//nolint:unparam // error return is kept for future implementation\nfunc (r *Reconciler) cleanUp(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) (bool, error) {\n\t// TODO: For GA, handle cleaning up of resources created for installing istio-csr operand.\n\t// This might require a validation webhook to check for usage of service as GRPC endpoint in\n\t// any of OpenShift Service Mesh or Istiod deployments to avoid disruptions across cluster.\n\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeWarning, \"RemoveDeployment\", \"%s/%s istiocsr marked for deletion, remove reference in istiod deployment and remove all resources created for istiocsr deployment\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n","numLines":244,"startLine":1,"totalLines":244}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_vrtx_01QrtP8Z6Ra8v5usWbPtJuDc","type":"tool_result","content":"1\tpackage istiocsr\n2\t\n3\timport (\n4\t\t\"os\"\n5\t\t\"strings\"\n6\t\t\"time\"\n7\t\n8\t\tcertmanagerapi \"github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager\"\n9\t\tcertmanagerv1 \"github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager/v1\"\n10\t)\n11\t\n12\tconst (\n13\t\t// istiocsrCommonName is the name commonly used for naming resources.\n14\t\tistiocsrCommonName = \"cert-manager-istio-csr\"\n15\t\n16\t\t// ControllerName is the name of the controller used in logs and events.\n17\t\tControllerName = istiocsrCommonName + \"-controller\"\n18\t\n19\t\t// controllerProcessedAnnotation is the annotation added to istiocsr resource once after\n20\t\t// successful reconciliation by the controller.\n21\t\tcontrollerProcessedAnnotation = \"operator.openshift.io/istio-csr-processed\"\n22\t\n23\t\t// controllerProcessingRejectedAnnotation is the annotation added to istiocsr resource when multiple\n24\t\t// instances of istiocsr resource is created.\n25\t\tcontrollerProcessingRejectedAnnotation = \"operator.openshift.io/istio-csr-reject-multiple-instance\"\n26\t\n27\t\t// finalizer name for istiocsr.openshift.operator.io resource.\n28\t\tfinalizer = \"istiocsr.openshift.operator.io/\" + ControllerName\n29\t\n30\t\t// defaultRequeueTime is the default reconcile requeue time.\n31\t\tdefaultRequeueTime = time.Second * 30\n32\t\n33\t\t// istiocsrObjectName is the name of the istio-csr resource created by user.\n34\t\t// istio-csr CRD enforces name to be `default`.\n35\t\tistiocsrObjectName = \"default\"\n36\t\n37\t\t// istiocsrContainerName is the name of the container created for istiocsr.\n38\t\tistiocsrContainerName = istiocsrCommonName\n39\t\n40\t\t// istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName is the environment variable key name\n41\t\t// containing the image name of the istiocsr as value.\n42\t\tistiocsrImageNameEnvVarName = \"RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_ISTIOCSR\"\n43\t\n44\t\t// istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName is the environment variable key name\n45\t\t// containing the image version of the istiocsr as value.\n46\t\tistiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName = \"ISTIOCSR_OPERAND_IMAGE_VERSION\"\n47\t\n48\t\t// defaultClusterID is the default Kubernetes cluster identifier used by istio-csr\n49\t\t// when no custom cluster ID is configured.\n50\t\tdefaultClusterID = \"Kubernetes\"\n51\t\n52\t\t// defaultIstioRevision is the Istio default revision name. \"cert-manager-istio-csr\"\n\n\t// ControllerName is the name of the controller used in logs and events.\n\tControllerName = istiocsrCommonName + \"-controller\"\n\n\t// controllerProcessedAnnotation is the annotation added to istiocsr resource once after\n\t// successful reconciliation by the controller.\n\tcontrollerProcessedAnnotation = \"operator.openshift.io/istio-csr-processed\"\n\n\t// controllerProcessingRejectedAnnotation is the annotation added to istiocsr resource when multiple\n\t// instances of istiocsr resource is created.\n\tcontrollerProcessingRejectedAnnotation = \"operator.openshift.io/istio-csr-reject-multiple-instance\"\n\n\t// finalizer name for istiocsr.openshift.operator.io resource.\n\tfinalizer = \"istiocsr.openshift.operator.io/\" + ControllerName\n\n\t// defaultRequeueTime is the default reconcile requeue time.\n\tdefaultRequeueTime = time.Second * 30\n\n\t// istiocsrObjectName is the name of the istio-csr resource created by user.\n\t// istio-csr CRD enforces name to be `default`.\n\tistiocsrObjectName = \"default\"\n\n\t// istiocsrContainerName is the name of the container created for istiocsr.\n\tistiocsrContainerName = istiocsrCommonName\n\n\t// istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName is the environment variable key name\n\t// containing the image name of the istiocsr as value.\n\tistiocsrImageNameEnvVarName = \"RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_ISTIOCSR\"\n\n\t// istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName is the environment variable key name\n\t// containing the image version of the istiocsr as value.\n\tistiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName = \"ISTIOCSR_OPERAND_IMAGE_VERSION\"\n\n\t// defaultClusterID is the default Kubernetes cluster identifier used by istio-csr\n\t// when no custom cluster ID is configured.\n\tdefaultClusterID = \"Kubernetes\"\n\n\t// defaultIstioRevision is the Istio default revision name. When this revision is\n\t// specified, the DNS SAN uses the base istiod service name rather than a\n\t// revision-prefixed name.\n\tdefaultIstioRevision = \"default\"\n\n\t// istiocsrGRPCEndpointFmt is the format string for the istiocsr GRPC service endpoint.\n\tistiocsrGRPCEndpointFmt = \"%s.%s.svc:%d\"\n\n\t// istiodCertificateCommonNameFmt is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate common name\n\t// and default DNS name.\n\tistiodCertificateCommonNameFmt = \"istiod.%s.svc\"\n\n\t// istiodCertificateRevisionBasedDNSName is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate DNS name\n\t// for each defined revision.\n\tistiodCertificateRevisionBasedDNSName = \"istiod-%s.%s.svc\"\n\n\t// istiodCertificateSpiffeURIFmt is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate URI.\n\tistiodCertificateSpiffeURIFmt = \"spiffe://%s/ns/%s/sa/istiod-service-account\"\n\n\t// istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName is the label name for identifying the cluster resources or resources\n\t// created in other namespaces by the controller.\n\tistiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName = \"cert-manager-istio-csr-namespace\"\n\n\t// IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName is the label name for identifying the resources of interest for the\n\t// controller but does not create or manage the resource.\n\tIstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName = \"istiocsr.openshift.operator.io/watched-by\"\n\n\t// istiocsrResourceWatchLabelName is the value format assigned to istiocsrResourceWatchLabelName label, which\n\t// will be of the form <istiocsr_namespace>/<istiocsr_instance-Name>.\n\tistiocsrResourceWatchLabelValueFmt = \"%s_%s\"\n\n\t// IstiocsrCAConfigMapName is the name of the configmap which is mounted in istiocsr container, containing the\n\t// CA certificate configured in the secret referenced in the issuer.\n\tIstiocsrCAConfigMapName = istiocsrCommonName + \"-issuer-ca-copy\"\n\n\t// IstiocsrCAKeyName is the key name holding the CA certificate in the issuer secret or the controller\n\t// CA configmap.\n\tIstiocsrCAKeyName = \"ca.crt\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\tcontrollerDefaultResourceLabels = map[string]string{\n\t\t\"app\":                          istiocsrCommonName,\n\t\t\"app.kubernetes.io/name\":       istiocsrCommonName,\n\t\t\"app.kubernetes.io/instance\":   istiocsrCommonName,\n\t\t\"app.kubernetes.io/version\":    os.Getenv(istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName),\n\t\t\"app.kubernetes.io/managed-by\": \"cert-manager-operator\",\n\t\t\"app.kubernetes.io/part-of\":    \"cert-manager-operator\",\n\t}\n)\n\nvar (\n\tclusterIssuerKind = strings.ToLower(certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuerKind)\n\tissuerKind Which are then loaded\n// and made available by the pkg/operator/assets package.\nconst (\n\tcertificateAssetName        = \"istio-csr/istiod-certificate.yaml\"\n\tclusterRoleAssetName        = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-clusterrole.yaml\"\n\tclusterRoleBindingAssetName = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-clusterrolebinding.yaml\"\n\tdeploymentAssetName         = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-deployment.yaml\"\n\troleAssetName               = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-role.yaml\"\n\troleLeasesAssetName         = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-leases-role.yaml\"\n\troleBindingAssetName        = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-rolebinding.yaml\"\n\troleBindingLeasesAssetName  = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-leases-rolebinding.yaml\"\n\tserviceAssetName            = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-service.yaml\"\n\tmetricsServiceAssetName     = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-metrics-service.yaml\"\n\tserviceAccountAssetName     = \"istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-serviceaccount.yaml\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\tDefaultCertificateDuration            = time.Hour\n\tDefaultCertificateRenewBeforeDuration = time.Minute * 30\n\tDefaultPrivateKeyAlgorithm            = certmanagerv1.RSAKeyAlgorithm\n\tDefaultRSAPrivateKeySize              = 2048\n\tDefaultECDSA256PrivateKeySize         = 256\n\tDefaultECDSA384PrivateKeySize         = 384\n)\n\nvar istioCSRNetworkPolicyAssets = []string{\n\t\"networkpolicies/istio-csr-deny-all-networkpolicy.yaml\",\n\t\"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-egress-to-api-server-networkpolicy.yaml\",\n\t\"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-ingress-to-metrics-networkpolicy.yaml\",\n\t\"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-ingress-to-grpc-networkpolicy.yaml\",\n}\n","numLines":140,"startLine":1,"totalLines":140}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_vrtx_018h3fxrjSYwYG2cLBFuhEMS","type":"tool_result","content":"1\tpackage istiocsr\n2\t\n3\timport (\n4\t\t\"fmt\"\n5\t\t\"maps\"\n6\t\n7\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/api/operator/v1alpha1\"\n8\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/controller/common\"\n9\t)\n10\t\n11\tfunc (r *Reconciler) reconcileIstioCSRDeployment(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, istioCSRCreateRecon bool) error {\n12\t\tif err := validateIstioCSRConfig(istiocsr); err != nil {\n13\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"%s/%s configuration validation failed\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n14\t\t}\n15\t\n16\t\t// if user has set custom labels to be added to all resources created by the controller\n17\t\t// merge it with the controller's own default labels.\n18\t\tresourceLabels := make(map[string]string)\n19\t\tif istiocsr.Spec.ControllerConfig != nil && len(istiocsr.Spec.ControllerConfig.Labels) != 0 {\n20\t\t\tmaps.Copy(resourceLabels, istiocsr.Spec.ControllerConfig.Labels)\n21\t\t}\n22\t\tmaps.Copy(resourceLabels, controllerDefaultResourceLabels)\n23\t\n24\t\tif err := r.createOrApplyNetworkPolicies(istiocsr, resourceLabels, istioCSRCreateRecon); err != nil {\n25\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile network policy resources\")\n26\t\t\treturn err\n27\t\t}\n28\t\n29\t\tif err := r.createOrApplyServices(istiocsr, resourceLabels, istioCSRCreateRecon); err != nil {\n30\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile service resource\")\n31\t\t\treturn err\n32\t\t}\n33\t\n34\t\tif err := r.createOrApplyServiceAccounts(istiocsr, resourceLabels, istioCSRCreateRecon); err != nil {\n35\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile serviceaccount resource\")\n36\t\t\treturn err\n37\t\t}\n38\t\n39\t\tif err := r.createOrApplyRBACResource(istiocsr, resourceLabels, istioCSRCreateRecon); err != nil {\n40\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile rbac resources\")\n41\t\t\treturn err\n42\t\t}\n43\t\n44\t\tif err := r.createOrApplyCertificates(istiocsr, resourceLabels, istioCSRCreateRecon); err != nil {\n45\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile certificate resource\")\n46\t\t\treturn err\n47\t\t}\n48\t\n49\t\tif err := r.createOrApplyDeployments(istiocsr, resourceLabels, istioCSRCreateRecon); err != nil {\n50\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile deployment resource\")\n51\t\t\treturn err\n52\t\t}\n53\t\n54\t\tif addProcessedAnnotation(istiocsr) {\n55\t\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, istiocsr); err != nil {\n56\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update processed annotation to %s/%s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n57\t\t\t}\n58\t\t}\n59\t\n60\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"finished reconciliation of istiocsr\", \"namespace\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), \"name\", istiocsr.GetName())\n61\t\treturn nil\n62\t}\n63\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"40f75bc1-181a-4148-8afe-533f8e2603b5","uuid":"72c9a113-1726-45be-96a3-661e2675a45d","timestamp":"2026-07-20T13:28:47.024Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/kpais/kpais-workspace/a_b_evals/repos/cert-manager-operator-treatment/pkg/controller/istiocsr/install_istiocsr.go","content":"package istiocsr\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"maps\"\n\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/api/operator/v1alpha1\"\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/controller/common\"\n)\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) reconcileIstioCSRDeployment(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, istioCSRCreateRecon bool) error {\n\tif err := validateIstioCSRConfig(istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"%s/%s configuration validation failed\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n\t}\n\n\t// if user has set custom labels to be added to all resources created by the controller\n\t// merge it with the controller's own default labels.\n\tresourceLabels := make(map[string]string)\n\tif istiocsr.Spec.ControllerConfig != nil && len(istiocsr.Spec.ControllerConfig.Labels) != 0 {\n\t\tmaps.Copy(resourceLabels, istiocsr.Spec.ControllerConfig.Labels)\n\t}\n\tmaps.Copy(resourceLabels, controllerDefaultResourceLabels)\n\n\tif err := r.createOrApplyNetworkPolicies(istiocsr, resourceLabels, istioCSRCreateRecon); err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile network policy resources\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.createOrApplyServices(istiocsr, resourceLabels, istioCSRCreateRecon); err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile service resource\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.createOrApplyServiceAccounts(istiocsr, resourceLabels, istioCSRCreateRecon); err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile serviceaccount resource\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.createOrApplyRBACResource(istiocsr, resourceLabels, istioCSRCreateRecon); err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile rbac resources\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.createOrApplyCertificates(istiocsr, resourceLabels, istioCSRCreateRecon); err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile certificate resource\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.createOrApplyDeployments(istiocsr, resourceLabels, istioCSRCreateRecon); err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile deployment resource\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif addProcessedAnnotation(istiocsr) {\n\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update processed annotation to %s/%s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"finished reconciliation of istiocsr\", \"namespace\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), \"name\", istiocsr.GetName())\n\treturn nil\n}\n","numLines":63,"startLine":1,"totalLines":63}}}
