(\n4\t\t\"crypto/x509\"\n5\t\t\"encoding/pem\"\n6\t\t\"fmt\"\n7\t\t\"os\"\n8\t\t\"reflect\"\n9\t\t\"strings\"\n10\t\n11\t\tappsv1 \"k8s.io/api/apps/v1\"\n12\t\tcorev1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n13\t\tmetav1 \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n14\t\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types\"\n15\t\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/validation/field\"\n16\t\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client\"\n17\t\n18\t\tcertmanagerv1 \"github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager/v1\"\n19\t\n20\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/api/operator/v1alpha1\"\n21\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/controller/common\"\n22\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/operator/assets\"\n23\t)\n24\t\n25\tconst (\n26\t\tcaVolumeMountPath = \"/var/run/configmaps/istio-csr\"\n27\t)\n28\t\n29\tvar errInvalidIssuerRefConfig = fmt.Errorf(\"invalid issuerRef config\")\n30\t\n31\tfunc (r *Reconciler) createOrApplyDeployments(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string, istioCSRCreateRecon bool) error {\n32\t\tdesired, err := r.getDeploymentObject(istiocsr, resourceLabels)\n33\t\tif err != nil {\n34\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to generate deployment resource for creation in %s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), err)\n35\t\t}\n36\t\n37\t\tdeploymentName := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s\", desired.GetNamespace(), desired.GetName())\n38\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"reconciling deployment resource\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n39\t\tfetched := &appsv1.Deployment{}\n40\t\texist, err := r.Exists(r.ctx, client.ObjectKeyFromObject(desired), fetched)\n41\t\tif err != nil {\n42\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to check %s deployment resource already exists\", deploymentName)\n43\t\t}\n44\t\n45\t\tif exist {\n46\t\t\tif istioCSRCreateRecon {\n47\t\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeWarning, \"ResourceAlreadyExists\", \"%s deployment resource already exists, maybe from previous installation\", deploymentName)\n48\t\t\t}\n49\t\t\tif hasObjectChanged(desired, fetched) {\n50\t\t\t\tr.log.V(1).Info(\"deployment has been modified, updating to desired state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n51\t\t\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n52\t\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update %s deployment resource\", deploymentName)\n53\t\t\t\t}\n54\t\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"deployment resource %s reconciled back to desired state\", deploymentName)\n55\t\t\t} else {\n56\t\t\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"deployment resource already exists and is in expected state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n57\t\t\t}\n58\t\t}\n59\t\n60\t\tif !exist {\n61\t\t\tif err := r.Create(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n62\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create %s deployment resource\", deploymentName)\n63\t\t\t}\n64\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"deployment resource %s created\", deploymentName)\n65\t\t}\n66\t\n67\t\tif err := r.updateImageInStatus(istiocsr, desired); err != nil {\n68\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update %s/%s istiocsr status with image info\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n69\t\t}\n70\t\treturn nil\n71\t}\n72\t\n73\tfunc (r *Reconciler) getDeploymentObject(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) (*appsv1.Deployment, error) {\n74\t\tif err := r.assertIssuerRefExists(istiocsr); err != nil {\n75\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to verify issuer in %s/%s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n76\t\t}\n77\t\n78\t\tdeployment := decodeDeploymentObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(deploymentAssetName))\n79\t\n80\t\tcommon.UpdateNamespace(deployment, istiocsr.GetNamespace())\n81\t\tcommon.UpdateResourceLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n82\t\tupdatePodTemplateLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n83\t\n84\t\tupdateArgList(deployment, istiocsr)\n85\t\n86\t\tif err := updateResourceRequirement(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n87\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update resource requirements: %w\", err)\n88\t\t}\n89\t\tif err := updateAffinityRules(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n90\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update affinity rules: %w\", err)\n91\t\t}\n92\t\tif err := updatePodTolerations(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n93\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update pod tolerations: %w\", err)\n94\t\t}\n95\t\tif err := updateNodeSelector(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n96\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update node selector: %w\", err)\n97\t\t}\n98\t\tif err := r.updateImage(deployment); err != nil {\n99\t\t\treturn nil, common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"failed to update image %s/%s\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n100\t\t}\n101\t\tif err := r.updateVolumes(deployment, istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n102\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update volume %s/%s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n103\t\t}\n104\t\n105\t\treturn deployment, nil\n106\t}\n107\t\n108\tfunc (r *Reconciler) updateImage(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n109\t\timage := os.Getenv(istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName)\n110\t\tif image == \"\" {\n111\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s environment variable with istiocsr image not set\", istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName)\n112\t\t}\n113\t\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n114\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n115\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Image = image\n116\t\t\t}\n117\t\t}\n118\t\treturn nil\n119\t}\n120\t\n121\tfunc (r *Reconciler) updateImageInStatus(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n122\t\tfor _, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n123\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n124\t\t\t\tif istiocsr.Status.IstioCSRImage == container.Image {\n125\t\t\t\t\treturn nil\n126\t\t\t\t}\n127\t\t\t\tistiocsr.Status.IstioCSRImage = container.Image\n128\t\t\t}\n129\t\t}\n130\t\treturn r.updateStatus(r.ctx, istiocsr)\n131\t}\n132\t\n133\tfunc updatePodTemplateLabels(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, resourceLabels map[string]string) {\n134\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Labels = resourceLabels\n135\t}\n136\t\n137\tfunc updateArgList(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n138\t\tistiocsrConfigs := istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig\n139\t\t// Default clusterID to \"Kubernetes\" if not provided.\n140\t\tclusterID := defaultClusterID\n141\t\tif istiocsrConfigs.Server != nil && istiocsrConfigs.Server.ClusterID != \"\" {\n142\t\t\tclusterID = istiocsrConfigs.Server.ClusterID\n143\t\t}\n144\t\targs := []string{\n145\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-level=%d\", istiocsrConfigs.LogLevel),\n146\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-format=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.LogFormat),\n147\t\t\t\"--metrics-port=9402\", \"--readiness-probe-port=6060\", \"--readiness-probe-path=/readyz\",\n148\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--certificate-namespace=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Namespace),\n149\t\t\t\"--issuer-enabled=true\", \"--preserve-certificate-requests=false\",\n150\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--issuer-name=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name),\n151\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--issuer-kind=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind),\n152\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--issuer-group=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.CertManager.IssuerRef.Group),\n153\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--root-ca-file=%s/%s\", caVolumeMountPath, IstiocsrCAKeyName),\n154\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-certificate-dns-names=cert-manager-istio-csr.%s.svc\", istiocsr.GetNamespace()),\n155\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-certificate-duration=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateDuration.Minutes()),\n156\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--trust-domain=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.TrustDomain),\n157\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--cluster-id=%s\", clusterID),\n158\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--max-client-certificate-duration=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.MaxCertificateDuration.Minutes()),\n159\t\t\t\"--serving-address=0.0.0.0:6443\",\n160\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-certificate-key-size=%d\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeySize),\n161\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-signature-algorithm=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeyAlgorithm),\n162\t\t\t\"--enable-client-cert-authenticator=false\",\n163\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--leader-election-namespace=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Namespace),\n164\t\t\t\"--disable-kubernetes-client-rate-limiter=false\", \"--istiod-cert-enabled=false\",\n165\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-namespace=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Namespace),\n166\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-duration=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateDuration.Minutes()),\n167\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-renew-before=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateRenewBefore.Minutes()),\n168\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-key-algorithm=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeyAlgorithm),\n169\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-key-size=%d\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeySize),\n170\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-additional-dns-names=%s\", strings.Join(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateDNSNames, \",\")),\n171\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-istio-revisions=%s\", strings.Join(istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Revisions, \",\")),\n172\t\t}\n173\t\n174\t\t// Add configmap-namespace-selector argument if configured\n175\t\tif istiocsrConfigs.IstioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector != \"\" {\n176\t\t\targs = append(args, fmt.Sprintf(\"--configmap-namespace-selector=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector))\n177\t\t}\n178\t\n179\t\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n180\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n181\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Args = args\n182\t\t\t}\n183\t\t}\n184\t}\n185\t\n186\tfunc updateResourceRequirement(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n187\t\tif reflect.ValueOf(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Resources).IsZero() {\n188\t\t\treturn nil\n189\t\t}\n190\t\tif err := common.ValidateResourceRequirements(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Resources,\n191\t\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n192\t\t\treturn err\n193\t\t}\n194\t\tfor i := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n195\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Resources = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Resources\n196\t\t}\n197\t\treturn nil\n198\t}\n199\t\n200\tfunc updateAffinityRules(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n201\t\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Affinity == nil {\n202\t\t\treturn nil\n203\t\t}\n204\t\tif err := common.ValidateAffinityRules(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Affinity,\n205\t\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n206\t\t\treturn err\n207\t\t}\n208\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Affinity = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Affinity\n209\t\treturn nil\n210\t}\n211\t\n212\tfunc updatePodTolerations(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n213\t\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Tolerations == nil {\n214\t\t\treturn nil\n215\t\t}\n216\t\tif err := common.ValidateTolerationsConfig(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Tolerations,\n217\t\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n218\t\t\treturn err\n219\t\t}\n220\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Tolerations = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Tolerations\n221\t\treturn nil\n222\t}\n223\t\n224\tfunc updateNodeSelector(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n225\t\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.NodeSelector == nil {\n226\t\t\treturn nil\n227\t\t}\n228\t\tif err := common.ValidateNodeSelectorConfig(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.NodeSelector,\n229\t\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n230\t\t\treturn err\n231\t\t}\n232\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.NodeSelector\n233\t\treturn nil\n234\t}\n235\t\n236\tfunc (r *Reconciler) assertIssuerRefExists(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n237\t\tissuerRefKind := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind)\n238\t\tif issuerRefKind != clusterIssuerKind && issuerRefKind != issuerKind {\n239\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager.issuerRef.kind can be any of `%s` or `%s`, configured: %s\", clusterIssuerKind, issuerKind, issuerRefKind)\n240\t\t}\n241\t\n242\t\tissuerRefGroup := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Group)\n243\t\tif issuerRefGroup != issuerGroup {\n244\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager.issuerRef.group can be only `%s`, configured: %s\", issuerGroup, issuerRefGroup)\n245\t\t}\n246\t\n247\t\tobj, err := r.getIssuer(istiocsr)\n248\t\tif err != nil {\n249\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n250\t\t}\n251\t\n252\t\tvar issuerConfig certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig\n253\t\tswitch issuerRefKind {\n254\t\tcase clusterIssuerKind:\n255\t\t\tclusterIssuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer)\n256\t\t\tif !ok {\n257\t\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"failed to convert to ClusterIssuer\")\n258\t\t\t}\n259\t\t\tissuerConfig = clusterIssuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n260\t\tcase issuerKind:\n261\t\t\tissuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.Issuer)\n262\t\t\tif !ok {\n263\t\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"failed to convert to Issuer\")\n264\t\t\t}\n265\t\t\tissuerConfig = issuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n266\t\t}\n267\t\tif issuerConfig.ACME != nil {\n268\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager.issuerRef uses unsupported ACME issuer\")\n269\t\t}\n270\t\n271\t\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(obj, istiocsr); err != nil {\n272\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update watch label on cert-manager issuer %s\", istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name)\n273\t\t}\n274\t\n275\t\treturn nil\n276\t}\n277\t\n278\tfunc (r *Reconciler) updateVolumes(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n279\t\t// Use user-configured CA certificate if provided\n280\t\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate != nil {\n281\t\t\tif err := r.handleUserProvidedCA(deployment, istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n282\t\t\t\treturn common.FromError(err, \"failed to validate and mount CA certificate ConfigMap\")\n283\t\t\t}\n284\t\t\treturn nil\n285\t\t}\n286\t\n287\t\t// Fall back to issuer-based CA certificate if CA certificate is not configured\n288\t\t// Handle issuer-based CA configuration\n289\t\tif err := r.handleIssuerBasedCA(deployment, istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n290\t\t\treturn err\n291\t\t}\n292\t\n293\t\treturn nil\n294\t}\n295\t\n296\t// handleUserProvidedCA processes user-provided CA certificate configuration.\n297\t//\n298\t// It performs the following operations:\n299\t//  1. Validates that the source ConfigMap exists\n300\t//  2. Adds a watch label to the source ConfigMap for change tracking\n301\t//  3. Validates that the ConfigMap contains the specified key and is a valid CA certificate\n302\t//  4. Creates or updates a copy of the ConfigMap in the IstioCSR namespace\n303\t//  5. Configures the deployment to mount the CA certificate volume\n304\t//\n305\t// The caller must ensure that `istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate`\n306\t// is not nil before calling this function to avoid a panic.\n307\t//\n308\t// Returns an error if any validation fails or if ConfigMap operations fail.\n309\tfunc (r *Reconciler) handleUserProvidedCA(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n310\t\tcaCertConfig := istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate\n311\t\n312\t\t// Determine the namespace - use specified namespace or default to IstioCSR namespace\n313\t\tnamespace := caCertConfig.Namespace\n314\t\tif namespace == \"\" {\n315\t\t\tnamespace = istiocsr.GetNamespace()\n316\t\t}\n317\t\n318\t\t// Validate that the source ConfigMap exists\n319\t\tsourceConfigMapKey := types.NamespacedName{\n320\t\t\tName:      caCertConfig.Name,\n321\t\t\tNamespace: namespace,\n322\t\t}\n323\t\n324\t\tsourceConfigMap := &corev1.ConfigMap{}\n325\t\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, sourceConfigMapKey, sourceConfigMap); err != nil {\n326\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"failed to fetch CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name)\n327\t\t}\n328\t\n329\t\t// Add watch label to the source ConfigMap to trigger reconciliation on changes.\n330\t\t// This is done before validation so that if validation fails now, fixing the ConfigMap\n331\t\t// will trigger reconciliation.\n332\t\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(sourceConfigMap, istiocsr); err != nil {\n333\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update watch label on CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name)\n334\t\t}\n335\t\n336\t\t// Validate that the specified key exists in the ConfigMap\n337\t\tif _, exists := sourceConfigMap.Data[caCertConfig.Key]; !exists {\n338\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(fmt.Errorf(\"key %q not found in ConfigMap %s/%s\", caCertConfig.Key, sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name), \"invalid CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name)\n339\t\t}\n340\t\n341\t\t// Validate that the key contains PEM-formatted content\n342\t\tpemData := sourceConfigMap.Data[caCertConfig.Key]\n343\t\tif err := r.validatePEMData(pemData); err != nil {\n344\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"invalid PEM data in CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s key %q\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name, caCertConfig.Key)\n345\t\t}\n346\t\n347\t\t// Create a managed copy of the ConfigMap in the IstioCSR namespace.\n348\t\t// The operator does not directly mount the user-provided ConfigMap but creates a managed copy\n349\t\t// (cert-manager-istio-csr-issuer-ca-copy) in the IstioCSR namespace. This approach enables the\n350\t\t// operator to validate any changes to the source ConfigMap before propagating them to the istio-csr\n351\t\t// agent, as ConfigMap changes automatically propagate to mounted pods. The watch label on the source\n352\t\t// ConfigMap triggers reconciliation when modified, allowing the operator to re-validate and update\n353\t\t// its managed copy. Additionally, if a user directly modifies the operator-managed copy, it will be\n354\t\t// reconciled back to the desired state derived from the validated source ConfigMap.\n355\t\tif err := r.createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr, pemData, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n356\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create CA certificate ConfigMap copy\")\n357\t\t}\n358\t\n359\t\t// Mount the copied CA certificate ConfigMap (always uses the standard name)\n360\t\tupdateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment)\n361\t\n362\t\treturn nil\n363\t}\n364\t\n365\t// handleIssuerBasedCA handles the creation of CA ConfigMap from issuer secret and volume mounting.\n366\tfunc (r *Reconciler) handleIssuerBasedCA(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n367\t\tvar (\n368\t\t\tissuerConfig certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig\n369\t\t)\n370\t\n371\t\tobj, err := r.getIssuer(istiocsr)\n372\t\tif err != nil {\n373\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n374\t\t}\n375\t\n376\t\tissuerRefKind := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind)\n377\t\tswitch issuerRefKind {\n378\t\tcase clusterIssuerKind:\n379\t\t\tclusterIssuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer)\n380\t\t\tif !ok {\n381\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(fmt.Errorf(\"failed to convert to ClusterIssuer\"), \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n382\t\t\t}\n383\t\t\tissuerConfig = clusterIssuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n384\t\tcase issuerKind:\n385\t\t\tissuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.Issuer)\n386\t\t\tif !ok {\n387\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(fmt.Errorf(\"failed to convert to Issuer\"), \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n388\t\t\t}\n389\t\t\tissuerConfig = issuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n390\t\t}\n391\t\n392\t\tshouldUpdateVolume := false\n393\t\n394\t\tif issuerConfig.CA != nil && issuerConfig.CA.SecretName != \"\" {\n395\t\t\tif err := r.createCAConfigMapFromIssuerSecret(istiocsr, issuerConfig, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n396\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create CA ConfigMap\")\n397\t\t\t}\n398\t\t\tshouldUpdateVolume = true\n399\t\t}\n400\t\n401\t\tif issuerConfig.CA == nil {\n402\t\t\tif err := r.createCAConfigMapFromIstiodCertificate(istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n403\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create CA ConfigMap\")\n404\t\t\t}\n405\t\t\tshouldUpdateVolume = true\n406\t\t}\n407\t\n408\t\tif shouldUpdateVolume {\n409\t\t\tupdateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment)\n410\t\t}\n411\t\n412\t\treturn nil\n413\t}\n414\t\n415\tfunc updateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) {\n416\t\tconst (\n417\t\t\tcaVolumeName = \"root-ca\"\n418\t\t)\n419\t\tvar (\n420\t\t\tdefaultMode = int32(420)\n421\t\t)\n422\t\n423\t\tdesiredVolumeMount := corev1.VolumeMount{\n424\t\t\tName:      caVolumeName,\n425\t\t\tMountPath: caVolumeMountPath,\n426\t\t\tReadOnly:  true,\n427\t\t}\n428\t\n429\t\tdesiredVolume := corev1.Volume{\n430\t\t\tName: caVolumeName,\n431\t\t\tVolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{\n432\t\t\t\tConfigMap: &corev1.ConfigMapVolumeSource{\n433\t\t\t\t\tLocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{\n434\t\t\t\t\t\tName: IstiocsrCAConfigMapName,\n435\t\t\t\t\t},\n436\t\t\t\t\tItems: []corev1.KeyToPath{\n437\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n438\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:  IstiocsrCAKeyName,\n439\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPath: IstiocsrCAKeyName,\n440\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: &defaultMode,\n441\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n442\t\t\t\t\t},\n443\t\t\t\t\tDefaultMode: &defaultMode,\n444\t\t\t\t},\n445\t\t\t},\n446\t\t}\n447\t\n448\t\t// Update or append volume mount in the istio-csr container\n449\t\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n450\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n451\t\t\t\tvolumeMountExists := false\n452\t\t\t\tfor j, vm := range container.VolumeMounts {\n453\t\t\t\t\tif vm.Name == caVolumeName {\n454\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts[j] = desiredVolumeMount\n455\t\t\t\t\t\tvolumeMountExists = true\n456\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n457\t\t\t\t\t}\n458\t\t\t\t}\n459\t\t\t\tif !volumeMountExists {\n460\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts = append(\n461\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts,\n462\t\t\t\t\t\tdesiredVolumeMount,\n463\t\t\t\t\t)\n464\t\t\t\t}\n465\t\t\t\tbreak\n466\t\t\t}\n467\t\t}\n468\t\n469\t\t// Update or append volume in the deployment\n470\t\tvolumeExists := false\n471\t\tfor i, vol := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n472\t\t\tif vol.Name == caVolumeName {\n473\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes[i] = desiredVolume\n474\t\t\t\tvolumeExists = true\n475\t\t\t\tbreak\n476\t\t\t}\n477\t\t}\n478\t\tif !volumeExists {\n479\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes = append(\n480\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes,\n481\t\t\t\tdesiredVolume,\n482\t\t\t)\n483\t\t}\n484\t}\n485\t\n486\tfunc (r *Reconciler) getIssuer(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) (client.Object, error) {\n487\t\tissuerRefKind := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind)\n488\t\tkey := client.ObjectKey{\n489\t\t\tName:      istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name,\n490\t\t\tNamespace: istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Istio.Namespace,\n491\t\t}\n492\t\n493\t\tvar object client.Object\n494\t\tswitch issuerRefKind {\n495\t\tcase clusterIssuerKind:\n496\t\t\tobject = &certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer{}\n497\t\tcase issuerKind:\n498\t\t\tobject = &certmanagerv1.Issuer{}\n499\t\t}\n500\t\n501\t\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, key, object); err != nil {\n502\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch %q issuer: %w\", key, err)\n503\t\t}\n504\t\treturn object, nil\n505\t}\n506\t\n507\tfunc (r *Reconciler) createCAConfigMapFromIstiodCertificate(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n508\t\tistiodCertificate, err := r.getCertificateObject(istiocsr, resourceLabels)\n509\t\tif err != nil {\n510\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to fetch istiod certificate\")\n511\t\t}\n512\t\n513\t\tsecretKey := client.ObjectKey{\n514\t\t\tName:      istiodCertificate.Spec.SecretName,\n515\t\t\tNamespace: istiodCertificate.GetNamespace(),\n516\t\t}\n517\t\tsecret := &corev1.Secret{}\n518\t\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, secretKey, secret); err != nil {\n519\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch secret in issuer: %w\", err)\n520\t\t}\n521\t\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(secret, istiocsr); err != nil {\n522\t\t\treturn err\n523\t\t}\n524\t\n525\t\tcertData := string(secret.Data[IstiocsrCAKeyName])\n526\t\treturn r.createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr, certData, resourceLabels)\n527\t}\n528\t\n529\tfunc (r *Reconciler) createCAConfigMapFromIssuerSecret(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, issuerConfig certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n530\t\tif issuerConfig.CA.SecretName == \"\" {\n531\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch CA certificate configured for the %s issuer of CA type\", istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name)\n532\t\t}\n533\t\n534\t\tsecretKey := client.ObjectKey{\n535\t\t\tName:      issuerConfig.CA.SecretName,\n536\t\t\tNamespace: istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Istio.Namespace,\n537\t\t}\n538\t\tsecret := &corev1.Secret{}\n539\t\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, secretKey, secret); err != nil {\n540\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch secret in issuer: %w\", err)\n541\t\t}\n542\t\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(secret, istiocsr); err != nil {\n543\t\t\treturn err\n544\t\t}\n545\t\n546\t\tcertData := string(secret.Data[IstiocsrCAKeyName])\n547\t\treturn r.createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr, certData, resourceLabels)\n548\t}\n549\t\n550\t// createOrUpdateCAConfigMap creates or updates the CA ConfigMap with the provided certificate data.\n551\tfunc (r *Reconciler) createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, certData string, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n552\t\tif certData == \"\" {\n553\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to find CA certificate\")\n554\t\t}\n555\t\n556\t\tconfigmapKey := client.ObjectKey{\n557\t\t\tName:      IstiocsrCAConfigMapName,\n558\t\t\tNamespace: istiocsr.GetNamespace(),\n559\t\t}\n560\t\tfetched := &corev1.ConfigMap{}\n561\t\texist, err := r.Exists(r.ctx, configmapKey, fetched)\n562\t\tif err != nil {\n563\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to check if CA configmap exists: %w\", err)\n564\t\t}\n565\t\n566\t\tdesired := &corev1.ConfigMap{\n567\t\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n568\t\t\t\tName:      configmapKey.Name,\n569\t\t\t\tNamespace: configmapKey.Namespace,\n570\t\t\t\tLabels:    resourceLabels,\n571\t\t\t},\n572\t\t\tData: map[string]string{\n573\t\t\t\tIstiocsrCAKeyName: certData,\n574\t\t\t},\n575\t\t}\n576\t\n577\t\tif exist && hasObjectChanged(desired, fetched) {\n578\t\t\tr.log.V(1).Info(\"ca configmap need update\", \"name\", configmapKey)\n579\t\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n580\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update %s configmap resource: %w\", configmapKey, err)\n581\t\t\t}\n582\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"configmap resource %s reconciled back to desired state\", configmapKey)\n583\t\t} else {\n584\t\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"configmap resource already exists and is in expected state\", \"name\", configmapKey)\n585\t\t}\n586\t\n587\t\tif !exist {\n588\t\t\tif err := r.Create(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n589\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create %s configmap resource: %w\", configmapKey, err)\n590\t\t\t}\n591\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"configmap resource %s created\", configmapKey)\n592\t\t}\n593\t\n594\t\treturn nil\n595\t}\n596\t\n597\tfunc (r *Reconciler) validatePEMData(pemData string) error {\n598\t\tif pemData == \"\" {\n599\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"PEM data is empty\")\n600\t\t}\n601\t\n602\t\t// Parse the first certificate from PEM data\n603\t\tblock, _ := pem.Decode([]byte(pemData))\n604\t\tif block == nil {\n605\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"no valid PEM data found\")\n606\t\t}\n607\t\n608\t\tif block.Type != \"CERTIFICATE\" {\n609\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"PEM block is not a certificate, found: %s\", block.Type)\n610\t\t}\n611\t\n612\t\tcert, err := x509.ParseCertificate(block.Bytes)\n613\t\tif err != nil {\n614\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to parse certificate: %w\", err)\n615\t\t}\n616\t\n617\t\tif !cert.BasicConstraintsValid {\n618\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"certificate does not have valid Basic Constraints extension\")\n619\t\t}\n620\t\n621\t\tif !cert.IsCA {\n622\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"certificate is not a CA certificate\")\n623\t\t}\n624\t\n625\t\t// Check Key Usage for certificate signing\n626\t\tif cert.KeyUsage&x509.KeyUsageCertSign == 0 {\n627\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"certificate does not have Certificate Sign key usage\")\n628\t\t}\n629\t\n630\t\treturn nil\n631\t}\n632\t\n633\t// updateWatchLabel adds a watch label to any Kubernetes object that supports labels.\n634\tfunc (r *Reconciler) updateWatchLabel(obj client.Object, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n635\t\tlabels := obj.GetLabels()\n636\t\tif labels == nil {\n637\t\t\tlabels = make(map[string]string)\n638\t\t}\n639\t\tlabels[IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName] = fmt.Sprintf(istiocsrResourceWatchLabelValueFmt, istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n640\t\tobj.SetLabels(labels)\n641\t\n642\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, obj); err != nil {\n643\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update %s resource with watch label: %w\", obj.GetName(), err)\n644\t\t}\n645\t\treturn nil\n646\t}\n647\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"40f75bc1-181a-4148-8afe-533f8e2603b5","uuid":"240dc9d6-ff57-49d5-b337-8e41bf80cbc9","timestamp":"2026-07-20T13:28:48.276Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/kpais/kpais-workspace/a_b_evals/repos/cert-manager-operator-treatment/pkg/controller/istiocsr/deployments.go","content":"package istiocsr\n\nimport (\n\t\"crypto/x509\"\n\t\"encoding/pem\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"reflect\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\tappsv1 \"k8s.io/api/apps/v1\"\n\tcorev1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\tmetav1 \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/validation/field\"\n\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client\"\n\n\tcertmanagerv1 \"github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager/v1\"\n\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/api/operator/v1alpha1\"\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/controller/common\"\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/operator/assets\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\tcaVolumeMountPath = \"/var/run/configmaps/istio-csr\"\n)\n\nvar errInvalidIssuerRefConfig = fmt.Errorf(\"invalid issuerRef config\")\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) createOrApplyDeployments(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string, istioCSRCreateRecon bool) error {\n\tdesired, err := r.getDeploymentObject(istiocsr, resourceLabels)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to generate deployment resource for creation in %s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), err)\n\t}\n\n\tdeploymentName := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s\", desired.GetNamespace(), desired.GetName())\n\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"reconciling deployment resource\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\tfetched := &appsv1.Deployment{}\n\texist, err := r.Exists(r.ctx, client.ObjectKeyFromObject(desired), fetched)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to check %s deployment resource already exists\", deploymentName)\n\t}\n\n\tif exist {\n\t\tif istioCSRCreateRecon {\n\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeWarning, \"ResourceAlreadyExists\", \"%s deployment resource already exists, maybe from previous installation\", deploymentName)\n\t\t}\n\t\tif hasObjectChanged(desired, fetched) {\n\t\t\tr.log.V(1).Info(\"deployment has been modified, updating to desired state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\t\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update %s deployment resource\", deploymentName)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"deployment resource %s reconciled back to desired state\", deploymentName)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"deployment resource already exists and is in expected state\", \"name\", deploymentName)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif !exist {\n\t\tif err := r.Create(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create %s deployment resource\", deploymentName)\n\t\t}\n\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"deployment resource %s created\", deploymentName)\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.updateImageInStatus(istiocsr, desired); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update %s/%s istiocsr status with image info\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) getDeploymentObject(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) (*appsv1.Deployment, error) {\n\tif err := r.assertIssuerRefExists(istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to verify issuer in %s/%s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n\t}\n\n\tdeployment := decodeDeploymentObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(deploymentAssetName))\n\n\tcommon.UpdateNamespace(deployment, istiocsr.GetNamespace())\n\tcommon.UpdateResourceLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n\tupdatePodTemplateLabels(deployment, resourceLabels)\n\n\tupdateArgList(deployment, istiocsr)\n\n\tif err := updateResourceRequirement(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update resource requirements: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif err := updateAffinityRules(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update affinity rules: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif err := updatePodTolerations(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update pod tolerations: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif err := updateNodeSelector(deployment, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update node selector: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif err := r.updateImage(deployment); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"failed to update image %s/%s\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n\t}\n\tif err := r.updateVolumes(deployment, istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update volume %s/%s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn deployment, nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) updateImage(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n\timage := os.Getenv(istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName)\n\tif image == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s environment variable with istiocsr image not set\", istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName)\n\t}\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Image = image\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) updateImageInStatus(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {\n\tfor _, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n\t\t\tif istiocsr.Status.IstioCSRImage == container.Image {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tistiocsr.Status.IstioCSRImage = container.Image\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn r.updateStatus(r.ctx, istiocsr)\n}\n\nfunc updatePodTemplateLabels(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, resourceLabels map[string]string) {\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Labels = resourceLabels\n}\n\nfunc updateArgList(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n\tistiocsrConfigs := istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig\n\t// Default clusterID to \"Kubernetes\" if not provided.\n\tclusterID := defaultClusterID\n\tif istiocsrConfigs.Server != nil && istiocsrConfigs.Server.ClusterID != \"\" {\n\t\tclusterID = istiocsrConfigs.Server.ClusterID\n\t}\n\targs := []string{\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-level=%d\", istiocsrConfigs.LogLevel),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--log-format=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.LogFormat),\n\t\t\"--metrics-port=9402\", \"--readiness-probe-port=6060\", \"--readiness-probe-path=/readyz\",\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--certificate-namespace=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Namespace),\n\t\t\"--issuer-enabled=true\", \"--preserve-certificate-requests=false\",\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--issuer-name=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--issuer-kind=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--issuer-group=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.CertManager.IssuerRef.Group),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--root-ca-file=%s/%s\", caVolumeMountPath, IstiocsrCAKeyName),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-certificate-dns-names=cert-manager-istio-csr.%s.svc\", istiocsr.GetNamespace()),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-certificate-duration=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateDuration.Minutes()),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--trust-domain=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.TrustDomain),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--cluster-id=%s\", clusterID),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--max-client-certificate-duration=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.MaxCertificateDuration.Minutes()),\n\t\t\"--serving-address=0.0.0.0:6443\",\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-certificate-key-size=%d\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeySize),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--serving-signature-algorithm=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeyAlgorithm),\n\t\t\"--enable-client-cert-authenticator=false\",\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--leader-election-namespace=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Namespace),\n\t\t\"--disable-kubernetes-client-rate-limiter=false\", \"--istiod-cert-enabled=false\",\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-namespace=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Namespace),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-duration=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateDuration.Minutes()),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-renew-before=%.0fm\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateRenewBefore.Minutes()),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-key-algorithm=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeyAlgorithm),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-key-size=%d\", istiocsrConfigs.IstiodTLSConfig.PrivateKeySize),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-additional-dns-names=%s\", strings.Join(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.IstiodTLSConfig.CertificateDNSNames, \",\")),\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"--istiod-cert-istio-revisions=%s\", strings.Join(istiocsrConfigs.Istio.Revisions, \",\")),\n\t}\n\n\t// Add configmap-namespace-selector argument if configured\n\tif istiocsrConfigs.IstioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector != \"\" {\n\t\targs = append(args, fmt.Sprintf(\"--configmap-namespace-selector=%s\", istiocsrConfigs.IstioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector))\n\t}\n\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Args = args\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc updateResourceRequirement(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n\tif reflect.ValueOf(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Resources).IsZero() {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateResourceRequirements(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Resources,\n\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tfor i := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].Resources = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Resources\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateAffinityRules(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Affinity == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateAffinityRules(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Affinity,\n\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Affinity = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Affinity\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updatePodTolerations(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Tolerations == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateTolerationsConfig(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Tolerations,\n\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Tolerations = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Tolerations\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateNodeSelector(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.NodeSelector == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif err := common.ValidateNodeSelectorConfig(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.NodeSelector,\n\t\tfield.NewPath(\"spec\", \"istioCSRConfig\")); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector = istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.NodeSelector\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) assertIssuerRefExists(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n\tissuerRefKind := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind)\n\tif issuerRefKind != clusterIssuerKind && issuerRefKind != issuerKind {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager.issuerRef.kind can be any of `%s` or `%s`, configured: %s\", clusterIssuerKind, issuerKind, issuerRefKind)\n\t}\n\n\tissuerRefGroup := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Group)\n\tif issuerRefGroup != issuerGroup {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager.issuerRef.group can be only `%s`, configured: %s\", issuerGroup, issuerRefGroup)\n\t}\n\n\tobj, err := r.getIssuer(istiocsr)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n\t}\n\n\tvar issuerConfig certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig\n\tswitch issuerRefKind {\n\tcase clusterIssuerKind:\n\t\tclusterIssuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"failed to convert to ClusterIssuer\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tissuerConfig = clusterIssuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n\tcase issuerKind:\n\t\tissuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.Issuer)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"failed to convert to Issuer\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tissuerConfig = issuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n\t}\n\tif issuerConfig.ACME != nil {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(errInvalidIssuerRefConfig, \"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager.issuerRef uses unsupported ACME issuer\")\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(obj, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update watch label on cert-manager issuer %s\", istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) updateVolumes(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n\t// Use user-configured CA certificate if provided\n\tif istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate != nil {\n\t\tif err := r.handleUserProvidedCA(deployment, istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn common.FromError(err, \"failed to validate and mount CA certificate ConfigMap\")\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Fall back to issuer-based CA certificate if CA certificate is not configured\n\t// Handle issuer-based CA configuration\n\tif err := r.handleIssuerBasedCA(deployment, istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// handleUserProvidedCA processes user-provided CA certificate configuration.\n//\n// It performs the following operations:\n//  1. Validates that the source ConfigMap exists\n//  2. Adds a watch label to the source ConfigMap for change tracking\n//  3. Validates that the ConfigMap contains the specified key and is a valid CA certificate\n//  4. Creates or updates a copy of the ConfigMap in the IstioCSR namespace\n//  5. Configures the deployment to mount the CA certificate volume\n//\n// The caller must ensure that `istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate`\n// is not nil before calling this function to avoid a panic.\n//\n// Returns an error if any validation fails or if ConfigMap operations fail.\nfunc (r *Reconciler) handleUserProvidedCA(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n\tcaCertConfig := istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate\n\n\t// Determine the namespace - use specified namespace or default to IstioCSR namespace\n\tnamespace := caCertConfig.Namespace\n\tif namespace == \"\" {\n\t\tnamespace = istiocsr.GetNamespace()\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate that the source ConfigMap exists\n\tsourceConfigMapKey := types.NamespacedName{\n\t\tName:      caCertConfig.Name,\n\t\tNamespace: namespace,\n\t}\n\n\tsourceConfigMap := &corev1.ConfigMap{}\n\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, sourceConfigMapKey, sourceConfigMap); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"failed to fetch CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name)\n\t}\n\n\t// Add watch label to the source ConfigMap to trigger reconciliation on changes.\n\t// This is done before validation so that if validation fails now, fixing the ConfigMap\n\t// will trigger reconciliation.\n\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(sourceConfigMap, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update watch label on CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name)\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate that the specified key exists in the ConfigMap\n\tif _, exists := sourceConfigMap.Data[caCertConfig.Key]; !exists {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(fmt.Errorf(\"key %q not found in ConfigMap %s/%s\", caCertConfig.Key, sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name), \"invalid CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name)\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate that the key contains PEM-formatted content\n\tpemData := sourceConfigMap.Data[caCertConfig.Key]\n\tif err := r.validatePEMData(pemData); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"invalid PEM data in CA certificate ConfigMap %s/%s key %q\", sourceConfigMapKey.Namespace, sourceConfigMapKey.Name, caCertConfig.Key)\n\t}\n\n\t// Create a managed copy of the ConfigMap in the IstioCSR namespace.\n\t// The operator does not directly mount the user-provided ConfigMap but creates a managed copy\n\t// (cert-manager-istio-csr-issuer-ca-copy) in the IstioCSR namespace. This approach enables the\n\t// operator to validate any changes to the source ConfigMap before propagating them to the istio-csr\n\t// agent, as ConfigMap changes automatically propagate to mounted pods. The watch label on the source\n\t// ConfigMap triggers reconciliation when modified, allowing the operator to re-validate and update\n\t// its managed copy. Additionally, if a user directly modifies the operator-managed copy, it will be\n\t// reconciled back to the desired state derived from the validated source ConfigMap.\n\tif err := r.createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr, pemData, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create CA certificate ConfigMap copy\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Mount the copied CA certificate ConfigMap (always uses the standard name)\n\tupdateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment)\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// handleIssuerBasedCA handles the creation of CA ConfigMap from issuer secret and volume mounting.\nfunc (r *Reconciler) handleIssuerBasedCA(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n\tvar (\n\t\tissuerConfig certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig\n\t)\n\n\tobj, err := r.getIssuer(istiocsr)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n\t}\n\n\tissuerRefKind := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind)\n\tswitch issuerRefKind {\n\tcase clusterIssuerKind:\n\t\tclusterIssuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(fmt.Errorf(\"failed to convert to ClusterIssuer\"), \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tissuerConfig = clusterIssuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n\tcase issuerKind:\n\t\tissuer, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.Issuer)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(fmt.Errorf(\"failed to convert to Issuer\"), \"failed to fetch issuer\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tissuerConfig = issuer.Spec.IssuerConfig\n\t}\n\n\tshouldUpdateVolume := false\n\n\tif issuerConfig.CA != nil && issuerConfig.CA.SecretName != \"\" {\n\t\tif err := r.createCAConfigMapFromIssuerSecret(istiocsr, issuerConfig, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create CA ConfigMap\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tshouldUpdateVolume = true\n\t}\n\n\tif issuerConfig.CA == nil {\n\t\tif err := r.createCAConfigMapFromIstiodCertificate(istiocsr, resourceLabels); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to create CA ConfigMap\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tshouldUpdateVolume = true\n\t}\n\n\tif shouldUpdateVolume {\n\t\tupdateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc updateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) {\n\tconst (\n\t\tcaVolumeName = \"root-ca\"\n\t)\n\tvar (\n\t\tdefaultMode = int32(420)\n\t)\n\n\tdesiredVolumeMount := corev1.VolumeMount{\n\t\tName:      caVolumeName,\n\t\tMountPath: caVolumeMountPath,\n\t\tReadOnly:  true,\n\t}\n\n\tdesiredVolume := corev1.Volume{\n\t\tName: caVolumeName,\n\t\tVolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{\n\t\t\tConfigMap: &corev1.ConfigMapVolumeSource{\n\t\t\t\tLocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{\n\t\t\t\t\tName: IstiocsrCAConfigMapName,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tItems: []corev1.KeyToPath{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:  IstiocsrCAKeyName,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPath: IstiocsrCAKeyName,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: &defaultMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tDefaultMode: &defaultMode,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\t// Update or append volume mount in the istio-csr container\n\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n\t\t\tvolumeMountExists := false\n\t\t\tfor j, vm := range container.VolumeMounts {\n\t\t\t\tif vm.Name == caVolumeName {\n\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts[j] = desiredVolumeMount\n\t\t\t\t\tvolumeMountExists = true\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif !volumeMountExists {\n\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts = append(\n\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts,\n\t\t\t\t\tdesiredVolumeMount,\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Update or append volume in the deployment\n\tvolumeExists := false\n\tfor i, vol := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {\n\t\tif vol.Name == caVolumeName {\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes[i] = desiredVolume\n\t\t\tvolumeExists = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif !volumeExists {\n\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes = append(\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes,\n\t\t\tdesiredVolume,\n\t\t)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) getIssuer(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) (client.Object, error) {\n\tissuerRefKind := strings.ToLower(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind)\n\tkey := client.ObjectKey{\n\t\tName:      istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name,\n\t\tNamespace: istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Istio.Namespace,\n\t}\n\n\tvar object client.Object\n\tswitch issuerRefKind {\n\tcase clusterIssuerKind:\n\t\tobject = &certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer{}\n\tcase issuerKind:\n\t\tobject = &certmanagerv1.Issuer{}\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, key, object); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch %q issuer: %w\", key, err)\n\t}\n\treturn object, nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) createCAConfigMapFromIstiodCertificate(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n\tistiodCertificate, err := r.getCertificateObject(istiocsr, resourceLabels)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to fetch istiod certificate\")\n\t}\n\n\tsecretKey := client.ObjectKey{\n\t\tName:      istiodCertificate.Spec.SecretName,\n\t\tNamespace: istiodCertificate.GetNamespace(),\n\t}\n\tsecret := &corev1.Secret{}\n\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, secretKey, secret); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch secret in issuer: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(secret, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tcertData := string(secret.Data[IstiocsrCAKeyName])\n\treturn r.createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr, certData, resourceLabels)\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) createCAConfigMapFromIssuerSecret(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, issuerConfig certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n\tif issuerConfig.CA.SecretName == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch CA certificate configured for the %s issuer of CA type\", istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Name)\n\t}\n\n\tsecretKey := client.ObjectKey{\n\t\tName:      issuerConfig.CA.SecretName,\n\t\tNamespace: istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Istio.Namespace,\n\t}\n\tsecret := &corev1.Secret{}\n\tif err := r.Get(r.ctx, secretKey, secret); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch secret in issuer: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif err := r.updateWatchLabel(secret, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tcertData := string(secret.Data[IstiocsrCAKeyName])\n\treturn r.createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr, certData, resourceLabels)\n}\n\n// createOrUpdateCAConfigMap creates or updates the CA ConfigMap with the provided certificate data.\nfunc (r *Reconciler) createOrUpdateCAConfigMap(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, certData string, resourceLabels map[string]string) error {\n\tif certData == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to find CA certificate\")\n\t}\n\n\tconfigmapKey := client.ObjectKey{\n\t\tName:      IstiocsrCAConfigMapName,\n\t\tNamespace: istiocsr.GetNamespace(),\n\t}\n\tfetched := &corev1.ConfigMap{}\n\texist, err := r.Exists(r.ctx, configmapKey, fetched)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to check if CA configmap exists: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tdesired := &corev1.ConfigMap{\n\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\tName:      configmapKey.Name,\n\t\t\tNamespace: configmapKey.Namespace,\n\t\t\tLabels:    resourceLabels,\n\t\t},\n\t\tData: map[string]string{\n\t\t\tIstiocsrCAKeyName: certData,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tif exist && hasObjectChanged(desired, fetched) {\n\t\tr.log.V(1).Info(\"ca configmap need update\", \"name\", configmapKey)\n\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update %s configmap resource: %w\", configmapKey, err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"configmap resource %s reconciled back to desired state\", configmapKey)\n\t} else {\n\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"configmap resource already exists and is in expected state\", \"name\", configmapKey)\n\t}\n\n\tif !exist {\n\t\tif err := r.Create(r.ctx, desired); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create %s configmap resource: %w\", configmapKey, err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tr.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeNormal, \"Reconciled\", \"configmap resource %s created\", configmapKey)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) validatePEMData(pemData string) error {\n\tif pemData == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"PEM data is empty\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Parse the first certificate from PEM data\n\tblock, _ := pem.Decode([]byte(pemData))\n\tif block == nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"no valid PEM data found\")\n\t}\n\n\tif block.Type != \"CERTIFICATE\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"PEM block is not a certificate, found: %s\", block.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tcert, err := x509.ParseCertificate(block.Bytes)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to parse certificate: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tif !cert.BasicConstraintsValid {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"certificate does not have valid Basic Constraints extension\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !cert.IsCA {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"certificate is not a CA certificate\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Check Key Usage for certificate signing\n\tif cert.KeyUsage&x509.KeyUsageCertSign == 0 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"certificate does not have Certificate Sign key usage\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// updateWatchLabel adds a watch label to any Kubernetes object that supports labels.\nfunc (r *Reconciler) updateWatchLabel(obj client.Object, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n\tlabels := obj.GetLabels()\n\tif labels == nil {\n\t\tlabels = make(map[string]string)\n\t}\n\tlabels[IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName] = fmt.Sprintf(istiocsrResourceWatchLabelValueFmt, istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n\tobj.SetLabels(labels)\n\n\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, obj); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update %s resource with watch label: %w\", obj.GetName(), err)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n","numLines":647,"startLine":1,"totalLines":647}}}

(\n4\t\t\"context\"\n5\t\t\"errors\"\n6\t\t\"fmt\"\n7\t\t\"maps\"\n8\t\t\"reflect\"\n9\t\n10\t\tappsv1 \"k8s.io/api/apps/v1\"\n11\t\tcorev1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n12\t\tnetworkingv1 \"k8s.io/api/networking/v1\"\n13\t\trbacv1 \"k8s.io/api/rbac/v1\"\n14\t\tmetav1 \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n15\t\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\"\n16\t\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/serializer\"\n17\t\tutilerrors \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/errors\"\n18\t\t\"k8s.io/client-go/util/retry\"\n19\t\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client\"\n20\t\t\"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/controller/controllerutil\"\n21\t\n22\t\tcertmanagerv1 \"github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager/v1\"\n23\t\n24\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/api/operator/v1alpha1\"\n25\t\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/controller/common\"\n26\t)\n27\t\n28\tvar (\n29\t\tscheme = runtime.NewScheme()\n30\t\tcodecs = serializer.NewCodecFactory(scheme)\n31\t)\n32\t\n33\tfunc init() {\n34\t\tif err := appsv1.AddToScheme(scheme); err != nil {\n35\t\t\tpanic(err)\n36\t\t}\n37\t\tif err := corev1.AddToScheme(scheme); err != nil {\n38\t\t\tpanic(err)\n39\t\t}\n40\t\tif err := networkingv1.AddToScheme(scheme); err != nil {\n41\t\t\tpanic(err)\n42\t\t}\n43\t\tif err := rbacv1.AddToScheme(scheme); err != nil {\n44\t\t\tpanic(err)\n45\t\t}\n46\t\tif err := certmanagerv1.AddToScheme(scheme); err != nil {\n47\t\t\tpanic(err)\n48\t\t}\n49\t}\n50\t\n51\t// updateStatus is for updating the status subresource of istiocsr.openshift.operator.io.\n52\tfunc (r *Reconciler) updateStatus(ctx context.Context, changed *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n53\t\tnamespacedName := client.ObjectKeyFromObject(changed)\n54\t\tif err := retry.RetryOnConflict(retry.DefaultRetry, func() error {\n55\t\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"updating istiocsr.openshift.operator.io status\", \"request\", namespacedName)\n56\t\t\tcurrent := &v1alpha1.IstioCSR{}\n57\t\t\tif err := r.Get(ctx, namespacedName, current); err != nil {\n58\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch istiocsr.openshift.operator.io %q for status update: %w\", namespacedName, err)\n59\t\t\t}\n60\t\t\tchanged.Status.DeepCopyInto(&current.Status)\n61\t\n62\t\t\tif err := r.StatusUpdate(ctx, current); err != nil {\n63\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update istiocsr.openshift.operator.io %q status: %w\", namespacedName, err)\n64\t\t\t}\n65\t\n66\t\t\treturn nil\n67\t\t}); err != nil {\n68\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update status for %q: %w\", namespacedName, err)\n69\t\t}\n70\t\n71\t\treturn nil\n72\t}\n73\t\n74\t// addFinalizer adds finalizer to istiocsr.openshift.operator.io resource.\n75\tfunc (r *Reconciler) addFinalizer(ctx context.Context, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n76\t\tnamespacedName := client.ObjectKeyFromObject(istiocsr)\n77\t\tif !controllerutil.ContainsFinalizer(istiocsr, finalizer) {\n78\t\t\tif !controllerutil.AddFinalizer(istiocsr, finalizer) {\n79\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create %q istiocsr.openshift.operator.io object with finalizers added\", namespacedName)\n80\t\t\t}\n81\t\n82\t\t\t// update istiocsr.openshift.operator.io on adding finalizer.\n83\t\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(ctx, istiocsr); err != nil {\n84\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to add finalizers on %q istiocsr.openshift.operator.io with %w\", namespacedName, err)\n85\t\t\t}\n86\t\n87\t\t\tupdated := &v1alpha1.IstioCSR{}\n88\t\t\tif err := r.Get(ctx, namespacedName, updated); err != nil {\n89\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch istiocsr.openshift.operator.io %q after updating finalizers: %w\", namespacedName, err)\n90\t\t\t}\n91\t\t\tupdated.DeepCopyInto(istiocsr)\n92\t\t\treturn nil\n93\t\t}\n94\t\treturn nil\n95\t}\n96\t\n97\t// removeFinalizer removes finalizers added to istiocsr.openshift.operator.io resource.\n98\tfunc (r *Reconciler) removeFinalizer(ctx context.Context, istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, finalizer string) error {\n99\t\tnamespacedName := client.ObjectKeyFromObject(istiocsr)\n100\t\tif controllerutil.ContainsFinalizer(istiocsr, finalizer) {\n101\t\t\tif !controllerutil.RemoveFinalizer(istiocsr, finalizer) {\n102\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create %q istiocsr.openshift.operator.io object with finalizers removed\", namespacedName)\n103\t\t\t}\n104\t\n105\t\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(ctx, istiocsr); err != nil {\n106\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to remove finalizers on %q istiocsr.openshift.operator.io with %w\", namespacedName, err)\n107\t\t\t}\n108\t\t\treturn nil\n109\t\t}\n110\t\n111\t\treturn nil\n112\t}\n113\t\n114\tfunc containsProcessedAnnotation(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) bool {\n115\t\treturn common.ContainsAnnotation(istiocsr, controllerProcessedAnnotation)\n116\t}\n117\t\n118\tfunc containsProcessingRejectedAnnotation(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) bool {\n119\t\treturn common.ContainsAnnotation(istiocsr, controllerProcessingRejectedAnnotation)\n120\t}\n121\t\n122\tfunc addProcessedAnnotation(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) bool {\n123\t\treturn common.AddAnnotation(istiocsr, controllerProcessedAnnotation, \"true\")\n124\t}\n125\t\n126\tfunc addProcessingRejectedAnnotation(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) bool {\n127\t\treturn common.AddAnnotation(istiocsr, controllerProcessingRejectedAnnotation, \"true\")\n128\t}\n129\t\n130\tfunc updateResourceLabelsWithIstioMapperLabels(obj client.Object, istiocsrNamespace string, labels map[string]string) {\n131\t\tl := make(map[string]string, len(labels)+1)\n132\t\tmaps.Copy(l, labels)\n133\t\tl[istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName] = istiocsrNamespace\n134\t\tobj.SetLabels(l)\n135\t}\n136\t\n137\tfunc {\n224\t\t\tpanic(err)\n225\t\t}\n226\t\tcertificate, ok := obj.(*certmanagerv1.Certificate)\n227\t\tif !ok {\n228\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert to reflect.TypeOf(fetched) {\n235\t\t\tpanic(\"both objects to be compared must be of same type\")\n236\t\t}\n237\t\n238\t\tvar objectModified bool\n239\t\tswitch desiredObj := desired.(type) {\n240\t\tcase *certmanagerv1.Certificate:\n241\t\t\tfetchedCert, ok := fetched.(*certmanagerv1.Certificate)\n242\t\t\tif !ok {\n243\t\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert fetched to *certmanagerv1.Certificate\")\n244\t\t\t}\n245\t\t\tobjectModified = certificateSpecModified(desiredObj, fetchedCert)\n246\t\tcase *rbacv1.ClusterRole:\n247\t\t\tfetchedClusterRole, ok := fetchedClusterRole)\n252\t\tcase *rbacv1.ClusterRoleBinding:\n253\t\t\tfetchedClusterRoleBinding, ok := fetched.(*rbacv1.ClusterRoleBinding)\n254\t\t\tif !ok {\n255\t\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert fetched to *rbacv1.ClusterRoleBinding\")\n256\t\t\t}\n257\t\t\tobjectModified = rbacRoleBindingRefModified(desiredObj, fetchedClusterRoleBinding) ||\n258\t\t\t\trbacRoleBindingSubjectsModified(desiredObj, fetchedClusterRoleBinding)\n259\t\tcase *appsv1.Deployment:\n260\t\t\tfetchedDeployment, ok := fetched.(*appsv1.Deployment)\n261\t\t\tif !ok {\n262\t\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert fetched to *appsv1.Deployment\")\n263\t\t\t}\n264\t\t\tobjectModified = deploymentSpecModified(desiredObj, fetchedDeployment)\n265\t\tcase *rbacv1.Role:\n266\t\t\tfetchedRole, ok := fetched.(*rbacv1.Role)\n267\t\t\tif !ok {\n268\t\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert fetched to *rbacv1.Role\")\n269\t\t\t}\n270\t\t\tobjectModified = fetchedConfigMap)\n290\t\tcase *networkingv1.NetworkPolicy:\n291\t\t\tfetchedNetworkPolicy, ok := fetched.(*networkingv1.NetworkPolicy)\n292\t\t\tif !ok {\n293\t\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert fetched to *networkingv1.NetworkPolicy\")\n294\t\t\t}\n295\t\t\tobjectModified = networkPolicySpecModified(desiredObj, fetchedNetworkPolicy)\n296\t\tcase *corev1.ServiceAccount:\n297\t\t\t// No spec to compare; drift is labels/annotations only, ObjectMetadataModified() handles it.\n298\t\tdefault:\n299\t\t\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\"unsupported object type: %T\", desired))\n300\t\t}\n301\t\treturn objectModified || common.ObjectMetadataModified(desired, fetched)\n302\t}\n303\t\n304\tfunc certificateSpecModified(desired, fetched *certmanagerv1.Certificate) bool {\n305\t\treturn !reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec, fetched.Spec)\n306\t}\n307\t\n308\tfunc deploymentSpecModified(desired, fetched *appsv1.Deployment) bool {\n309\t\t// check just the fields which are set by the controller and set in static manifest,\n310\t\t// as fields with default values end up in manifest and causes plain check to fail.\n311\t\tif *desired.Spec.Replicas != *fetched.Spec.Replicas ||\n312\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Selector.MatchLabels, fetched.Spec.Selector.MatchLabels) {\n313\t\t\treturn true\n314\t\t}\n315\t\n316\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Template.Labels, fetched.Spec.Template.Labels) ||\n317\t\t\tlen(desired.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers) != len(fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers) {\n318\t\t\treturn true\n319\t\t}\n320\t\n321\t\tdesiredContainer := desired.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[0]\n322\t\tfetchedContainer := fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[0]\n323\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(desiredContainer.Args, fetchedContainer.Args) ||\n324\t\t\tdesiredContainer.Name != fetchedContainer.Name || desiredContainer.Image != fetchedContainer.Image ||\n325\t\t\tdesiredContainer.ImagePullPolicy != fetchedContainer.ImagePullPolicy {\n326\t\t\treturn true\n327\t\t}\n328\t\n329\t\tif len(desiredContainer.Ports) != len(fetchedContainer.Ports) {\n330\t\t\treturn true\n331\t\t}\n332\t\tfor _, fetchedPort := range fetchedContainer.Ports {\n333\t\t\tmatched := false\n334\t\t\tfor _, desiredPort := range desiredContainer.Ports {\n335\t\t\t\tif fetchedPort.ContainerPort == desiredPort.ContainerPort {\n336\t\t\t\t\tmatched = true\n337\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n338\t\t\t\t}\n339\t\t\t}\n340\t\t\tif !matched {\n341\t\t\t\treturn true\n342\t\t\t}\n343\t\t}\n344\t\n345\t\tif desiredContainer.ReadinessProbe.HTTPGet.Path != fetchedContainer.ReadinessProbe.HTTPGet.Path ||\n346\t\t\tdesiredContainer.ReadinessProbe.InitialDelaySeconds != fetchedContainer.ReadinessProbe.InitialDelaySeconds ||\n347\t\t\tdesiredContainer.ReadinessProbe.PeriodSeconds != fetchedContainer.ReadinessProbe.PeriodSeconds {\n348\t\t\treturn true\n349\t\t}\n350\t\n351\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(desiredContainer.Resources, fetchedContainer.Resources) ||\n352\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(*desiredContainer.SecurityContext, *fetchedContainer.SecurityContext) ||\n353\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredContainer.VolumeMounts, fetchedContainer.VolumeMounts) {\n354\t\t\treturn true\n355\t\t}\n356\t\n357\t\tif desired.Spec.Template.Spec.ServiceAccountName != fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.ServiceAccountName ||\n358\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector, fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector) ||\n359\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes, fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes) {\n360\t\t\treturn true\n361\t\t}\n362\t\n363\t\treturn false\n364\t}\n365\t\n366\tfunc serviceSpecModified(desired, fetched *corev1.Service) bool {\n367\t\tif desired.Spec.Type != fetched.Spec.Type ||\n368\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Ports, fetched.Spec.Ports) ||\n369\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Selector, fetched.Spec.Selector) {\n370\t\t\treturn true\n371\t\t}\n372\t\n373\t\treturn false\n374\t}\n375\t\n376\tfunc rbacRoleRulesModified[Object *rbacv1.Role | *rbacv1.ClusterRole](desired, fetched Object) bool {\n377\t\tswitch typ := any(desired).(type) {\n378\t\tcase *rbacv1.ClusterRole:\n379\t\t\tdesiredClusterRole, ok := any(desired).(*rbacv1.ClusterRole)\n380\t\t\tif !ok {\n381\t\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert desired to *rbacv1.ClusterRole\")\n382\t\t\t}\n383\t\t\tfetchedClusterRole, ok := any(fetched).(*rbacv1.ClusterRole)\n384\t\t\tif !ok {\n385\t\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert fetched to *rbacv1.ClusterRole\")\n386\t\t\t}\n387\t\t\treturn !reflect.DeepEqual(desiredClusterRole.Rules, fetchedClusterRole.Rules)\n388\t\tcase *rbacv1.Role:\n389\t\t\tdesiredRole, ok := any(desired).(*rbacv1.Role)\n390\t\t\tif !ok {\n391\t\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert desired to *rbacv1.Role\")\n392\t\t\t}\n393\t\t\tfetchedRole, ok := any(fetched).(*rbacv1.Role)\n394\t\t\tif !ok {\n395\t\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert fetched to *rbacv1.Role\")\n396\t\t\t}\n397\t\t\treturn !reflect.DeepEqual(desiredRole.Rules, fetchedRole.Rules)\n398\t\tdefault:\n399\t\t\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\"unsupported object type %v\", typ))\n400\t\t}\n401\t}\n402\t\n403\tfunc rbacRoleBindingRefModified[Object *rbacv1.RoleBinding | !reflect.DeepEqual(desiredClusterRoleBinding.RoleRef, fetchedClusterRoleBinding.RoleRef)\n415\t\tcase *rbacv1.RoleBinding:\n416\t\t\tdesiredRoleBinding, ok := any(desired).(*rbacv1.RoleBinding)\n417\t\t\tif !ok {\n418\t\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert desired to *rbacv1.RoleBinding\")\n419\t\t\t}\n420\t\t\tfetchedRoleBinding, ok := rbacRoleBindingSubjectsModified[Object *rbacv1.RoleBinding | *rbacv1.ClusterRoleBinding](desired, fetched Object) bool {\n431\t\tswitch typ := any(desired).(type) {\n432\t\tcase *rbacv1.ClusterRoleBinding:\n433\t\t\tdesiredClusterRoleBinding, ok := any(desired).(*rbacv1.ClusterRoleBinding)\n434\t\t\tif !ok {\n435\t\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert desired to *rbacv1.ClusterRoleBinding\")\n440\t\t\t}\n441\t\t\treturn !reflect.DeepEqual(desiredClusterRoleBinding.Subjects, fetchedClusterRoleBinding.Subjects)\n442\t\tcase *rbacv1.RoleBinding:\n443\t\t\tdesiredRoleBinding, ok := any(desired).(*rbacv1.RoleBinding)\n444\t\t\tif !ok {\n445\t\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert desired to *rbacv1.RoleBinding\")\n446\t\t\t}\n447\t\t\tfetchedRoleBinding, ok := any(fetched).(*rbacv1.RoleBinding)\n448\t\t\tif !ok {\n449\t\t\t\tpanic(\"failed to convert fetched to *rbacv1.RoleBinding\")\n450\t\t\t}\n451\t\t\treturn !reflect.DeepEqual(desiredRoleBinding.Subjects, fetchedRoleBinding.Subjects)\n452\t\tdefault:\n453\t\t\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\"unsupported object type %v\", typ))\n454\t\t}\n455\t}\n456\t\n457\tfunc configMapDataModified(desired, fetched *corev1.ConfigMap) bool {\n458\t\treturn !reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Data, fetched.Data)\n459\t}\n460\t\n461\tfunc networkPolicySpecModified(desired, fetched *networkingv1.NetworkPolicy) bool {\n462\t\treturn !reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec, fetched.Spec)\n463\t}\n464\t\n465\tfunc validateIstioCSRConfig(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n466\t\tif reflect.ValueOf(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig).IsZero() {\n467\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"spec.istioCSRConfig config cannot be empty\")\n468\t\t}\n469\t\tif reflect.ValueOf(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.IstiodTLSConfig).IsZero() {\n470\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"spec.istioCSRConfig.istiodTLSConfig config cannot be empty\")\n471\t\t}\n472\t\tif reflect.ValueOf(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Istio).IsZero() {\n473\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"spec.istioCSRConfig.istio config cannot be empty\")\n474\t\t}\n475\t\tif reflect.ValueOf(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager).IsZero() {\n476\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager config cannot be empty\")\n477\t\t}\n478\t\treturn nil\n479\t}\n480\t\n481\tfunc (r *Reconciler) updateCondition(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, prependErr error) error {\n482\t\tif err := r.updateStatus(r.ctx, istiocsr); err != nil {\n483\t\t\terrUpdate := fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update %s/%s status: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n484\t\t\tif prependErr != nil {\n485\t\t\t\treturn utilerrors.NewAggregate([]error{err, errUpdate})\n486\t\t\t}\n487\t\t\treturn errUpdate\n488\t\t}\n489\t\treturn prependErr\n490\t}\n491\t\n492\tfunc (r *Reconciler) disallowMultipleIstioCSRInstances(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n493\t\tstatusMessage := fmt.Sprintf(\"multiple instances of istiocsr exists, %s/%s will not be processed\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n494\t\n495\t\tif containsProcessingRejectedAnnotation(istiocsr) {\n496\t\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"%s/%s istiocsr resource contains processing rejected annotation\", istiocsr.Namespace, istiocsr.Name)\n497\t\t\t// ensure status is updated.\n498\t\t\tvar updateErr error\n499\t\t\tif istiocsr.Status.SetCondition(v1alpha1.Ready, metav1.ConditionFalse, v1alpha1.ReasonFailed, statusMessage) {\n500\t\t\t\tupdateErr = r.updateCondition(istiocsr, nil)\n501\t\t\t}\n502\t\t\treturn common.NewMultipleInstanceError(utilerrors.NewAggregate([]error{errors.New(statusMessage), updateErr}))\n503\t\t}\n504\t\n505\t\tistiocsrList := &v1alpha1.IstioCSRList{}\n506\t\tif err := r.List(r.ctx, istiocsrList); err != nil {\n507\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch list of istiocsr resources: %w\", err)\n508\t\t}\n509\t\n510\t\tif len(istiocsrList.Items) <= 1 {\n511\t\t\treturn nil\n512\t\t}\n513\t\n514\t\tignoreProcessing := false\n515\t\tfor _, item := range istiocsrList.Items {\n516\t\t\tif item.GetNamespace() == istiocsr.Namespace {\n517\t\t\t\tcontinue\n518\t\t\t}\n519\t\t\tif item.CreationTimestamp.Time.Before(istiocsr.CreationTimestamp.Time) ||\n520\t\t\t\t// Even when timestamps are equal will skip processing. And if this ends\n521\t\t\t\t// up in ignoring all istiocsr instances, which means user must have created\n522\t\t\t\t// all in parallel, onus is on user to delete all and recreate just one required\n523\t\t\t\t// instance of istiocsr.\n524\t\t\t\titem.CreationTimestamp.Time.Equal(istiocsr.CreationTimestamp.Time) {\n525\t\t\t\tignoreProcessing = true\n526\t\t\t}\n527\t\t}\n528\t\n529\t\tif !ignoreProcessing {\n530\t\t\t// This is the oldest instance, allow it to proceed\n531\t\t\treturn nil\n532\t\t}\n533\t\n534\t\t// This instance should be rejected as there's an older or equally old instance\n535\t\tvar condUpdateErr, annUpdateErr error\n536\t\tif istiocsr.Status.SetCondition(v1alpha1.Ready, metav1.ConditionFalse, v1alpha1.ReasonFailed, statusMessage) {\n537\t\t\tcondUpdateErr = r.updateCondition(istiocsr, nil)\n538\t\t}\n539\t\tif addProcessingRejectedAnnotation(istiocsr) {\n540\t\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, istiocsr); err != nil {\n541\t\t\t\tannUpdateErr = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update reject processing annotation to %s/%s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n542\t\t\t}\n543\t\t}\n544\t\tif condUpdateErr != nil || annUpdateErr != nil {\n545\t\t\treturn utilerrors.NewAggregate([]error{condUpdateErr, annUpdateErr})\n546\t\t}\n547\t\n548\t\treturn common.NewMultipleInstanceError(errors.New(statusMessage))\n549\t}\n550\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"40f75bc1-181a-4148-8afe-533f8e2603b5","uuid":"255d31fb-427f-4ed9-abd3-26c0b015dd03","timestamp":"2026-07-20T13:28:54.282Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/kpais/kpais-workspace/a_b_evals/repos/cert-manager-operator-treatment/pkg/controller/istiocsr/utils.go","content":"package istiocsr\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"maps\"\n\t\"reflect\"\n\n\tappsv1 \"k8s.io/api/apps/v1\"\n\tcorev1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\tnetworkingv1 \"k8s.io/api/networking/v1\"\n\trbacv1 \"k8s.io/api/rbac/v1\"\n\tmetav1 \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/serializer\"\n\tutilerrors fetchedContainer.Image ||\n\t\tdesiredContainer.ImagePullPolicy != fetchedContainer.ImagePullPolicy {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif len(desiredContainer.Ports) != len(fetchedContainer.Ports)
