reflect.ValueOf(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.IstiodTLSConfig).IsZero() {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"spec.istioCSRConfig.istiodTLSConfig config cannot be empty\")\n\t}\n\tif reflect.ValueOf(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Istio).IsZero() {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"spec.istioCSRConfig.istio config cannot be empty\")\n\t}\n\tif reflect.ValueOf(istiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager).IsZero() {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"spec.istioCSRConfig.certManager config cannot be empty\")\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) updateCondition(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, prependErr error) error {\n\tif err := r.updateStatus(r.ctx, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\terrUpdate := fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update %s/%s status: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n\t\tif prependErr != nil {\n\t\t\treturn utilerrors.NewAggregate([]error{err, errUpdate})\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn errUpdate\n\t}\n\treturn prependErr\n}\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) disallowMultipleIstioCSRInstances(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) error {\n\tstatusMessage := fmt.Sprintf(\"multiple instances of istiocsr exists, %s/%s will not be processed\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())\n\n\tif containsProcessingRejectedAnnotation(istiocsr) {\n\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"%s/%s istiocsr resource contains processing rejected annotation\", istiocsr.Namespace, istiocsr.Name)\n\t\t// ensure status is updated.\n\t\tvar updateErr error\n\t\tif istiocsr.Status.SetCondition(v1alpha1.Ready, metav1.ConditionFalse, v1alpha1.ReasonFailed, statusMessage) {\n\t\t\tupdateErr = r.updateCondition(istiocsr, nil)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn common.NewMultipleInstanceError(utilerrors.NewAggregate([]error{errors.New(statusMessage), updateErr}))\n\t}\n\n\tistiocsrList := &v1alpha1.IstioCSRList{}\n\tif err := r.List(r.ctx, istiocsrList); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch list of istiocsr resources: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(istiocsrList.Items) <= 1 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tignoreProcessing := false\n\tfor _, item := range istiocsrList.Items {\n\t\tif item.GetNamespace() == istiocsr.Namespace {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif item.CreationTimestamp.Time.Before(istiocsr.CreationTimestamp.Time) ||\n\t\t\t// Even when timestamps are equal will skip processing. And if this ends\n\t\t\t// up in ignoring all istiocsr instances, which means user must have created\n\t\t\t// all in parallel, onus is on user to delete all and recreate just one required\n\t\t\t// instance of istiocsr.\n\t\t\titem.CreationTimestamp.Time.Equal(istiocsr.CreationTimestamp.Time) {\n\t\t\tignoreProcessing = true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif !ignoreProcessing {\n\t\t// This is the oldest instance, allow it to proceed\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// This instance should be rejected as there's an older or equally old instance\n\tvar condUpdateErr, annUpdateErr error\n\tif istiocsr.Status.SetCondition(v1alpha1.Ready, metav1.ConditionFalse, v1alpha1.ReasonFailed, statusMessage) {\n\t\tcondUpdateErr = r.updateCondition(istiocsr, nil)\n\t}\n\tif addProcessingRejectedAnnotation(istiocsr) {\n\t\tif err := r.UpdateWithRetry(r.ctx, istiocsr); err != nil {\n\t\t\tannUpdateErr = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to update reject processing annotation to %s/%s: %w\", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif condUpdateErr != nil || annUpdateErr != nil {\n\t\treturn utilerrors.NewAggregate([]error{condUpdateErr, annUpdateErr})\n\t}\n\n\treturn common.NewMultipleInstanceError(errors.New(statusMessage))\n}\n","numLines":550,"startLine":1,"totalLines":550}}}

testCACertificateConfigMap() *corev1.ConfigMap {\n262\t\tcaPEM := GenerateCertificate(\"Test CA\", []string{\"cert-manager-operator\"},\n263\t\t\tfunc(cert *x509.Certificate) {\n264\t\t\t\tcert.IsCA = true\n265\t\t\t\tcert.KeyUsage |= x509.KeyUsageCertSign\n266\t\t\t},\n267\t\t)\n268\t\treturn createCertificateConfigMap(\"ca-cert-test\", testIstioCSRNamespace, caPEM)\n269\t}\n270\t\n271\t// testNonCACertificateConfigMap creates a ConfigMap with a non-CA certificate.\n272\tfunc testNonCACertificateConfigMap() *corev1.ConfigMap {\n273\t\tcertPEM := GenerateCertificate(\"Test non-CA\", []string{\"cert-manager-operator\"},\n274\t\t\tfunc(cert *x509.Certificate) {\n275\t\t\t\tcert.IsCA = false\n276\t\t\t},\n277\t\t)\n278\t\treturn createCertificateConfigMap(\"non-ca-cert-test\", testIstioCSRNamespace, certPEM)\n279\t}\n280\t\n281\t// testCertificateWithoutCertSignConfigMap creates a ConfigMap with a CA certificate missing CertSign.\n282\tfunc testCertificateWithoutCertSignConfigMap() *corev1.ConfigMap {\n283\t\tcertPEM := GenerateCertificate(\"Test CA without CertSign\", []string{\"cert-manager-operator\"},\n284\t\t\tfunc(cert *x509.Certificate) {\n285\t\t\t\tcert.IsCA = true\n286\t\t\t},\n287\t\t)\n288\t\treturn createCertificateConfigMap(\"ca-without-certsign-test\", testIstioCSRNamespace, certPEM)\n289\t}\n290\t\n291\t// GenerateCertificate creates a certificate with specified tweaks.\n292\tfunc GenerateCertificate(commonName string, organization []string, tweak CertificateTweak) string {\n293\t\t// Generate RSA private key\n294\t\tprivateKey, err := rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)\n295\t\tif err != nil {\n296\t\t\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to generate private key: %v\", err))\n297\t\t}\n298\t\n299\t\ttemplate := &x509.Certificate{\n300\t\t\tSubject: pkix.Name{\n301\t\t\t\tCommonName:   commonName,\n302\t\t\t\tOrganization: organization,\n303\t\t\t},\n304\t\t\tNotBefore:             time.Now(),\n305\t\t\tNotAfter:              time.Now().Add(24 * time.Hour),\n306\t\t\tKeyUsage:              x509.KeyUsageKeyEncipherment | x509.KeyUsageDigitalSignature,\n307\t\t\tExtKeyUsage:           []x509.ExtKeyUsage{x509.ExtKeyUsageServerAuth},\n308\t\t\tBasicConstraintsValid: true,\n309\t\t\tIsCA:                  false,\n310\t\t}\n311\t\n312\t\t// Apply tweaks to modify the template\n313\t\ttweak(template)\n314\t\n315\t\tcertDER, err := x509.CreateCertificate(rand.Reader, template, template, &privateKey.PublicKey, privateKey)\n316\t\tif err != nil {\n317\t\t\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to create certificate: %v\", err))\n318\t\t}\n319\t\n320\t\t// Encode certificate to PEM format\n321\t\tcertPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{\n322\t\t\tType:  \"CERTIFICATE\",\n323\t\t\tBytes: certDER,\n324\t\t})\n325\t\n326\t\treturn string(certPEM)\n327\t}\n328\t\n329\tfunc createCertificateConfigMap(name string, namespace string, pemData string) *corev1.ConfigMap {\n330\t\treturn &corev1.ConfigMap{\n331\t\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n332\t\t\t\tName:      name,\n333\t\t\t\tNamespace: namespace,\n334\t\t\t},\n335\t\t\tData: map[string]string{\n336\t\t\t\t\"ca-cert.pem\": pemData,\n337\t\t\t},\n338\t\t}\n339\t}\n340\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"40f75bc1-181a-4148-8afe-533f8e2603b5","uuid":"5ab03ac5-e876-4491-b891-039063826625","timestamp":"2026-07-20T13:28:54.730Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/kpais/kpais-workspace/a_b_evals/repos/cert-manager-operator-treatment/pkg/controller/istiocsr/test_utils.go","content":"package &certmanagerv1.CAIssuer{\n\t\t\t\t\tSecretName: testResourcesName,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc testClusterIssuer() *certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer {\n\treturn &certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer{\n\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\tName: testResourcesName,\n\t\t},\n\t\tSpec: certmanagerv1.IssuerSpec{\n\t\t\tIssuerConfig: certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig{\n\t\t\t\tCA: &certmanagerv1.CAIssuer{\n\t\t\t\t\tSecretName: testResourcesName,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc testACMEIssuer() *certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer {\n\treturn &certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer{\n\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\tName: testResourcesName,\n\t\t},\n\t\tSpec: certmanagerv1.IssuerSpec{\n\t\t\tIssuerConfig: certmanagerv1.IssuerConfig{\n\t\t\t\tACME: &cmacme.ACMEIssuer{\n\t\t\t\t\tEmail: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc testCertificate() *certmanagerv1.Certificate {\n\tcert := decodeCertificateObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(certificateAssetName))\n\tcert.SetNamespace(testIstiodNamespace)\n\tlabels := make(map[string]string)\n\tmaps.Copy(labels, controllerDefaultResourceLabels)\n\tlabels[istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName] = testIstioCSRNamespace\n\tcert.SetLabels(labels)\n\tcert.Spec.CommonName = fmt.Sprintf(\"istiod.%s.svc\", testIstiodNamespace)\n\tcert.Spec.DNSNames = []string{fmt.Sprintf(\"istiod.%s.svc\", testIstiodNamespace)}\n\tcert.Spec.URIs = []string{\n\t\tfmt.Sprintf(istiodCertificateSpiffeURIFmt, \"cluster.local\", testIstiodNamespace),\n\t}\n\tcert.Spec.IssuerRef.Name = testResourcesName\n\treturn cert\n}\n\nfunc testClusterRole() *rbacv1.ClusterRole {\n\trole := decodeClusterRoleObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(clusterRoleAssetName))\n\trole.SetName(\"cert-manager-istio-csr-sdghj\")\n\trole.SetLabels(controllerDefaultResourceLabels)\n\treturn role\n}\n\nfunc testClusterRoleBinding() *rbacv1.ClusterRoleBinding {\n\troleBinding := decodeClusterRoleBindingObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(clusterRoleBindingAssetName))\n\troleBinding.SetName(\"cert-manager-istio-csr-dfkhk\")\n\troleBinding.SetGenerateName(\"cert-manager-istio-csr-\")\n\troleBinding.SetLabels(controllerDefaultResourceLabels)\n\treturn roleBinding\n}\n\nfunc testClusterRoleBindingExtra() *rbacv1.ClusterRoleBinding {\n\troleBinding := decodeClusterRoleBindingObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(clusterRoleBindingAssetName))\n\troleBinding.SetName(\"cert-manager-istio-csr-dfmfj\")\n\troleBinding.SetGenerateName(\"cert-manager-istio-csr-\")\n\troleBinding.SetLabels(controllerDefaultResourceLabels)\n\treturn roleBinding\n}\n\nfunc testDeployment() *appsv1.Deployment {\n\tdeployment := decodeDeploymentObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(deploymentAssetName))\n\tdeployment.SetNamespace(testIstioCSRNamespace)\n\tdeployment.SetLabels(controllerDefaultResourceLabels)\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Labels = controllerDefaultResourceLabels\n\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[0].Image = image\n\treturn deployment\n}\n\nfunc testRole() *rbacv1.Role {\n\trole := decodeRoleObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(roleAssetName))\n\trole.SetNamespace(testIstiodNamespace)\n\trole.SetLabels(controllerDefaultResourceLabels)\n\treturn role\n}\n\nfunc testRoleBinding() *rbacv1.RoleBinding {\n\troleBinding := decodeRoleBindingObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(roleBindingAssetName))\n\troleBinding.SetNamespace(testIstiodNamespace)\n\troleBinding.SetLabels(controllerDefaultResourceLabels)\n\treturn roleBinding\n}\n\nfunc testRoleLeases() *rbacv1.Role {\n\trole := decodeRoleObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(roleLeasesAssetName))\n\trole.SetNamespace(testIstiodNamespace)\n\trole.SetLabels(controllerDefaultResourceLabels)\n\treturn role\n}\n\nfunc testRoleBindingLeases() *rbacv1.RoleBinding {\n\troleBinding := decodeRoleBindingObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(roleBindingLeasesAssetName))\n\troleBinding.SetNamespace(testIstiodNamespace)\n\troleBinding.SetLabels(controllerDefaultResourceLabels)\n\treturn roleBinding\n}\n\nfunc testService() *corev1.Service {\n\tservice := decodeServiceObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(serviceAssetName))\n\tservice.SetNamespace(testIstioCSRNamespace)\n\tservice.SetLabels(controllerDefaultResourceLabels)\n\treturn service\n}\n\nfunc testServiceAccount() *corev1.ServiceAccount {\n\tserviceAccount := decodeServiceAccountObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(serviceAccountAssetName))\n\tserviceAccount.SetNamespace(testIstioCSRNamespace)\n\tserviceAccount.SetLabels(controllerDefaultResourceLabels)\n\treturn serviceAccount\n}\n\nfunc testConfigMap() *corev1.ConfigMap {\n\treturn &corev1.ConfigMap{\n\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\tName:      testResourcesName,\n\t\t\tNamespace: testIstioCSRNamespace,\n\t\t},\n\t\tData: map[string]string{\n\t\t\tIstiocsrCAKeyName: \"testCAData\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc testSecret() *corev1.Secret {\n\tcaPEM := GenerateCertificate(\"Test CA\", []string{\"cert-manager-operator\"},\n\t\tfunc(cert *x509.Certificate) {\n\t\t\tcert.IsCA = true\n\t\t\tcert.KeyUsage |= x509.KeyUsageCertSign\n\t\t},\n\t)\n\treturn &corev1.Secret{\n\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\tName:      testResourcesName,\n\t\t\tNamespace: testIstiodNamespace,\n\t\t},\n\t\tData: map[string][]byte{\n\t\t\tIstiocsrCAKeyName: []byte(caPEM),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\n// testCACertificateConfigMap creates a ConfigMap with a CA certificate.\nfunc testCACertificateConfigMap() *corev1.ConfigMap {\n\tcaPEM := GenerateCertificate(\"Test CA\", []string{\"cert-manager-operator\"},\n\t\tfunc(cert *x509.Certificate) {\n\t\t\tcert.IsCA = true\n\t\t\tcert.KeyUsage |= x509.KeyUsageCertSign\n\t\t},\n\t)\n\treturn createCertificateConfigMap(\"ca-cert-test\", testIstioCSRNamespace, caPEM)\n}\n\n// testNonCACertificateConfigMap creates a ConfigMap with a non-CA certificate.\nfunc testNonCACertificateConfigMap() *corev1.ConfigMap {\n\tcertPEM := GenerateCertificate(\"Test non-CA\", []string{\"cert-manager-operator\"},\n\t\tfunc(cert *x509.Certificate) {\n\t\t\tcert.IsCA = false\n\t\t},\n\t)\n\treturn createCertificateConfigMap(\"non-ca-cert-test\", testIstioCSRNamespace, certPEM)\n}\n\n// testCertificateWithoutCertSignConfigMap creates a ConfigMap with a CA certificate missing CertSign.\nfunc testCertificateWithoutCertSignConfigMap() *corev1.ConfigMap {\n\tcertPEM := GenerateCertificate(\"Test CA without CertSign\", []string{\"cert-manager-operator\"},\n\t\tfunc(cert *x509.Certificate) {\n\t\t\tcert.IsCA = true\n\t\t},\n\t)\n\treturn createCertificateConfigMap(\"ca-without-certsign-test\", testIstioCSRNamespace, certPEM)\n}\n\n// GenerateCertificate creates a certificate with specified tweaks.\nfunc GenerateCertificate(commonName string, organization []string, tweak CertificateTweak) string {\n\t// Generate RSA private key\n\tprivateKey, err := rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to generate private key: %v\", err))\n\t}\n\n\ttemplate := &x509.Certificate{\n\t\tSubject: pkix.Name{\n\t\t\tCommonName:   commonName,\n\t\t\tOrganization: organization,\n\t\t},\n\t\tNotBefore:             time.Now(),\n\t\tNotAfter:              time.Now().Add(24 * time.Hour),\n\t\tKeyUsage:              x509.KeyUsageKeyEncipherment | x509.KeyUsageDigitalSignature,\n\t\tExtKeyUsage:           []x509.ExtKeyUsage{x509.ExtKeyUsageServerAuth},\n\t\tBasicConstraintsValid: true,\n\t\tIsCA:                  false,\n\t}\n\n\t// Apply tweaks to modify the template\n\ttweak(template)\n\n\tcertDER, err := x509.CreateCertificate(rand.Reader, template, template, &privateKey.PublicKey, privateKey)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to create certificate: %v\", err))\n\t}\n\n\t// Encode certificate to PEM format\n\tcertPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{\n\t\tType:  \"CERTIFICATE\",\n\t\tBytes: certDER,\n\t})\n\n\treturn string(certPEM)\n}\n\nfunc createCertificateConfigMap(name string, namespace string, pemData string) *corev1.ConfigMap {\n\treturn &corev1.ConfigMap{\n\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\tName:      name,\n\t\t\tNamespace: namespace,\n\t\t},\n\t\tData: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"ca-cert.pem\": pemData,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n","numLines":340,"startLine":1,"totalLines":340}}}

in custom namespace\",\n830\t\t\t\tpreReq: func(r *Reconciler, m *fakes.FakeCtrlClient) {\n831\t\t\t\t\tm.ExistsCalls(func(ctx context.Context, ns types.NamespacedName, obj client.Object) (bool, error) {\n832\t\t\t\t\t\tswitch o := obj.(type) {\n833\t\t\t\t\t\tcase *appsv1.Deployment:\n834\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment := testDeployment()\n835\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.DeepCopyInto(o)\n836\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n837\t\t\t\t\t\treturn true, nil\n838\t\t\t\t\t})\n839\t\t\t\t\tm.GetCalls(func(ctx context.Context, ns types.NamespacedName, obj client.Object) error {\n840\t\t\t\t\t\tswitch o := obj.(type) {\n841\t\t\t\t\t\tcase *corev1.ConfigMap:\n842\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif ns.Name == \"ca-cert-test\" && ns.Namespace == \"custom-namespace\"\n845\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconfigMap.DeepCopyInto(o)\n846\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n847\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n848\t\t\t\t\t\treturn nil\n849\t\t\t\t\t})\n850\t\t\t\t\tm.UpdateWithRetryReturns(nil)\n851\t\t\t\t},\n852\t\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(i *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n853\t\t\t\t\ti.Status.IstioCSRImage = \"custom-namespace\",\n857\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:       \"ca-cert.pem\",\n858\t\t\t\t\t}\n859\t\t\t\t},\n860\t\t\t},\n861\t\t\t{\n862\t\t\t\tname: \"deployment reconciliation fails with missing CA ConfigMap istiocsr-test-ns/ca-cert-test`,\n923\t\t\t},\n924\t\t\t{\n925\t\t\t\tname: \"deployment reconciliation fails with invalid PEM data in CA certificate ConfigMap\",\n926\t\t\t\tpreReq: func(r copied ConfigMap to simulate creation\n968\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn false, nil\n969\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n970\t\t\t\t\t\treturn true, nil\n971\t\t\t\t\t})\n972\t\t\t\t\tm.GetCalls(func(ctx context.Context, ns source ConfigMap with watch label\n987\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif obj.GetName() == \"watch-label-fail-test\" {\n988\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn apierrors.NewUnauthorized(\"no access to update watch certificate is not a CA certificate`,\n1035\t\t\t},\n1036\t\n1037\t\t\t{\n1038\t\t\t\tname: \"deployment reconciliation fails with certificate missing KeyUsageCertSign in image\n1061\t\t\t\t\ti.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate = &v1alpha1.ConfigMapReference{\n1062\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"ca-without-certsign-test\",\n1063\t\t\t\t\t\tKey: istiocsr-test-ns/istiocsr-test-resource: failed to validate and mount CA certificate ConfigMap: invalid PEM data in CA certificate ConfigMap istiocsr-test-ns/ca-without-certsign-test key \"ca-cert.pem\": certificate does not have Certificate Sign key usage`,\n1067\t\t\t},\n1068\t\t}\n1069\t\n1070\t\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n1071\t\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n1072\t\t\t\tr := testReconciler(t)\n1073\t\t\t\tmock := &fakes.FakeCtrlClient{}\n1074\t\t\t\tif tt.preReq != nil {\n1075\t\t\t\t\ttt.preReq(r, mock)\n1076\t\t\t\t}\n1077\t\t\t\tr.CtrlClient = mock\n1078\t\t\t\tistiocsr := testIstioCSR()\n1079\t\t\t\tif tt.updateIstioCSR != nil {\n1080\t\t\t\t\ttt.updateIstioCSR(istiocsr)\n1081\t\t\t\t}\n1082\t\t\t\tif !tt.skipEnvVar {\n1083\t\t\t\t\tt.Setenv(\"RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_ISTIOCSR\", image)\n1084\t\t\t\t}\n1085\t\t\t\terr := r.createOrApplyDeployments(istiocsr, controllerDefaultResourceLabels, false)\n1086\t\t\t\tif tt.wantErrSubstring {\n1087\t\t\t\t\tif err == nil || !strings.Contains(err.Error(), tt.wantErr) {\n1088\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"createOrApplyDeployments() err: %v, want substring: %q\", err, tt.wantErr)\n1089\t\t\t\t\t}\n1090\t\t\t\t} else if (tt.wantErr != \"\" || err != nil) && (err == nil || err.Error() != tt.wantErr) {\n1091\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"createOrApplyDeployments() err: %v, wantErr: %v\", err, tt.wantErr)\n1092\t\t\t\t}\n1093\t\t\t\tif tt.wantErr == \"\" {\n1094\t\t\t\t\tif istiocsr.Status.IstioCSRImage != image {\n1095\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"createOrApplyDeployments() got: %v, want: %v\", istiocsr.Status.IstioCSRImage, image)\n1096\t\t\t\t\t}\n1097\t\t\t\t}\n1098\t\t\t})\n1099\t\t}\n1100\t}\n1101\t\n1102\tfunc TestUpdateArgList(t *testing.T) {\n1103\t\ttests := []struct {\n1104\t\t\tname            string\n1105\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR  func(*v1alpha1.IstioCSR)\n1106\t\t\texpectedArgs    map[string]string // key is arg name (without --), value is expected value\n1107\t\t\tnotExpectedArgs []string          // arg names (without --) that should NOT be present\n1108\t\t}{\n1109\t\t\t{\n1110\t\t\t\tname: \"clusterID not provided should default to Kubernetes\",\n1111\t\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n1112\t\t\t\t\t// Server config is nil, so clusterID should default\n1113\t\t\t\t},\n1114\t\t\t\texpectedArgs: map[string]string{\n1115\t\t\t\t\t\"cluster-id\": defaultClusterID,\n1116\t\t\t\t},\n1117\t\t\t},\n1118\t\t\t{\n1119\t\t\t\tname: \"clusterID empty string should default to Kubernetes\",\n1120\t\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n1121\t\t\t\t\tistiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Server = &v1alpha1.ServerConfig{\n1122\t\t\t\t\t\tClusterID: \"\",\n1123\t\t\t\t\t}\n1124\t\t\t\t},\n1125\t\t\t\texpectedArgs: map[string]string{\n1126\t\t\t\t\t\"cluster-id\": defaultClusterID,\n1127\t\t\t\t},\n1128\t\t\t},\n1129\t\t\t{\n1130\t\t\t\tname: \"clusterID provided should use custom value\",\n1131\t\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n1132\t\t\t\t\tistiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Server = &v1alpha1.ServerConfig{\n1133\t\t\t\t\t\tClusterID: \"cluster-123_dev.local\",\n1134\t\t\t\t\t}\n1135\t\t\t\t},\n1136\t\t\t\texpectedArgs: map[string]string{\n1137\t\t\t\t\t\"cluster-id\": \"cluster-123_dev.local\",\n1138\t\t\t\t},\n1139\t\t\t},\n1140\t\t\t{\n1141\t\t\t\tname: \"istioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector not provided should not include argument\",\n1142\t\t\t\tnotExpectedArgs: []string{\n1143\t\t\t\t\t\"configmap-namespace-selector\",\n1144\t\t\t\t},\n1145\t\t\t},\n1146\t\t\t{\n1147\t\t\t\tname: \"istioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector provided should include argument\",\n1148\t\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n1149\t\t\t\t\tistiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.IstioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector = \"cert-manager.io/test-ca-injection=enabled\"\n1150\t\t\t\t},\n1151\t\t\t\texpectedArgs: map[string]string{\n1152\t\t\t\t\t\"configmap-namespace-selector\": \"cert-manager.io/test-ca-injection=enabled\",\n1153\t\t\t\t},\n1154\t\t\t},\n1155\t\t}\n1156\t\n1157\t\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n1158\t\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n1159\t\t\t\tdeployment := testDeployment()\n1160\t\t\t\tistiocsr := testIstioCSR()\n1161\t\t\t\tif tt.updateIstioCSR != nil {\n1162\t\t\t\t\ttt.updateIstioCSR(istiocsr)\n1163\t\t\t\t}\n1164\t\n1165\t\t\t\tupdateArgList(deployment, istiocsr)\n1166\t\n1167\t\t\t\t// Find the istio-csr container and check its arguments\n1168\t\t\t\tvar containerArgs []string\n1169\t\t\t\tfor _, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n1170\t\t\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n1171\t\t\t\t\t\tcontainerArgs = container.Args\n1172\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n1173\t\t\t\t\t}\n1174\t\t\t\t}\n1175\t\n1176\t\t\t\tif len(containerArgs) == 0 {\n1177\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Expected container args to be set, but got empty args\")\n1178\t\t\t\t}\n1179\t\n1180\t\t\t\t// Verify each expected argument\n1181\t\t\t\tfor argName, expectedValue := range tt.expectedArgs {\n1182\t\t\t\t\texpectedArg := fmt.Sprintf(\"--%s=%s\", argName, expectedValue)\n1183\t\t\t\t\tif !containsArg(containerArgs, expectedArg) {\n1184\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected to find argument %q in container args, but it was not found. Args: %v\", expectedArg, containerArgs)\n1185\t\t\t\t\t}\n1186\t\t\t\t}\n1187\t\n1188\t\t\t\t// Verify arguments that should NOT be present\n1189\t\t\t\tfor _, argName := range tt.notExpectedArgs {\n1190\t\t\t\t\tfor _, arg := range containerArgs {\n1191\t\t\t\t\t\tif strings.HasPrefix(arg, fmt.Sprintf(\"--%s=\", argName)) {\n1192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected NOT to find argument %q in container args. Args: %v\", arg, containerArgs)\n1193\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n1194\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n1195\t\t\t\t\t}\n1196\t\t\t\t}\n1197\t\t\t})\n1198\t\t}\n1199\t}\n1200\t\n1201\t// containsArg checks if the given argument is present in the args list.\n1202\tfunc containsArg(args []string, targetArg string) bool {\n1203\t\treturn slices.Contains(args, targetArg)\n1204\t}\n1205\t\n1206\tfunc TestUpdateVolumeWithIssuerCA(t *testing.T) {\n1207\t\tdefaultMode := int32(420)\n1208\t\texpectedCAVolume := corev1.Volume{\n1209\t\t\tName: \"root-ca\",\n1210\t\t\tVolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{\n1211\t\t\t\tConfigMap: &corev1.ConfigMapVolumeSource{\n1212\t\t\t\t\tLocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{\n1213\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"cert-manager-istio-csr-issuer-ca-copy\",\n1214\t\t\t\t\t},\n1215\t\t\t\t\tItems: []corev1.KeyToPath{\n1216\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n1217\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:  \"ca.crt\",\n1218\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPath: \"ca.crt\",\n1219\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: &defaultMode,\n1220\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n1221\t\t\t\t\t},\n1222\t\t\t\t\tDefaultMode: &defaultMode,\n1223\t\t\t\t},\n1224\t\t\t},\n1225\t\t}\n1226\t\texpectedCAMount := corev1.VolumeMount{\n1227\t\t\tName:      \"root-ca\",\n1228\t\t\tMountPath: \"/var/run/configmaps/istio-csr\",\n1229\t\t\tReadOnly:  true,\n1230\t\t}\n1231\t\n1232\t\ttests := []struct {\n1233\t\t\tname                 string\n1234\t\t\texistingVolumes      []corev1.Volume\n1235\t\t\texistingVolumeMounts []corev1.VolumeMount\n1236\t\t\texpectedVolumes      []corev1.Volume\n1237\t\t\texpectedMounts       []corev1.VolumeMount\n1238\t\t}{\n1239\t\t\t{\n1240\t\t\t\tname:            \"add CA volume when no volumes exist\",\n1241\t\t\t\texpectedVolumes: []corev1.Volume{expectedCAVolume},\n1242\t\t\t\texpectedMounts:  []corev1.VolumeMount{expectedCAMount},\n1243\t\t\t},\n1244\t\t\t{\n1245\t\t\t\tname: \"add CA volume preserving other volumes\",\n1246\t\t\t\texistingVolumes: []corev1.Volume{\n1247\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"other-volume\", VolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{EmptyDir: &corev1.EmptyDirVolumeSource{}}},\n1248\t\t\t\t},\n1249\t\t\t\texistingVolumeMounts: []corev1.VolumeMount{\n1250\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"other-volume\", MountPath: \"/other\"},\n1251\t\t\t\t},\n1252\t\t\t\texpectedVolumes: []corev1.Volume{\n1253\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"other-volume\", VolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{EmptyDir: &corev1.EmptyDirVolumeSource{}}},\n1254\t\t\t\t\texpectedCAVolume,\n1255\t\t\t\t},\n1256\t\t\t\texpectedMounts: []corev1.VolumeMount{\n1257\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"other-volume\", MountPath: \"/other\"},\n1258\t\t\t\t\texpectedCAMount,\n1259\t\t\t\t},\n1260\t\t\t},\n1261\t\t\t{\n1262\t\t\t\tname: \"update CA volume preserving others\",\n1263\t\t\t\texistingVolumes: []corev1.Volume{\n1264\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"volume-1\", VolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{EmptyDir: &corev1.EmptyDirVolumeSource{}}},\n1265\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"root-ca\", VolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{\n1266\t\t\t\t\t\tConfigMap: &corev1.ConfigMapVolumeSource{\n1267\t\t\t\t\t\t\tLocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{Name: \"old-configmap\"},\n1268\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n1269\t\t\t\t\t}},\n1270\t\t\t\t},\n1271\t\t\t\texistingVolumeMounts: []corev1.VolumeMount{\n1272\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"volume-1\", MountPath: \"/path1\"},\n1273\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"root-ca\", MountPath: \"/old/path\"},\n1274\t\t\t\t},\n1275\t\t\t\texpectedVolumes: []corev1.Volume{\n1276\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"volume-1\", VolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{EmptyDir: &corev1.EmptyDirVolumeSource{}}},\n1277\t\t\t\t\texpectedCAVolume,\n1278\t\t\t\t},\n1279\t\t\t\texpectedMounts: []corev1.VolumeMount{\n1280\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"volume-1\", MountPath: \"/path1\"},\n1281\t\t\t\t\texpectedCAMount,\n1282\t\t\t\t},\n1283\t\t\t},\n1284\t\t}\n1285\t\n1286\t\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n1287\t\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n1288\t\t\t\tdeployment := testDeployment()\n1289\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes = tt.existingVolumes\n1290\t\n1291\t\t\t\t// Set existing volume mounts on istio-csr container\n1292\t\t\t\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n1293\t\t\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n1294\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts = tt.existingVolumeMounts\n1295\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n1296\t\t\t\t\t}\n1297\t\t\t\t}\n1298\t\n1299\t\t\t\tupdateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment)\n1300\t\n1301\t\t\t\t// Verify volumes match expected\n1302\t\t\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes, tt.expectedVolumes) {\n1303\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"volumes mismatch:\\ngot: %+v\\nwant: %+v\", deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes, tt.expectedVolumes)\n1304\t\t\t\t}\n1305\t\n1306\t\t\t\t// Find istio-csr container and verify mounts\n1307\t\t\t\tvar containerMounts []corev1.VolumeMount\n1308\t\t\t\tfor _, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n1309\t\t\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n1310\t\t\t\t\t\tcontainerMounts = container.VolumeMounts\n1311\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n1312\t\t\t\t\t}\n1313\t\t\t\t}\n1314\t\n1315\t\t\t\t// Verify mounts match expected\n1316\t\t\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(containerMounts, tt.expectedMounts) {\n1317\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"volume mounts mismatch:\\ngot: %+v\\nwant: %+v\", containerMounts, tt.expectedMounts)\n1318\t\t\t\t}\n1319\t\t\t})\n1320\t\t}\n1321\t}\n1322\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"40f75bc1-181a-4148-8afe-533f8e2603b5","uuid":"a312689e-9535-42a6-8c67-61fc14c6c888","timestamp":"2026-07-20T13:28:56.142Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/kpais/kpais-workspace/a_b_evals/repos/cert-manager-operator-treatment/pkg/controller/istiocsr/deployments_test.go","content":"package TestCreateOrApplyDeployments(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname             string\n\t\tpreReq           func(*Reconciler, *fakes.FakeCtrlClient)\n\t\tupdateIstioCSR   func(*v1alpha1.IstioCSR)\n\t\tskipEnvVar       bool\n\t\twantErr          string\n\t\twantErrSubstring bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"deployment reconciliation successful\",\n\t\t\tpreReq: func(r *Reconciler, m *fakes.FakeCtrlClient) {\n\t\t\t\tm.ExistsCalls(func(ctx context.Context, ns types.NamespacedName, obj client.Object) (bool, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch o := obj.(type) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *appsv1.Deployment:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment := testDeployment()\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.DeepCopyInto(o)\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *corev1.ConfigMap:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconfigmap := testConfigMap()\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconfigmap.DeepCopyInto(o)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\treturn true, nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\tm.GetCalls(func(ctx context.Context, ns types.NamespacedName, obj client.Object) error {\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch o := obj.(type) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *certmanagerv1.Issuer:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissuer := testIssuer()\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissuer.DeepCopyInto(o)\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *corev1.Secret:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsecret := testSecret()\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsecret.DeepCopyInto(o)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(i *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n\t\t\t\ti.Status.IstioCSRImage = image\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"deployment reconciliation fails as issuerRef does not exist\",\n\t\t\tpreReq: func(r *Reconciler, m *fakes.FakeCtrlClient) {\n\t\t\t\tm.ExistsCalls(func(ctx context.Context, ns types.NamespacedName, obj client.Object) (bool, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch o := obj.(type) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *appsv1.Deployment:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment := testDeployment()\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.DeepCopyInto(o)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\treturn true, nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\tm.GetCalls(func(ctx context.Context, ns types.NamespacedName, obj client.Object) error {\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch obj.(type) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer:\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn apierrors.NewNotFound(certmanagerv1.Resource(\"issuers\"), testResourcesName)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(i *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n\t\t\t\ti.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IssuerRef.Kind = certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuerKind\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantErr: `failed to generate deployment resource for creation in istiocsr-test-ns: failed to verify issuer in istiocsr-test-ns/istiocsr-test-resource: failed to fetch issuer: failed to fetch \"istio-test-ns/istiocsr-test-resource\" issuer: issuers.cert-manager.io \"istiocsr-test-resource\" not found`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"deployment reconciliation fails as image env var is empty\",\n\t\t\tpreReq: func(r *Reconciler, m *fakes.FakeCtrlClient) {\n\t\t\t\tm.ExistsCalls(func(ctx context.Context, ns types.NamespacedName, obj client.Object) (bool, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch o := obj.(type) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *appsv1.Deployment:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment := testDeployment()\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.DeepCopyInto(o)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\treturn true, nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tskipEnvVar: true,\n\t\t\twantErr:    `failed to generate deployment resource for creation in istiocsr-test-ns: failed to update image istiocsr-test-ns/istiocsr-test-resource: RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_ISTIOCSR environment variable with istiocsr image not set`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"deployment reconciliation fails while creating configmap\",\n\t\t\tpreReq: func(r *Reconciler, m *fakes.FakeCtrlClient) {\n\t\t\t\tm.ExistsCalls(func(ctx {\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch o := obj.(type) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *certmanagerv1.Issuer:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissuer := testIssuer()\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissuer.DeepCopyInto(o)\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *corev1.Secret:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsecret error`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"deployment reconciliation updating volume successful\",\n\t\t\tpreReq: func(r *Reconciler, m *fakes.FakeCtrlClient) {\n\t\t\t\tm.ExistsCalls(func(ctx error) {\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch o := obj.(type) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *appsv1.Deployment:\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn false, errTestClient\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *corev1.ConfigMap:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconfigmap := istiocsr-test-ns/cert-manager-istio-csr deployment resource already exists: test client error`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"deployment reconciliation failed while restoring to desired := obj.(type) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *appsv1.Deployment:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment := testDeployment()\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.Labels = nil\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.DeepCopyInto(o)\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *corev1.ConfigMap:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconfigmap := testConfigMap()\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconfigmap.DeepCopyInto(o)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\treturn true, nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\tm.GetCalls(func(ctx context.Context, \"invalid-pem-data\"\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconfigMap.DeepCopyInto(o)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(i *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) nil\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\treturn true, nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\tm.GetCalls(func(ctx context.Context, ns types.NamespacedName, obj client.Object) error {\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch o := obj.(type) \"watch-label-fail-test\"\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconfigMap.DeepCopyInto(o)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\tm.UpdateWithRetryCalls(func(ctx context.Context, obj label\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif obj.GetName() == \"watch-label-fail-test\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn apierrors.NewUnauthorized(\"no access to update watch label\")\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\tm.CreateReturns(nil)\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(i *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n\t\t\t\ti.Status.IstioCSRImage = \"ca-cert.pem\",\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantErr: `failed to generate deployment resource for creation in istiocsr-test-ns: failed to update volume istiocsr-test-ns/istiocsr-test-resource: failed watch label: no access to update watch label`,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"deployment reconciliation fails with non-CA certificate in ConfigMap\",\n\t\t\tpreReq: func(r *Reconciler, m *fakes.FakeCtrlClient) {\n\t\t\t\tm.ExistsCalls(func(ctx context.Context, ns types.NamespacedName, obj client.Object) (bool, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch o := obj.(type) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase certificate is not a CA certificate`,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"deployment reconciliation fails with certificate missing KeyUsageCertSign in ConfigMap\",\n\t\t\tpreReq: func(r *Reconciler, m *fakes.FakeCtrlClient) {\n\t\t\t\tm.ExistsCalls(func(ctx context.Context, ns types.NamespacedName, obj client.Object) (bool, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch o := obj.(type) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase context.Context, ns types.NamespacedName, obj client.Object) error {\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch o := obj.(type) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase *corev1.ConfigMap:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif ns.Name == \"ca-without-certsign-test\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconfigMap := testCertificateWithoutCertSignConfigMap()\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconfigMap.DeepCopyInto(o)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(i *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n\t\t\t\ti.Status.IstioCSRImage = image\n\t\t\t\ti.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.CertManager.IstioCACertificate = &v1alpha1.ConfigMapReference{\n\t\t\t\t\tName: \"ca-without-certsign-test\",\n\t\t\t\t\tKey:  \"ca-cert.pem\",\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantErr: `failed to generate deployment resource for creation in istiocsr-test-ns: failed to update volume istiocsr-test-ns/istiocsr-test-resource: failed to validate and mount CA certificate ConfigMap: invalid PEM data in CA certificate ConfigMap istiocsr-test-ns/ca-without-certsign-test key \"ca-cert.pem\": certificate does not have Certificate Sign key usage`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tr := testReconciler(t)\n\t\t\tmock := &fakes.FakeCtrlClient{}\n\t\t\tif tt.preReq != nil {\n\t\t\t\ttt.preReq(r, mock)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tr.CtrlClient = mock\n\t\t\tistiocsr := testIstioCSR()\n\t\t\tif tt.updateIstioCSR != nil {\n\t\t\t\ttt.updateIstioCSR(istiocsr)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif !tt.skipEnvVar {\n\t\t\t\tt.Setenv(\"RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_ISTIOCSR\", image)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\terr := r.createOrApplyDeployments(istiocsr, controllerDefaultResourceLabels, false)\n\t\t\tif tt.wantErrSubstring {\n\t\t\t\tif err == nil || !strings.Contains(err.Error(), tt.wantErr) {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"createOrApplyDeployments() err: %v, want substring: %q\", err, tt.wantErr)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else if (tt.wantErr != \"\" || err != nil) && (err == nil || err.Error() != tt.wantErr) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"createOrApplyDeployments() err: %v, wantErr: %v\", err, tt.wantErr)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif tt.wantErr == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tif istiocsr.Status.IstioCSRImage != image {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"createOrApplyDeployments() got: %v, want: %v\", istiocsr.Status.IstioCSRImage, image)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateArgList(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname            string\n\t\tupdateIstioCSR  func(*v1alpha1.IstioCSR)\n\t\texpectedArgs    map[string]string // key is arg name (without --), value is expected value\n\t\tnotExpectedArgs []string          // arg names (without --) that should NOT be present\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"clusterID not provided should default to Kubernetes\",\n\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n\t\t\t\t// Server config is nil, so clusterID should default\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedArgs: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"cluster-id\": defaultClusterID,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"clusterID empty string should default to Kubernetes\",\n\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n\t\t\t\tistiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Server = &v1alpha1.ServerConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\tClusterID: \"\",\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedArgs: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"cluster-id\": defaultClusterID,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"clusterID provided should use custom value\",\n\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n\t\t\t\tistiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.Server = &v1alpha1.ServerConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\tClusterID: \"cluster-123_dev.local\",\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedArgs: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"cluster-id\": \"cluster-123_dev.local\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"istioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector not provided should not include argument\",\n\t\t\tnotExpectedArgs: []string{\n\t\t\t\t\"configmap-namespace-selector\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"istioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector provided should include argument\",\n\t\t\tupdateIstioCSR: func(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) {\n\t\t\t\tistiocsr.Spec.IstioCSRConfig.IstioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector = \"cert-manager.io/test-ca-injection=enabled\"\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedArgs: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"configmap-namespace-selector\": \"cert-manager.io/test-ca-injection=enabled\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tdeployment := testDeployment()\n\t\t\tistiocsr := testIstioCSR()\n\t\t\tif tt.updateIstioCSR != nil {\n\t\t\t\ttt.updateIstioCSR(istiocsr)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tupdateArgList(deployment, istiocsr)\n\n\t\t\t// Find the istio-csr container and check its arguments\n\t\t\tvar containerArgs []string\n\t\t\tfor _, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n\t\t\t\t\tcontainerArgs = container.Args\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif len(containerArgs) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Expected container args to be set, but got empty args\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Verify each expected argument\n\t\t\tfor argName, expectedValue := range tt.expectedArgs {\n\t\t\t\texpectedArg := fmt.Sprintf(\"--%s=%s\", argName, expectedValue)\n\t\t\t\tif !containsArg(containerArgs, expectedArg) {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected to find argument %q in container args, but it was not found. Args: %v\", expectedArg, containerArgs)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Verify arguments that should NOT be present\n\t\t\tfor _, argName := range tt.notExpectedArgs {\n\t\t\t\tfor _, arg := range containerArgs {\n\t\t\t\t\tif strings.HasPrefix(arg, fmt.Sprintf(\"--%s=\", argName)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected NOT to find argument %q in container args. Args: %v\", arg, containerArgs)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// containsArg checks if the given argument is present in the args list.\nfunc containsArg(args []string, targetArg string) bool {\n\treturn slices.Contains(args, targetArg)\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateVolumeWithIssuerCA(t *testing.T) {\n\tdefaultMode := int32(420)\n\texpectedCAVolume := corev1.Volume{\n\t\tName: \"root-ca\",\n\t\tVolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{\n\t\t\tConfigMap: &corev1.ConfigMapVolumeSource{\n\t\t\t\tLocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{\n\t\t\t\t\tName: \"cert-manager-istio-csr-issuer-ca-copy\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tItems: []corev1.KeyToPath{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:  \"ca.crt\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPath: \"ca.crt\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: &defaultMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tDefaultMode: &defaultMode,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\texpectedCAMount := corev1.VolumeMount{\n\t\tName:      \"root-ca\",\n\t\tMountPath: \"/var/run/configmaps/istio-csr\",\n\t\tReadOnly:  true,\n\t}\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname                 string\n\t\texistingVolumes      []corev1.Volume\n\t\texistingVolumeMounts []corev1.VolumeMount\n\t\texpectedVolumes      []corev1.Volume\n\t\texpectedMounts       []corev1.VolumeMount\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:            \"add CA volume when no volumes exist\",\n\t\t\texpectedVolumes: []corev1.Volume{expectedCAVolume},\n\t\t\texpectedMounts:  []corev1.VolumeMount{expectedCAMount},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"add CA volume preserving other volumes\",\n\t\t\texistingVolumes: []corev1.Volume{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"other-volume\", VolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{EmptyDir: &corev1.EmptyDirVolumeSource{}}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texistingVolumeMounts: []corev1.VolumeMount{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"other-volume\", MountPath: \"/other\"},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedVolumes: []corev1.Volume{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"other-volume\", VolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{EmptyDir: &corev1.EmptyDirVolumeSource{}}},\n\t\t\t\texpectedCAVolume,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedMounts: []corev1.VolumeMount{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"other-volume\", MountPath: \"/other\"},\n\t\t\t\texpectedCAMount,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"update CA volume preserving others\",\n\t\t\texistingVolumes: []corev1.Volume{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"volume-1\", VolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{EmptyDir: &corev1.EmptyDirVolumeSource{}}},\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"root-ca\", VolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{\n\t\t\t\t\tConfigMap: &corev1.ConfigMapVolumeSource{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tLocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{Name: \"old-configmap\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texistingVolumeMounts: []corev1.VolumeMount{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"volume-1\", MountPath: \"/path1\"},\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"root-ca\", MountPath: \"/old/path\"},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedVolumes: []corev1.Volume{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"volume-1\", VolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{EmptyDir: &corev1.EmptyDirVolumeSource{}}},\n\t\t\t\texpectedCAVolume,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedMounts: []corev1.VolumeMount{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"volume-1\", MountPath: \"/path1\"},\n\t\t\t\texpectedCAMount,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tdeployment := testDeployment()\n\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes = tt.existingVolumes\n\n\t\t\t// Set existing volume mounts on istio-csr container\n\t\t\tfor i, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n\t\t\t\t\tdeployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[i].VolumeMounts = tt.existingVolumeMounts\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tupdateVolumeWithIssuerCA(deployment)\n\n\t\t\t// Verify volumes match expected\n\t\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes, tt.expectedVolumes) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"volumes mismatch:\\ngot: %+v\\nwant: %+v\", deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes, tt.expectedVolumes)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Find istio-csr container and verify mounts\n\t\t\tvar containerMounts []corev1.VolumeMount\n\t\t\tfor _, container := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {\n\t\t\t\tif container.Name == istiocsrContainerName {\n\t\t\t\t\tcontainerMounts = container.VolumeMounts\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Verify mounts match expected\n\t\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(containerMounts, tt.expectedMounts) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"volume mounts mismatch:\\ngot: %+v\\nwant: %+v\", containerMounts, tt.expectedMounts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n","numLines":1322,"startLine":1,"totalLines":1322}}}

*appsv1.Deployment) bool {\n309\t\t// check just the fields which are set by the controller and set in static manifest,\n310\t\t// as fields with default values end up in manifest and causes plain check to fail.\n311\t\tif *desired.Spec.Replicas != *fetched.Spec.Replicas ||\n312\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Selector.MatchLabels, fetched.Spec.Selector.MatchLabels) {\n313\t\t\treturn true\n314\t\t}\n315\t\n316\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Template.Labels, fetched.Spec.Template.Labels) ||\n317\t\t\tlen(desired.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers) != len(fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers) {\n318\t\t\treturn true\n319\t\t}\n320\t\n321\t\tdesiredContainer := desired.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[0]\n322\t\tfetchedContainer := fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[0]\n323\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(desiredContainer.Args, fetchedContainer.Args) ||\n324\t\t\tdesiredContainer.Name != fetchedContainer.Name || desiredContainer.Image != fetchedContainer.Image ||\n325\t\t\tdesiredContainer.ImagePullPolicy != fetchedContainer.ImagePullPolicy {\n326\t\t\treturn true\n327\t\t}\n328\t\n329\t\tif len(desiredContainer.Ports) != len(fetchedContainer.Ports) {\n330\t\t\treturn true\n331\t\t}\n332\t\tfor _, fetchedPort := range fetchedContainer.Ports {\n333\t\t\tmatched := false\n334\t\t\tfor _, desiredPort := range desiredContainer.Ports {\n335\t\t\t\tif fetchedPort.ContainerPort == desiredPort.ContainerPort {\n336\t\t\t\t\tmatched = true\n337\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n338\t\t\t\t}\n339\t\t\t}\n340\t\t\tif !matched {\n341\t\t\t\treturn true\n342\t\t\t}\n343\t\t}\n344\t\n345\t\tif desiredContainer.ReadinessProbe.HTTPGet.Path != fetchedContainer.ReadinessProbe.HTTPGet.Path ||\n346\t\t\tdesiredContainer.ReadinessProbe.InitialDelaySeconds != fetchedContainer.ReadinessProbe.InitialDelaySeconds ||\n347\t\t\tdesiredContainer.ReadinessProbe.PeriodSeconds != fetchedContainer.ReadinessProbe.PeriodSeconds {\n348\t\t\treturn true\n349\t\t}\n350\t\n351\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(desiredContainer.Resources, fetchedContainer.Resources) ||\n352\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(*desiredContainer.SecurityContext, *fetchedContainer.SecurityContext) ||\n353\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredContainer.VolumeMounts, fetchedContainer.VolumeMounts) {\n354\t\t\treturn true\n355\t\t}\n356\t\n357\t\tif desired.Spec.Template.Spec.ServiceAccountName != fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.ServiceAccountName ||\n358\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector, fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector) ||\n359\t\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes, fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes) {\n360\t\t\treturn true\n361\t\t}\n362\t\n363\t\treturn false\n364\t}\n365\t\n366\tfunc serviceSpecModified(desired, fetched *corev1.Service) bool {\n367\t\tif desired.Spec.Type != fetched.Spec.Type ||"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"40f75bc1-181a-4148-8afe-533f8e2603b5","uuid":"b0f98567-4fb9-4c83-aacb-9972202bc924","timestamp":"2026-07-20T13:29:10.746Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/kpais/kpais-workspace/a_b_evals/repos/cert-manager-operator-treatment/pkg/controller/istiocsr/utils.go","content":"func deploymentSpecModified(desired, fetched *appsv1.Deployment) bool {\n\t// check just the fields which are set by the controller and set in static manifest,\n\t// as fields with default values end up in manifest and causes plain check to fail.\n\tif *desired.Spec.Replicas != *fetched.Spec.Replicas ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Selector.MatchLabels, fetched.Spec.Selector.MatchLabels) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Template.Labels, fetched.Spec.Template.Labels) ||\n\t\tlen(desired.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers) != len(fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tdesiredContainer := desired.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[0]\n\tfetchedContainer := fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers[0]\n\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(desiredContainer.Args, fetchedContainer.Args) ||\n\t\tdesiredContainer.Name != fetchedContainer.Name || desiredContainer.Image != fetchedContainer.Image ||\n\t\tdesiredContainer.ImagePullPolicy != fetchedContainer.ImagePullPolicy {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif len(desiredContainer.Ports) != len(fetchedContainer.Ports) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\tfor _, fetchedPort := range fetchedContainer.Ports {\n\t\tmatched := false\n\t\tfor _, desiredPort := range desiredContainer.Ports {\n\t\t\tif fetchedPort.ContainerPort == desiredPort.ContainerPort {\n\t\t\t\tmatched = true\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif !matched {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif desiredContainer.ReadinessProbe.HTTPGet.Path != fetchedContainer.ReadinessProbe.HTTPGet.Path ||\n\t\tdesiredContainer.ReadinessProbe.InitialDelaySeconds != fetchedContainer.ReadinessProbe.InitialDelaySeconds ||\n\t\tdesiredContainer.ReadinessProbe.PeriodSeconds != fetchedContainer.ReadinessProbe.PeriodSeconds {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(desiredContainer.Resources, fetchedContainer.Resources) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(*desiredContainer.SecurityContext, *fetchedContainer.SecurityContext) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desiredContainer.VolumeMounts, fetchedContainer.VolumeMounts) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\tif desired.Spec.Template.Spec.ServiceAccountName != fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.ServiceAccountName ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector, fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.NodeSelector) ||\n\t\t!reflect.DeepEqual(desired.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes, fetched.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes) {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc serviceSpecModified(desired, fetched *corev1.Service) bool {\n\tif desired.Spec.Type != fetched.Spec.Type ||","numLines":60,"startLine":308,"totalLines":550}}}

err != nil {\n13\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"%s configuration validation failed\", trustManager.GetName())\n14\t\t}\n15\t\n16\t\tresourceLabels := getResourceLabels(trustManager)\n17\t\tresourceAnnotations := getResourceAnnotations(trustManager)\n18\t\n19\t\ttrustNamespace := getTrustNamespace(trustManager)\n20\t\tif err := r.validateTrustNamespace(trustNamespace); err != nil {\n21\t\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"trust namespace %q validation failed\", trustNamespace)\n22\t\t}\n23\t\n24\t\tcaBundleHash, err := r.createOrApplyDefaultCAPackageConfigMap(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations)\n25\t\tif err != nil {\n26\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile default CA package ConfigMap\")\n27\t\t\treturn err\n28\t\t}\n29\t\n30\t\tif err := r.createOrApplyServiceAccounts(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations); err != nil {\n31\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile serviceaccount resource\")\n32\t\t\treturn err\n33\t\t}\n34\t\n35\t\tif err := r.createOrApplyRBACResources(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations, trustNamespace); err != nil {\n36\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile RBAC resources\")\n37\t\t\treturn err\n38\t\t}\n39\t\n40\t\tif err := r.createOrApplyServices(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations); err != nil {\n41\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile service resources\")\n42\t\t\treturn err\n43\t\t}\n44\t\n45\t\tif err := r.createOrApplyIssuer(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations); err != nil {\n46\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile issuer resource\")\n47\t\t\treturn err\n48\t\t}\n49\t\n50\t\tif err := r.createOrApplyCertificate(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations); err != nil {\n51\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile certificate resource\")\n52\t\t\treturn err\n53\t\t}\n54\t\n55\t\tif err := r.createOrApplyDeployment(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations, caBundleHash); err != nil {\n56\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile deployment resource\")\n57\t\t\treturn err\n58\t\t}\n59\t\n60\t\tif err := r.createOrApplyValidatingWebhookConfiguration(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations); err != nil {\n61\t\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile validatingwebhookconfiguration resource\")\n62\t\t\treturn err\n63\t\t}\n64\t\n65\t\tif err := r.updateStatusObservedState(trustManager); err != nil {\n66\t\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update status observed state\")\n67\t\t}\n68\t\n69\t\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"finished reconciliation of trustmanager\", \"name\", trustManager.GetName())\n70\t\treturn nil\n71\t}\n72\t\n73\t// validateTrustNamespace validates that the trust namespace exists.\n74\tfunc (r *Reconciler) validateTrustNamespace(namespace string) error {\n75\t\texists, err := r.namespaceExists(namespace)\n76\t\tif err != nil {\n77\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to check if namespace %q exists: %w\", namespace, err)\n78\t\t}\n79\t\tif !exists {\n80\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"trust namespace %q does not exist, create the namespace before creating TrustManager CR\", namespace)\n81\t\t}\n82\t\treturn nil\n83\t}\n84\t\n85\t// updateStatusObservedState populates and persists the TrustManager status with the observed state.\n86\t// Returns nil if no changes were needed, otherwise returns an error if the update fails.\n87\tfunc (r *Reconciler) updateStatusObservedState(trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n88\t\tchanged := false\n89\t\n90\t\tif image := os.Getenv(trustManagerImageNameEnvVarName); trustManager.Status.TrustManagerImage != image {\n91\t\t\ttrustManager.Status.TrustManagerImage = image\n92\t\t\tchanged = true\n93\t\t}\n94\t\n95\t\tif ns := getTrustNamespace(trustManager); trustManager.Status.TrustNamespace != ns {\n96\t\t\ttrustManager.Status.TrustNamespace = ns\n97\t\t\tchanged = true\n98\t\t}\n99\t\n100\t\tif policy := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.SecretTargets.Policy; trustManager.Status.SecretTargetsPolicy != policy {\n101\t\t\ttrustManager.Status.SecretTargetsPolicy = policy\n102\t\t\tchanged = true\n103\t\t}\n104\t\n105\t\tif policy := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.DefaultCAPackage.Policy; trustManager.Status.DefaultCAPackagePolicy != policy {\n106\t\t\ttrustManager.Status.DefaultCAPackagePolicy = policy\n107\t\t\tchanged = true\n108\t\t}\n109\t\n110\t\tif policy := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.FilterExpiredCertificates; trustManager.Status.FilterExpiredCertificatesPolicy != policy {\n111\t\t\ttrustManager.Status.FilterExpiredCertificatesPolicy = policy\n112\t\t\tchanged = true\n113\t\t}\n114\t\n115\t\tif !changed {\n116\t\t\treturn nil\n117\t\t}\n118\t\n119\t\treturn r.updateStatus(r.ctx, trustManager)\n120\t}\n121\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"40f75bc1-181a-4148-8afe-533f8e2603b5","uuid":"c06ca699-5d5f-48d3-b666-dff3e08ce931","timestamp":"2026-07-20T13:29:11.054Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/kpais/kpais-workspace/a_b_evals/repos/cert-manager-operator-treatment/pkg/controller/trustmanager/install_trustmanager.go","content":"package trustmanager\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"os\"\n\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/api/operator/v1alpha1\"\n\t\"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/controller/common\"\n)\n\nfunc (r *Reconciler) reconcileTrustManagerDeployment(trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tif err := validateTrustManagerConfig(trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"%s configuration validation failed\", trustManager.GetName())\n\t}\n\n\tresourceLabels := getResourceLabels(trustManager)\n\tresourceAnnotations := getResourceAnnotations(trustManager)\n\n\ttrustNamespace := getTrustNamespace(trustManager)\n\tif err := r.validateTrustNamespace(trustNamespace); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, \"trust namespace %q validation failed\", trustNamespace)\n\t}\n\n\tcaBundleHash, err := r.createOrApplyDefaultCAPackageConfigMap(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile default CA package ConfigMap\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.createOrApplyServiceAccounts(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations); err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile serviceaccount resource\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.createOrApplyRBACResources(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations, trustNamespace); err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile RBAC resources\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.createOrApplyServices(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations); err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile service resources\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.createOrApplyIssuer(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations); err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile issuer resource\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.createOrApplyCertificate(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations); err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile certificate resource\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.createOrApplyDeployment(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations, caBundleHash); err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile deployment resource\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.createOrApplyValidatingWebhookConfiguration(trustManager, resourceLabels, resourceAnnotations); err != nil {\n\t\tr.log.Error(err, \"failed to reconcile validatingwebhookconfiguration resource\")\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.updateStatusObservedState(trustManager); err != nil {\n\t\treturn common.FromClientError(err, \"failed to update status observed state\")\n\t}\n\n\tr.log.V(4).Info(\"finished reconciliation of trustmanager\", \"name\", trustManager.GetName())\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// validateTrustNamespace validates that the trust namespace exists.\nfunc (r *Reconciler) validateTrustNamespace(namespace string) error {\n\texists, err := r.namespaceExists(namespace)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to check if namespace %q exists: %w\", namespace, err)\n\t}\n\tif !exists {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"trust namespace %q does not exist, create the namespace before creating TrustManager CR\", namespace)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// updateStatusObservedState populates and persists the TrustManager status with the observed state.\n// Returns nil if no changes were needed, otherwise returns an error if the update fails.\nfunc (r *Reconciler) updateStatusObservedState(trustManager *v1alpha1.TrustManager) error {\n\tchanged := false\n\n\tif image := os.Getenv(trustManagerImageNameEnvVarName); trustManager.Status.TrustManagerImage != image {\n\t\ttrustManager.Status.TrustManagerImage = image\n\t\tchanged = true\n\t}\n\n\tif ns := getTrustNamespace(trustManager); trustManager.Status.TrustNamespace != ns {\n\t\ttrustManager.Status.TrustNamespace = ns\n\t\tchanged = true\n\t}\n\n\tif policy := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.SecretTargets.Policy; trustManager.Status.SecretTargetsPolicy != policy {\n\t\ttrustManager.Status.SecretTargetsPolicy = policy\n\t\tchanged = true\n\t}\n\n\tif policy := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.DefaultCAPackage.Policy; trustManager.Status.DefaultCAPackagePolicy != policy {\n\t\ttrustManager.Status.DefaultCAPackagePolicy = policy\n\t\tchanged = true\n\t}\n\n\tif policy := trustManager.Spec.TrustManagerConfig.FilterExpiredCertificates; trustManager.Status.FilterExpiredCertificatesPolicy != policy {\n\t\ttrustManager.Status.FilterExpiredCertificatesPolicy = policy\n\t\tchanged = true\n\t}\n\n\tif !changed {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn r.updateStatus(r.ctx, trustManager)\n}\n","numLines":121,"startLine":1,"totalLines":121}}}

mto-001-add-api-field (4/6 pass) TIE
JudgeValueRationale
code_correctness4

The implementation is largely correct with proper technical choices:

Correct aspects:

  1. Go type correctness: Uses *int32 pointer type correctly for the optional field, with proper nil checks.
  2. Kubebuilder markers: All three markers are present and syntactically correct: +kubebuilder:validation:Minimum=1, +kubebuilder:validation:Maximum=20, +kubebuilder:default=5. Uses +optional (equivalent to +kubebuilder:validation:Optional).
  3. Informer access pattern: Correctly uses clusterpodplacementconfig.GetClusterPodPlacementConfig() singleton informer pattern rather than direct API calls. The import path github.com/openshift/multiarch-tuning-operator/pkg/informers/clusterpodplacementconfig appears reasonable for this codebase.
  4. Conversion handling: The v1alpha1 conversion is done thoroughly using the annotation-preservation pattern (matching the existing FallbackArchitecture pattern), which is actually more robust than just ignoring the field — it preserves data across round-trip conversions.
  5. Test updates: Correctly identifies test file changes needed.

Issue — Make target ordering is wrong: The agent states make generate should run BEFORE make manifests, which directly contradicts the reference implementation's critical requirement that make manifests MUST precede make generate. The reference explicitly states "Running make generate before make manifests fails because generate depends on the updated CRD" and that "this ordering is critical and non-obvious." The agent gets this backwards. This is a notable error as the reference calls out make target ordering as a key criterion for a score of 5.

Minor concern: The agent's conversion approach using annotations is more sophisticated than what was strictly required (a simple ignore/comment), but it's a valid and arguably better approach that follows existing codebase patterns. This is not an error.

Overall, the implementation would compile and function correctly, but the make target ordering error is a meaningful mistake that would cause build failures in practice, bringing the score down from 5 to 4.

consulted_docsFAIL

Read 0/3 expected docs (coverage 0%, threshold 50%)

convention_adherence3

The agent demonstrates awareness of several key conventions but has notable deviations:

Conventions followed well:

  • Uses *int32 pointer type with correct kubebuilder markers (+kubebuilder:default=5, +kubebuilder:validation:Minimum=1, +kubebuilder:validation:Maximum=20) — matches the expected approach.
  • Uses the informer access pattern (clusterpodplacementconfig.GetClusterPodPlacementConfig()) rather than direct API calls, which is the correct CPPC access pattern for this codebase.
  • Handles the v1alpha1 conversion properly using the annotation-preservation pattern already established for FallbackArchitecture, which shows good awareness of the existing codebase pattern.

Conventions missed/violated:

  • Make target order is reversed: The agent states make generate should be run before make manifests, which directly contradicts the repository convention that make manifests MUST precede make generate. The reference implementation explicitly calls this out as "critical and non-obvious," and the agent got it backwards. This is a significant convention violation.
  • The agent uses +optional marker instead of +kubebuilder:validation:Optional as shown in the reference, though this is a minor difference.
  • The test updates reference strconv.Itoa(int(DefaultMaxRetryCount)) but the agent doesn't mention whether the tests use the fluent builder API pattern — the changes shown are minimal and don't introduce new test objects, so this is not a major issue.

The reversed make target order is a significant convention violation that would cause build failures and would definitely be caught in code review. Combined with mostly correct API and informer patterns, this lands at a score of 3.

efficiencyFAIL

Excessive: 119 turns, $7.92

hallucination_check3

Let me analyze the agent's implementation for hallucinations:

1. Package imports in pod_model.go: The agent imports "github.com/openshift/multiarch-tuning-operator/pkg/informers/clusterpodplacementconfig" and calls clusterpodplacementconfig.GetClusterPodPlacementConfig(). The reference implementation mentions using a "CPPC informer" and says "the informer is injected into the reconciler — it should already be accessible in pod_model.go's context." The agent's approach of importing a specific package path and calling GetClusterPodPlacementConfig() as a package-level function is plausible — this follows a singleton informer pattern. However, without seeing the actual codebase, this specific package path and function name could be invented. The reference says "cppcInformer.GetClusterPodPlacementConfig()" suggesting it's called on an injected informer object, not a package-level function. This is a potential hallucination — the agent invented a specific package path and function signature.

2. Existing imports in pod_model.go: The agent lists imports including "github.com/openshift/multiarch-tuning-operator/api/common", "github.com/openshift/multiarch-tuning-operator/api/common/plugins", "github.com/openshift/multiarch-tuning-operator/api/v1beta1", "github.com/openshift/multiarch-tuning-operator/pkg/models". These are presented as already-existing imports. Some of these may be real, but the agent is claiming these exist in the current file without verification.

3. Conversion file approach: The agent references FallbackArchAnnotation as if it already exists at line 25 of api/v1alpha1/clusterPodPlacementConfig_conversion.go. The agent says "Use the same annotation-preservation pattern already used for FallbackArchitecture" — this implies the pattern already exists. This could be accurate if the codebase already has this pattern for FallbackArchitecture conversion, but it could also be invented.

4. Make target ordering: The agent says make generate should run BEFORE make manifests, which directly contradicts the reference implementation that says make manifests must come FIRST. The reference explicitly states: "Running make generate before make manifests fails because generate depends on the updated CRD. These targets are NOT interchangeable." This is a significant error in the ordering, though not a hallucination of non-existent code.

5. Test file references: The agent references internal/controller/podplacement/pod_reconciler_test.go at specific lines (107, 170, 658) and says to change MaxRetryCount to DefaultMaxRetryCount. The line numbers may be approximate, but the pattern is reasonable.

6. Field type and markers: The agent correctly uses *int32 pointer type with the required markers (Minimum=1, Maximum=20, default=5), which matches the reference.

Key concerns:

  • The clusterpodplacementconfig.GetClusterPodPlacementConfig() package-level function call pattern may be invented vs. the reference's informer-based pattern
  • The make target ordering is wrong (generate before manifests vs. manifests before generate)
  • The existing import paths and conversion patterns are presented with confidence but may not match the actual codebase

The implementation is mostly reasonable and follows plausible patterns, but there are concerns about the specific package path for the CPPC informer singleton and the incorrect make target ordering. The core code changes (types, conversion, pod_model) follow reasonable patterns even if some details might not match exactly. The make target ordering error is significant but is more of a factual error than a hallucination of non-existent code.

task_success4

The agent correctly identified and modified all required files: (1) Added the MaxImageInspectionRetries field to ClusterPodPlacementConfigSpec with the correct *int32 pointer type and all three kubebuilder markers (Minimum=1, Maximum=20, default=5). (2) Updated pod_model.go to use the CPPC informer singleton pattern (clusterpodplacementconfig.GetClusterPodPlacementConfig()) instead of a hardcoded constant or direct API call. (3) Updated the v1alpha1 conversion functions with an annotation-preservation pattern for round-trip safety, which goes beyond the minimum "ignore with comment" requirement but is functionally superior. (4) Updated test references. The main issue is the make target ordering: the agent states make generate before make manifests, which is the opposite of the reference's required ordering (make manifests first, then make generate). The reference explicitly states this ordering is critical and non-obvious, and getting it wrong is a significant gap. However, the agent's actual code changes are all correct and would work once the generated files are properly regenerated.

pairwiseTIE

Both outputs are virtually identical in their implementation approach and completeness. Let me compare against the reference implementation:

1. API field addition (v1beta1 types): Both A and B correctly add MaxImageInspectionRetries *int32 with the proper kubebuilder markers (+optional, +kubebuilder:default=5, +kubebuilder:validation:Minimum=1, +kubebuilder:validation:Maximum=20). Both match the reference.

2. pod_model.go changes: Both A and B:

  • Rename MaxRetryCount to DefaultMaxRetryCount (A uses int32 type, B uses untyped constant — both work)
  • Update maxRetries() to read from the CPPC informer singleton via clusterpodplacementconfig.GetClusterPodPlacementConfig()
  • Add the import for clusterpodplacementconfig package
  • Both correctly compare v >= int64(maxRetryCount) or v >= maxRetries where maxRetries is int64

3. v1alpha1 conversion: Both A and B:

  • Add the MaxImageInspectionRetriesAnnotation constant
  • Update ConvertTo to restore the field from the annotation
  • Update ConvertFrom to preserve the field in an annotation
  • Add necessary imports (strconv, and A also adds fmt while B uses strconv.FormatInt)

4. Make targets: Both correctly identify make generate first, then make manifests, matching the reference. Both mention make fmt and make vet as follow-ups.

5. Test file updates: Output A mentions updating pod_reconciler_test.go references from MaxRetryCount to int(DefaultMaxRetryCount). Output B does not mention this. The reference implementation also mentions this update. This is a minor advantage for A, but both could be considered acceptable since the test update is a natural consequence of the constant rename.

Minor differences:

  • A uses const DefaultMaxRetryCount int32 = 5 while B uses const DefaultMaxRetryCount = 5 — both are acceptable
  • A uses fmt.Sprintf for conversion while B uses strconv.FormatInt — both work
  • A mentions test file updates while B doesn't — slight edge for A
  • B provides a cleaner summary table at the end

Overall, both implementations are substantially correct and nearly identical in approach. The test file mention in A is a minor plus, but B's cleaner presentation balances it out. This is effectively a tie.

Input
repo_path: /Users/kpais/kpais-workspace/a_b_evals/repos/multiarch-tuning-operator-treatment
task: |
  Add a new optional int32 field MaxImageInspectionRetries to ClusterPodPlacementConfigSpec
  in api/v1beta1/clusterpodplacementconfig_types.go. Apply kubebuilder markers:
  minimum value of 1, maximum value of 20, and a default of 5.

  Then update the image inspection retry logic in internal/controller/podplacement/pod_model.go
  to read this value from the CPPC informer singleton (via pkg/informers/clusterpodplacementconfig/)
  instead of any hardcoded constant.

  Also update the v1alpha1 conversion so the new field round-trips correctly across API versions.

  Finally, state which make targets must be run after the API change and in what order.
task_id: mto-001-add-api-field
repo: multiarch-tuning-operator
category: api-change
complexity: high

If left empty, all the namespaces are considered.\n42\t\t// The default sample allows to exclude all the namespaces where the\n43\t\t// label \"multiarch.openshift.io/exclude-pod-placement\" exists.\n44\t\t// +optional\n45\t\tNamespaceSelector *metav1.LabelSelector `json:\"namespaceSelector,omitempty\"`\n46\t\n47\t\t// Plugins defines the configurable plugins for this component.\n48\t\t// This field is optional and will be omitted from the output if not set.\n49\t\t// +optional\n50\t\tPlugins *plugins.Plugins `json:\"plugins,omitempty\"`\n51\t\n52\t\t// FallbackArchitecture defines the architecture to use if the image inspector cannot determine the image's architecture.\n53\t\t// If configured, the PodPlacementController will set the node affinity of the pod to the fallback architecture\n54\t\t// if the image inspector cannot determine the image's architecture.\n55\t\t// +optional\n56\t\t// +kubebuilder:default=\"\"\n57\t\t// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum=arm64;amd64;ppc64le;s390x;\"\"\n58\t\tFallbackArchitecture string `json:\"fallbackArchitecture,omitempty\"`\n59\t}\n60\t\n61\t// ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus defines the observed state of ClusterPodPlacementConfig\n62\ttype ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus struct {\n63\t\t// Conditions represents the latest available observations of a ClusterPodPlacementConfig's current state.\n64\t\tConditions []metav1.Condition `json:\"conditions,omitempty\"`\n65\t\n66\t\t// The following fields are used to derive the conditions. They are not exposed to the user.\n67\t\t//nolint:revive // controller-gen requires json tags on all fields, even unexported ones\n68\t\tavailable                                bool `json:\"-\"`\n69\t\tprogressing                              bool `json:\"-\"`\n70\t\tdegraded                                 bool `json:\"-\"`\n71\t\tdeprovisioning                           bool `json:\"-\"`\n72\t\tpodPlacementControllerNotReady           bool `json:\"-\"`\n73\t\tpodPlacementWebhookNotReady              bool `json:\"-\"`\n74\t\tmutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable bool `json:\"-\"`\n75\t\tcanDeployMutatingWebhook                 bool `json:\"-\"`\n76\t}\n77\t\n78\tfunc (s *ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus) IsReady() bool {\n79\t\treturn
